Skills: Python, Data Visualization, Data Analysis, Statistics, Tableau, Power BI, Microsoft Excel, SQL
Deskripsi:
Requirement: 
 1. Bachelor’s degree in  Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related field with certifications related to data science, data analysts business analytics, or AI/ML. 
 2.  Minimum 1–3 years of hands-on experience  in a data analyst or similar analytical role. 
 3. Have a strong analytical mindset, excellent data manipulation skills, and a passion for uncovering insights that drive business value 
 4. Proficiency in  MongoDB, SQL and programming languages like Python or R. 
 5. Strong experience with data visualization tools  (e.g., Tableau, Power BI, or Looker). 
 6. Solid understanding of  statistical analysis, hypothesis testing, and data modeling. 
 7. Familiarity with machine learning concepts and basic experience with frameworks like  scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or similar. 
 8. Strong business acumen, data product knowledge and problem solving abilities. 
 9. Ability to clearly communicate technical insights to non-technical stakeholders. 
 10. Experience in a business analyst role or working closely with business units. 
 11. Knowledge of data engineering pipelines and tools is a plus. 
 12. Familiarity with AI use cases in business contexts  (e.g., customer segmentation, churn prediction). 
 
 Job Description: 
 1. Collect, clean, and transform data from multiple sources for analysis. 
 2. Perform exploratory data analysis to identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities. 
 3. Develop and maintain dashboards and reports to support data-driven decision-making. 
 4. Collaborate with product, marketing, operations, and other departments to understand data needs. 
 5. Work with machine learning and AI teams to support data preparation and model evaluation. 
 6. Assist in forecasting, segmentation, and performance analysis projects. 
 7. Translate analytical findings into actionable business insights and recommendations. 
 8. Document processes and develop reusable code/templates for analysis. 
 9. Often collaborate with stakeholders to translate data into strategic decisions.

Data Analyst 
 PT. Quad Sinergi Teknologi (QST) adalah perusahaan IT Solution yang berfokus pada penyediaan solusi infrastruktur teknologi, jaringan, dan sistem yang inovatif dan tepat guna bagi klien kami. Saat ini kami membuka kesempatan bagi talenta terbaik untuk bergabung sebagai Data Analyst.

 - Memiliki pemahaman yang kuat terhadap proses bisnis. 
 - Mampu melakukan presentasi teknis dengan baik. 
 - Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan analisis yang baik. 
 - Memiliki sertifikasi terkait menjadi nilai tambah.

 - Gaji kompetitif 
 - Lingkungan kerja profesional dan kolaboratif 
 - Kesempatan pengembangan skill & karier

Skills: Data Visualization, Microsoft Excel, Data Analysis, Statistics, IBM SPSS
Deskripsi:
Halo! Kami dari Habbie, sedang mencari Data Analyst yang bertanggung jawab untuk mengelola, menganalisis, serta menyajikan data agar dapat mendukung kebutuhan pengembangan sistem, khususnya dalam mendukung tim Web Developer melalui manajemen database yang akurat, efisien, dan mudah diakses. Posisi ini menjadi penghubung penting antara data mentah dengan strategi bisnis sekaligus kebutuhan teknis pengembangan aplikasi internal perusahaan. 
 
 Habbie adalah sebuah startup retail skala nasional yang berpusat di Yogyakarta. Habbie bergerak di industri Retail atau FMCG dengan produk-produk seperti minyak telon, cajuput, parfum, dan hair oil. Kami bangga menyediakan produk berkualitas tinggi untuk memenuhi kebutuhan konsumen kami dan menciptakan tempat kerja yang nyaman di mana karyawan bisa belajar, tumbuh, dan menjadi versi terbaik dari diri mereka. 
 
 Visi kami di PT Habbie Bangun Aromatik adalah menjadi merek yang paling terkenal, dibicarakan, disukai, dan diinginkan oleh ibu dan bayi. Kami berkomitmen untuk menjadi tempat kerja yang hebat, tempat orang bisa belajar, berkembang, dan mencapai potensi maksimal mereka. Selain itu, kami bercita-cita menjadi organisasi yang efektif, ringkas, menguntungkan, dan bergerak cepat, serta membangun jaringan mitra yang saling menguntungkan dan loyal. 
 
 Tugas & Tanggung Jawab: 
 
 Mengumpulkan, membersihkan, dan mengelola data dari berbagai sumber. 
 Membangun dan memelihara struktur database untuk mendukung aplikasi internal/web. 
 Membuat query dan prosedur untuk kebutuhan Web Developer dan tim IT. 
 Mengoptimalkan performa database agar lebih cepat, aman, dan efisien. 
 Menyediakan dataset yang valid untuk keperluan analisis, reporting, dan pengembangan aplikasi. 
 Membuat laporan, dashboard, dan visualisasi data untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan bisnis. 
 Menjaga kualitas, integritas, dan keamanan data. 
 
 
 Kualifikasi: 
 
 Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Statistik, Matematika, Ekonomi, Ilmu Komputer, Sistem Informasi, atau jurusan terkait. 
 Pengalaman kerja minimal 1–2 tahun sebagai Data Analyst atau Database Support (fresh graduate dengan portofolio dipertimbangkan). 
 Mahir dan menguasai analisis data menggunakan Excel. 
 Memahami tools analisis data (Excel advance, Python/R, atau software statistik lainnya). 
 Berpikir analitis, detail-oriented, dan mampu menyederhanakan data kompleks. 
 Keterampilan komunikasi yang baik, khususnya dalam menjembatani kebutuhan bisnis dan kebutuhan teknis Web Developer. 
 
 
 Kenapa Habbie? 
 Bergabunglah dengan kami dan rasakan suasana kerja yang santai namun penuh peluang untuk berkembang. Kami sangat mendukung perkembangan diri Anda dengan manajer berpengalaman dan subsidi untuk berbagai pelatihan. Nikmati sedikit fleksibilitas dalam waktu kerja dan manfaatkan fasilitas makan siang gratis, snack, serta acara kantor yang seru. 
 
 Lokasi Kantor 
 Kantor kami berada di tengah kota Yogyakarta, kantor dekat dengan Transjogja, stasiun kota Yogyakarta, tempat makan, Cafe, Pom bensin, dan pusat perbelanjaan. Kantor juga dekat dengan Ikon kota Yogyakarta, yaitu Tugu Yogya. Lingkungan sekitar aman, nyaman, dan tenang, serta dilengkapi dengan tempat parkir yang memadai dan akses mudah ke transportasi umum seperti Transjogja.

Skills: SQL, Power BI, Redis, Python, Statistics, Data Visualization, Tableau, Data Analysis
Deskripsi:
We are currently looking for a Data Analyst to join our team for a Smart City Enterprise Architecture project. In this role, you will serve as the core driver for defining data structures, governance, and integration models. You will work closely with Business Analysts and Architecture Leaders to translate business requirements into comprehensive data architecture blueprints. 
 
 Key Responsibilities: 
 
 Identify, classify, and document data entities, data flows, and master data models across the domain 
 Analyze current data landscapes and integration workflows within the assigned Smart City domain 
 Map and document data governance policies, security standards, and compliance frameworks 
 Identify data quality gaps, integration bottlenecks, and opportunities for data interoperability 
 Ensure strict alignment between data architecture models and the overall business objectives 
 
 
 Job Requirements: 
 
 Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Information Systems, Statistics, or a related field 
 Proven experience as a Data Analyst, Data Architect, or Enterprise Data practitioner 
 Solid understanding of Enterprise Architecture principles; familiarity with the TOGAF framework is highly preferred 
 Proficiency in data modeling techniques (conceptual, logical, physical) and tools (e.g., ERD, ArchiMate) 
 Strong analytical skills with the ability to design standardized data structures without over-engineering the technical database design 
 Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with experience facilitating review workshops 
 Experience in smart city, government public services, or large-scale data integration projects is a significant plus 
 Willingness to travel and work on-site (hybrid arrangement) to project locations for stakeholder workshops and executive reviews

Skills: Data Analysis, KPI Reports, SQL, Business Analysis, Data Quality
Deskripsi:
Responsibilities  
 
 Empower VP-level decision-making by delivering rapid, structured analytical intelligence across cross-functional domains, including Business Operations, Product Strategy, and Corporate Functions.  
 Transform fragmented, multi-source inputs; encompassing internal systems, telemetry logs, and external benchmarks, into high-fidelity, analysis-ready datasets.  
 Execute rigorous data normalization, reconciliation, and deduplication to engineer reusable "Analysis Views" anchored to standardized enterprise KPI definitions.  
 Author high-impact intelligence outputs designed for executive consumption, including:  
 
 
 Executive Dashboards: Real-time visibility into mission-critical performance drivers.  
 Strategic Briefs: Concise narratives identifying variance drivers, downstream implications, and prioritized tactical recommendations.  
 
 
 Provide rapid-response analytical support for cornerstone leadership objectives, including:  
 
 
 Monitoring customer lifecycle velocity and product penetration signals.  
 Analyzing incident patterns, capacity distribution, and early-warning trend detection.  
 Quantifying productivity benchmarks and strategic program performance.  
 
 
 Institutionalize analytical speed by maintaining a library of standardized executive templates, KPI taxonomies, and governed dataset structures for recurring strategic inquiries.  
 Collaborate with General Management across Engineering, Product, and Architecture to harmonize data interpretations, validate assumptions, and ensure a "single source of truth."  
 Uphold the highest standards of discretion and data integrity while managing sensitive, high-stakes corporate information.  
 
 
 Requirements:  
 
 Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science / Information Systems / Statistics / Engineering (or equivalent experience).  
 2+ years of experience in analytics / BI / data analysis roles, with strong execution discipline and stakeholder maturity.  
 Strong analytical foundations: KPI reasoning, trend analysis, segmentation logic, cohorts/funnels (where applicable), and ability to interpret results for business decisions.  
 Strong data preparation capability by comfortable handling messy data, joining across sources, and ensuring consistency before analysis.  
 Strong SQL capability and comfortable with at least one analytics tooling approach (BI platform and/or Python for analysis automation).  
 Ability to work in fast-moving environments: shifting priorities, short deadlines, and iterative problem statements.  
 Strong communication by can deliver concise, decision-grade summaries, not only charts.  
 
 
 Nice To Have:  
 
 Extensive exposure to multi-domain intelligence, providing strategic insights across Operations, Delivery, Customer Growth, Human Capital/People Analytics, and Efficiency.  
 Proven ability to institutionalize efficiency by automating complex analytical workflows, utilizing scripting and low-latency pipeline orchestration to ensure seamless, scheduled intelligence refreshes.  
 Solid foundation in cloud-integrated data environments, with a specific focus on leveraging Google Cloud Platform (GCP) to support enterprise-scale data initiatives.  
 Sophisticated understanding of event-driven data patterns and near-real-time monitoring, essential for architecting early-warning systems and proactive operational indicators.  
 Expert-level experience in curating high-stakes reporting suites, including Monthly Business Reviews (MBR), OKR performance tracking, and high-impact excerpts for Board of Directors presentations

Skills: Power BI, B2C Marketing, Microsoft Excel, B2B Marketing, Data Visualization, Python, Data Analysis, Marketing Strategy, Sales Strategy, Statistics, Operations Management, SQL
Deskripsi:
Deskripsi Perusahaan  
 PT  Waschen Alora Indonesia (Alora Group) adalah sebuah entitas induk perusahan yang memiliki core business di bidang jasa kebersihan, seperti: Laundry rumah sakit (Healtcare Laundry), Penyewaan linen rumah sakit (Linen Rental), Laundry untuk Perusahaan (Corporate Laundry), Laundry Retail (residence), Jasa kebersihan rumah (Home Care) dan Jasa Kebersihan Kantor (Office Care).  
 Kami mengundang talenta terbaik yang memiliki dedikasi, berpikiran terbuka (growth mindset) dan loyalitas untuk pengembangan karir dan pengembangan bisnis demi kemajuan bersama di masa depan. Kami tidak mencari sekadar analis data. Kami mencari “arsitek pertumbuhan”, seseorang yang mampu mengubah data menjadi strategi, dan strategi menjadi dampak nyata.  Kami mencari “problem solver berbasis data”, seseorang yang mampu melihat pola di balik angka, memahami bisnis secara mendalam, dan mengubah insight menjadi keputusan strategis. 
 Di peran ini, Anda akan berada di jantung pengambilan keputusan memahami apa yang benar-benar bekerja, apa yang tidak, dan ke mana kita harus melangkah berikutnya. 
 
 
Tanggung Jawab (Job Description) 
 1.	Turn Data Into Strategic Insight 
 
 Melakukan analisis data dan riset pasar untuk memahami tren industri, kebutuhan pelanggan, posisi kompetitif perusahaan serta peluang dan area yang perlu ditingkatkan dalam operasional bisnis. 
 Melakukan riset dan analisis mendalam (in-depth analysis) terhadap customer, marketing metrics, competitor landscape, serta tren marketing terbaru untuk mengidentifikasi peluang dan menutup gap pada produk maupun funnel. 
 Menggali data operasional, data pelanggan, data pasar untuk menemukan pola, peluang, dan risiko yang tidak terlihat oleh orang lain.  
 
 
 2.	Drive Decision-Making 
 
 Menyajikan insight yang tajam dan relevan untuk membantu manajemen mengambil keputusan berbasis data, bukan asumsi. 
 Bertanggung jawab atas fungsi analitik dengan merancang strategi pelacakan (tracking), membangun kerangka pengukuran (measurement framework), serta memberikan insight yang jelas terkait aktivitas operasional dan marketing. 
 Berkolaborasi dengan tim lintas fungsi untuk memberikan insight yang mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis 
 
 
 3.	Solve Real Business Problems 
 
 Mengidentifikasi bottleneck, inefficiency, dan peluang growth dalam proses bisnis, lalu memberikan solusi yang actionable. 
 Mendukung pelaksanaan A/B testing dan desain eksperimen, memastikan setiap project dapat diukur dengan baik dan hasilnya valid secara statistik.  
 
 
 4.	Build Data-Driven System 
 
 Mengembangkan dashboard, model analitik, dan framework pengukuran yang menjadi fondasi pengambilan keputusan perusahaan. 
 
 
 5.	Collaborate Across Functions 
 
 Bekerja lintas tim (Operations, Marketing, Finance, Product) untuk memastikan setiap strategi didukung oleh data yang solid. 
 
 
 Kualifikasi (Requirements) 
 
 Pendidikan minimal Diploma/Sarjana di bidang terkait (relevan). 
 Memiliki pengalaman bekerja minimal 1 s.d. 5 tahun dibidang data analyst dan business analyst (lebih diutamakan yang menguasai market research dan marketing analysis). 
 Mampu berpikir kritis dan sistematis serta mampu menghubungkan data dengan konteks bisnis. 
 Pengalaman dalam menggunakan alat analisis data (Google Analytics, Power BI, SQL, Python dan tools sejenisnya), termasuk kemampuan mengolah big data secara efisien. 
 Berpengalaman membuat dashboard menggunakan tools visualisasi data (Metabase, Tableau, Looker, Power BI atau sejenisnya). 
 Memahami berbagai channel digital marketing (iklan berbayar, SEO, referral, pertumbuhan organik, kampanye CRM). 
 Memahami statistik, analisis tren, dan machine learning dasar. 
 Kemampuan untuk bekerja dengan data besar dan kompleks.  
 Berpikir analitis, detail-oriented, serta mampu menyajikan data secara logis. 
 Komunikatif & kolaboratif, bisa bekerja sama dengan tim marketing, sales, dan operasional. 
 Lancar berbahasa Inggris. 
 
 
 
 Kompensani dan Benefit 
 
 Gaji dan tunjangan yang kompetitif dengan insentif (bonus) kinerja. 
 BPJS (Asuransi kesehatan). 
 Exposure langsung ke decision-making level. 
 Lingkungan kerja yang mendorong thinking, ownership, dan impact. 
 Kesempatan berkembang menjadi future leader di bidang data, business & strategy.

Skills: SDLC, Dokumentasi Teknis, Agile Methodologies, System Analysis, Komunikasi Lintas Divisi, Critical Thinking
Deskripsi:
Role Overview 
 As a System Analyst (SA) at DDN, you are not merely a technical document writer, but the guardian of system clarity. You bridge abstract business needs with concrete technical solutions, ensuring that requirements are structured, feasible, and clearly understood by all stakeholders. You will be involved from the early discovery phase through documentation and implementation support, ensuring developers and QA teams have clear, structured, and testable references. 
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 
 Elicit, analyze, and clarify business requirements together with clients and/or Business Analysts. 
 Translate business needs into structured technical documentation (SRS, Use Case, ERD, UML, logical wireframes). 
 Provide technical input to BA and PMO regarding scope definition, prioritization, and feasibility. 
 Act as the primary reference for developers in understanding system requirements. 
 Collaborate with QA to ensure requirements are fully covered in test cases. 
 Align business expectations with technical constraints and system capabilities. 
 
 
 Minimum Qualifications 
 
 Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field. 
 Graduates from reputable universities (national or international). 
 2–3 years of experience as a System Analyst or similar role. 
 Strong ability to produce structured technical documentation (SRS, ERD, UML, etc.). 
 Familiar with Agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban) and effort estimation (story points). 
 Proficient in system analysis tools (Draw.io, Lucidchart, Figma, or similar). 
 Solid understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).

Skills: Business Analysis, Sistem Analysis, Software Documentation
Deskripsi:
We are looking for a  System/Product/Business Analyst  who can take full ownership of a product, from defining the vision and product requirements to ensuring successful delivery and implementation. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working in a lean team, building products end-to-end, and driving both product strategy and execution. 
 
 What You’ll Do 
 
 Support the development of a product module within our SaaS ecosystem 
 Translate business and operational needs into structured product requirements (FSD & workflows) 
 Assist in defining product scope, user flows, system logic, and specifications 
 Work closely with Product Manager, Product Designer, and Engineering to ensure requirements are clearly understood and implemented 
 Help manage product backlog, track priorities, and ensure alignment with business goals 
 Support Agile/Scrum processes including sprint planning, grooming, and tracking progress 
 
 
 What We’re Looking For 
 
 Minimum 1–2 years experience as Product Analyst, Business Analyst, System Analyst, or related role 
 Strong ability to document product requirements (FSD, workflows, logic) 
 Good understanding of Agile / Scrum framework 
 Able to manage tasks, priorities, and collaborate across teams 
 Good communication skills to bridge business, operations, and engineering 
 Detail-oriented and able to translate complex requirements into structured documentation 
 Experience in Transport Management System or other SaaS platform is a plus 
 
 
 What This Role Is (and Is Not) 
 
 Strong involvement in product development and execution 
 Focus on requirement clarity, coordination, and delivery support 
 Not a full product ownership / strategy decision-making role 
 
 
 Why Join Us 
 
 Exposure to end-to-end product development 
 Opportunity to grow into Product Manager role 
 Work closely with decision makers and senior product stakeholders 
 Real impact on operational product development 
 
 
 Work Location 
 Work From Office: Wiyung, Surabaya

Skills: Strong Communication Skills, Information Technology, Teamwork, Programming Languages, Technical Writing, SDLC, System Analysis
Deskripsi:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan: 
 Kami mencari seorang Sistem Analis yang terampil dengan kemampuan analisis sistem yang baik, pengalaman dalam manajemen proyek, serta mampu bekerja dalam tim untuk mendukung pengembangan solusi berbasis teknologi. 
 
 Kualifikasi : 
 
 Minimal 5 tahun pengalaman sebagai System Analyst dengan track record memimpin analisis untuk proyek integrasi atau transformasi digital yang kompleks. 
 Mahir dalam Business Process Re-engineering, pemodelan (UML/BPMN), dan analisis kebutuhan bisnis yang strategis. 
 Mampu menyusun dokumentasi teknis dengan rapi dan komunikatif. 
 Memiliki kemampuan analitis strategis untuk menganalisis masalah bisnis yang kompleks dan merancang solusi end-to-end. 
 Memiliki pengalaman terbukti dalam memimpin proyek integrasi sistem skala besar atau transformasi digital/otomasi bisnis. 
 Mampu memimpin requirement gathering, berkomunikasi dengan stakeholder level manajemen, dan menterjemahkan kebutuhan bisnis menjadi spesifikasi teknis yang jelas untuk tim. 
 Memiliki pengalaman dalam menganalisis dan merancang ulang proses bisnis (Business Process Re-engineering) untuk peningkatan efisiensi. 
 Memahami prinsip arsitektur enterprise (SOA, Microservices) dan mampu menilai dampak teknis dari suatu solusi. 
 Terampil memimpin workshop, berkomunikasi dengan manajemen, dan menterjemahkan kebutuhan bisnis menjadi solusi teknis yang feasible. 
 Memiliki pengalaman luas dalam SDLC dan metodologi Agile/Scrum. 
 
 Tanggung Jawab: 
 
 Mengarahkan proses analisis kebutuhan bisnis yang kompleks dan merancang solusi sistem end-to-end yang selaras dengan tujuan strategis perusahaan. 
 Menjembatani kesenjangan antara stakeholder bisnis dan tim teknis dengan menyusun dokumentasi detail (FSD/TSD) yang komprehensif dan jelas. 
 Mengidentifikasi inefisiensi dalam proses bisnis yang ada dan memimpin inisiatif perbaikan atau otomasi (Business Process Re-engineering). 
 Memvalidasi bahwa solusi teknis yang diusulkan memenuhi kebutuhan bisnis, feasible secara teknis, dan mematuhi standar arsitektur yang berlaku. 
 Bertindak sebagai penghubung utama antara semua pihak (manajemen, bisnis, pengembang, QA) sepanjang siklus pengembangan sistem. 
 Membimbing System Analyst yunior dan mengembangkan serta menyempurnakan framework, template, dan best practices untuk tim analisis.

 Understanding of software technology trends and applications.  
 Understanding of Network and Telecommunication Technology is a plus.  
 Understanding of SDLC is a plus.  
 General business acumen to align with organizational objectives.  
 Excellent analytical skills.  
 Highly motivated, showing initiative and a thorough approach to tasks.  
 Exceptional verbal and written communication skills, complemented by strong interpersonal abilities.

Deskripsi:
We are looking for a Business Analyst Associate who will work closely with senior management to support business decision-making through structured analysis, financial modeling, and data-driven insights. This role is suitable for individuals who enjoy translating business ideas into analytical models, building Excel-based analysis, and supporting strategic initiatives within a growing technology company. 
 The Business Analyst Associate will assist management in evaluating business opportunities, improving operational performance, and developing structured analysis to support strategic decisions.  
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 Business Analysis 
 
 Translate management ideas and business initiatives into structured analysis and financial models 
 Develop Excel-based models, forecasts, and scenario analysis 
 Analyze business performance, revenue streams, and operational metrics 
 
 Data & Reporting

 Support internal teams with data analysis and business insights 
 Identify trends, risks, and opportunities from available business data 
 
 Strategic Support 
 
 Assist management in evaluating new business opportunities 
 Conduct market and competitor research 
 Support preparation of strategic presentations and business reports 
 
 Operational Support 
 
 Work with internal teams to gather business data and operational insights 
 Help structure business initiatives into measurable frameworks 
 Support special projects initiated by senior management 
 
 Requirements 
 0–3 years experience in business analysis, consulting, finance, or related roles 
 Strong analytical and problem-solving skills 
 Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel / Google Sheets 
 Ability to structure complex ideas into clear analytical models 
 Strong written and verbal communication skills 
 Detail-oriented and highly organized 
 Comfortable working closely with senior management 
 
 Preferred Qualifications 
 
 Experience in financial modeling or business case development 
 Familiarity with data visualization or dashboard tools 
 Experience working in technology, fintech, or financial services 
 Experience preparing management reports or presentations

Skills: System Analysis, SDLC, Stakeholder Management, Software Documentation, UML, Business Analysis, Requirements Analysis
Deskripsi:
We are looking for a dedicated System Analyst to join our team at Tamtech International and contribute to the development and enhancement of our Hospital Management System (SIM-RS). In this role, you will be responsible for analyzing business requirements, transforming them into detailed technical specifications, and ensuring the successful integration and deployment of our system. You will collaborate closely with a multi-functional team, including product, developers, QA, and business stakeholders, to deliver a scalable, reliable, and efficient solution that meets our clients’ needs. 
 
 Requirements: 
 
 Associate degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, Computer Science, or a related field, with a minimum of 3 years of experience as a System Analyst or in a similar role 
 Deep understanding of SDLC and business analysis, with proven skills in system modeling, design, data modeling, and requirements analysis 
 Proficient in creating UML diagrams, flowcharts, and business process diagrams, and experienced with tools such as JIRA, Confluence, or similar 
 Solid knowledge of databases (SQL/NoSQL) and data structures, along with familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies 
 Excellent communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills 
 Strong analytical, problem-solving, and documentation abilities 
 Fully able to work onsite at the Tamtech International office. 
 
 
 Responsibilities: 
 
 Analyze business needs and translate them into comprehensive technical requirements 
 Develop and maintain detailed system specification documents 
 Collaborate with product, developers, QA, and other stakeholders to ensure the effective implementation of system enhancements 
 Assist in system testing and deployment to ensure high-quality deliverables 
 Create and maintain accurate and up-to-date system documentation 
 
 
 Additional Experience (Plus): 
 
 Experience with the implementation of Hospital Information Systems, EMR, or EHR 
 Familiarity with hospital system modules such as SIMRS, RIS, LIS, PACS, etc. 
 Experience in migrating data from legacy systems to new platforms 
 Knowledge of integrating with medical devices 
 Experience in training users on healthcare system applications 
 Background or experience in the healthcare industry

We’re currently searching for a detail-oriented System Analyst to help guide our organization to the future. Skills: Fraud Audit, Security Audit, Risk Management, Financial Analysis
Deskripsi:
Tanggung Jawab Utama: 
 
 
 Melakukan audit dan analisis mendalam terhadap proses keuangan dan transaksi di bank klien untuk mendeteksi potensi tindak penipuan atau kecurangan. 
 Mengembangkan dan menerapkan strategi pemantauan dan deteksi penipuan yang efektif, termasuk algoritma dan aturan yang relevan. 
 Menyusun laporan keamanan keuangan yang berisi temuan dan rekomendasi hasil analisis untuk klien bank. 
 Menyelidiki laporan penipuan, kecurangan, mencari bukti, dan mengkoordinasikan dengan tim internal dan klien bank untuk mengatasi masalah penipuan. 
 Memberikan pelatihan dan mendukung klien dalam memahami dan mengimplementasikan tindakan pencegahan penipuan dan kecurangan. 
 Berinteraksi dengan berbagai tim internal dan eksternal, termasuk tim keuangan bank klien, tim keamanan informasi, dan regulator keuangan, untuk mengumpulkan informasi yang relevan. 
 Memantau perubahan regulasi dan praktik terkait penipuan di sektor keuangan, dan memastikan bahwa sistem dan prosedur klien bank mematuhi standar keamanan dan regulasi yang berlaku. 
 
 
 Kualifikasi: 
 - Gelar sarjana dalam bidang Ilmu Komputer, Keuangan, atau bidang terkait. 
 - Pengalaman sebelumnya dalam deteksi penipuan atau kecurangan di sektor perbankan atau dalam kapasitas konsultan keamanan keuangan. 
 - Keterampilan analitis yang kuat dan kemampuan untuk mengidentifikasi pola dan tren dalam data keuangan. 
 - Pengetahuan mendalam tentang teknik penipuan yang umumnya digunakan di sektor perbankan dan cara mendeteksinya. 
 - Kemampuan dalam penggunaan perangkat lunak dan alat analisis data seperti Python, R, SQL, dan perangkat analisis data terkait. 
 - Kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, termasuk kemampuan untuk berinteraksi dengan klien bank secara efektif dan memberikan laporan dan rekomendasi dengan jelas. 
 - Keterampilan analisis risiko yang baik dan pemahaman tentang kebijakan keamanan informasi di sektor keuangan. 
 
 Keterampilan Tambahan yang Diinginkan: 
 1. Sertifikasi keamanan keuangan seperti Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE) atau Certified Information Systems Security Professional (CISSP). 
 2. Pengalaman dalam mengembangkan dan mengimplementasikan teknik analisis kecerdasan buatan (artificial intelligence) untuk deteksi penipuan dalam konteks keuangan.

Skills: Data Analysis, SQL, Power BI, Microsoft Excel, Tableau, Data Visualization
Deskripsi:
Anda akan bertanggung jawab penuh dalam mengelola ekosistem dashboard monitoring serta memberikan insight mendalam mengenai perilaku pasar retail dan produktivitas tenaga kerja lapangan (field operation). Peran ini sangat krusial dalam menjembatani data mentah menjadi keputusan strategis bagi tim Produk dan Sales. 
 
Key Responsibilities: 
1. End-to-End Dashboard Management: 
2. Mengevaluasi efektivitas operasional di lapangan, memetakan hambatan kerja, dan memberikan rekomendasi peningkatan produktivitas tim/pengguna. 
3. Mengelola integritas data dari berbagai sumber (CRM, database aplikasi, dan pihak ketiga) untuk memastikan akurasi laporan. 
4.  Menyampaikan temuan teknis secara sederhana kepada tim operasional & klien guna mendorong budaya berbasis data (data-driven culture). 
5. Menganalisis tren pasar retail untuk mengidentifikasi peluang ekspansi atau rekomendasi bisnis 
 
Requirements:

Skills: Digital Marketing, Google Analytics, Data Analysis
Deskripsi:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan 
 Dicari kandidat untuk membantu perusahaan mengambil keputusan yang berbasis data (data-driven), memprediksi penjualan dengan lebih akurat, memahami kebutuhan pelanggan, dan bersaing di pasar yang kompetitif, terutama dengan pertumbuhan e-commerce. Segmen produk kami meliputi Alat Tulis (ATK), Home Living, Food & Beverage dan Mom and Baby. 
 Persyaratan: 
 
 Maksimal umur 40 tahun, dan diutamakan yang berpengalaman minimal 1 tahun di penjualan online dan marketplace serta menganalisis pasar, tren konsumen, dan data penjualan untuk membantu perusahaan membuat keputusan strategis yang tepat sasaran. 
 Statistik dan Metode Penelitian: Kemampuan ini punya fokus pada pemilihan teknik riset yang tepat supaya data yang dikumpulkan valid dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. 
 Komunikasi Efektif dan Presentasi: Kemampuan ini sangat dibutuhkan untuk menyampaikan hasil riset ke tim. 
 Kritis dan Detail-Oriented: Keahlian ini membuat analisis mampu memeriksa data dengan cermat dan menghindari kesalahan kecil yang bisa berdampak besar.  
 Enerjik, inisiatif dan mampu bekerja tanpa supervisi. 
 Dapat bekerja dalam tekanan tinggi serta lingkungan kerja dengan tempo yang cepat. 
 
 
 Tanggung Jawab: 
 
 Mengumpulkan dan menganalisis data dari survei, statistik, perilaku konsumen, kompetitor, dan kondisi pasar. 
 Melacak dan melaporkan kinerja pasar harian, mingguan, dan bulanan. Lalu, menyusun laporan dan visualisasi data dengan grafik, dashboard, atau infografis agar hasil analisis mudah dipahami. 
 Kolaborasi dengan tim untuk membuat keputusan di bidang pemasaran, strategi promosi, hingga penetapan harga dengan memberikan rekomendasi strategis berbasis data. 
 Memantau dan mengoptimalkan kinerja toko di marketplace, termasuk display produk, penetapan harga, dan aktivitas promosi. 
 Mengukur efektivitas kampanye pemasaran dan strategi yang telah dijalankan.

Deskripsi:
PT. SAHADA LAKU UTAMA, sebuah perusahaan yang dipandu oleh prinsip spiritual dan filosofi Kaizen, menawarkan kesempatan yang istimewa bagi Anda yang ingin tumbuh dan berkembang. Dengan misi untuk menciptakan pertumbuhan yang kuat dan eksponensial, kami percaya bahwa setiap individu memiliki potensi yang luar biasa. Kami memberikan dukungan yang mendalam untuk membantu Anda melewati batas-batas kenyamanan dan mencapai potensi penuh diri Anda. Kami di sini untuk membentuk generasi yang lebih kuat, baik secara fisik maupun mental, dengan produk unggulan kami, Gamamilk, yang tidak hanya sehat tetapi juga mendukung ekonomi UMKM. 
 
 Kami sedang mencari Data Analyst yang bersemangat untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Manguharjo, Madiun, Jawa Timur. Kami yakin bahwa posisi ini akan menarik bagi Anda yang ingin berkontribusi dalam peningkatan kualitas produk kami dan mengembangkan strategi bisnis yang lebih efektif. Dengan bergabung dengan Sahada, Anda akan bekerja dalam lingkungan yang penuh semangat, di mana setiap individu dapat berkembang dan berkontribusi secara signifikan terhadap pencapaian tujuan perusahaan. Kami mencari individu yang tidak hanya memiliki keahlian teknis, tetapi juga memiliki tekad yang kuat untuk menghasilkan dampak positif bagi masyarakat. 
 
 **Tugas Utama:** 
 
 Sebagai Data Analyst, Anda akan bertanggung jawab atas analisis data yang mendukung pengambilan keputusan bisnis. Anda akan bekerja sama dengan tim untuk mengumpulkan, memproses, dan menganalisis data yang relevan. Tugas utama Anda mencakup pembuatan laporan analitis, visualisasi data, serta pemantauan tren dan hasil operasional. Anda akan memastikan bahwa data yang digunakan oleh tim manajemen untuk mengambil keputusan adalah akurat, relevan, dan terorganisir. Selain itu, Anda juga akan bertanggung jawab atas pengembangan model prediktif yang dapat digunakan untuk memprediksi tren pasar dan mengidentifikasi peluang bisnis baru. 
 
 **Kualifikasi:** 
 
 Kami mencari kandidat yang memiliki pendidikan diploma dengan latar belakang ilmu statistik, matematika, atau ilmu komputer. Kandidat yang memiliki pengalaman antara satu hingga tiga tahun dalam bidang analisis data akan dipertimbangkan. Keahlian yang diperlukan termasuk penggunaan perangkat lunak seperti Redis, Microsoft Excel, SQL, Microsoft SQL Server, Data Analysis, dan Statistics. Keterampilan ini akan membantu Anda dalam memastikan bahwa data yang digunakan untuk pengambilan keputusan bisnis adalah akurat dan terorganisir. Kami mencari individu yang tidak hanya memiliki keahlian teknis, tetapi juga memiliki sikap profesional yang kuat dan komitmen untuk memberikan kontribusi yang signifikan terhadap tujuan perusahaan.

Skills: Credit Analysis, English Language, Microsoft Office
Deskripsi:
Responsibilities 
 
 Analyze credit bureau reports, bank statements, and KYC documents to evaluate applicants' creditworthiness, financial health, and compliance with regulatory standards. 
 Conduct detailed financial analyses and risk assessments to assess loan applications and ensure informed credit decisions align with the company's risk appetite 
 Develop, implement, and monitor risk management strategies by identifying potential risks, recommending mitigation measures, tracking key indicators, and ensuring compliance with credit policies and regulatory guidelines. 
 Effectively communicate credit decisions, collaborate with internal teams to gather insights, and provide recommendations to enhance the credit assessment process and tools. 
 Maintain detailed records of credit assessments, prepare reports on activities and portfolio performance, and support management with reports and presentations. 
 Stay updated on industry trends, regulatory changes, and best practices in credit risk management. 
 Contribute to the development and enhancement of credit assessment models and tools.

 Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics or a related field. 
 Proficient in Bahasa and English (Must have) 
 Minimum of 2-3 years of experience in credit analysis in unsecured consumer lending. 
 Experience with credit analysis software, tools, and credit scoring models. 
 Proficiency in analyzing consumer bureau reports and bank statements. 
 Strong understanding of KYC regulations and document verification processes. 
 Attention to detail and accuracy in work. 
 Ability to handle multiple tasks and prioritize effectively. 
 Strong communication and interpersonal skills with an ability to work independently and as part of a team. 
 Proficiency in MS Office Suite, particularly Excel and financial analysis tools. 
 A strong personality who likes to build things from scratch, prioritizes learning, and wants to grow sustainably (not hyper-growth) by assuming significant responsibility.

Skills: Administration, Microsoft Excel, Data Entry, Data analysis
Deskripsi:
Job Description 
 Kami mencari Client Analyst yang memiliki ketelitian tinggi serta kemampuan analisis data yang kuat untuk memastikan seluruh proses pengelolaan data berjalan secara akurat dan sesuai standar perusahaan. Pada posisi ini, Anda akan berperan dalam melakukan rekapitulasi data, mengawasi proses validasi, mengelola distribusi informasi ke tim terkait, serta berkolaborasi lintas divisi guna menghasilkan data yang berkualitas, konsisten, dan mendukung pengambilan keputusan secara efektif. 
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 
 Melakukan pengecekan dan validasi terhadap data yang diterima guna memastikan keakuratannya sebelum diproses lebih lanjut. 
 Mengkoordinasikan distribusi data kepada divisi marketing secara tepat waktu dan sesuai kebutuhan operasional. 
 Menjalin komunikasi yang efektif antar divisi dengan merespons permintaan data atau informasi tambahan secara proaktif. 
 Memastikan proses perekapan data harian berjalan konsisten serta menjaga akurasi dan integritas data. 
 Menyusun laporan bulanan yang komprehensif berdasarkan hasil pengolahan data harian, guna mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis perusahaan. 
 Melakukan pembaruan rutin database klien sesuai dengan permohonan yang diajukan. 
 Requirements 
 Pendidikan minimal SMA/SMK jurusan apapun. 
 Memiliki pengalaman terutama di bidang administrasi 
 Memiliki pengalaman menggunakan sistem CRM lebih diutamakan 
 Mampu mengoperasikan Ms. Excel (terutama rumus dasar) 
 Teliti dan suka bekerja dengan data. 
 
 
 Benefits 
 
 Gaji pokok 
 Bonus akhir tahun berdasarkan performa tahunan. 
 Benefit tambahan sesuai kebijakan perusahaan, termasuk THR, BPJS, tunjangan parkir, dan fasilitas lainnya. 
 
 
 Why Us? 
 
 Inklusif & Adil 
 Kami percaya setiap orang berhak mendapatkan kesempatan yang sama untuk berkembang. Apa pun latar belakang dan pengalamanmu, setiap kontribusi akan selalu dihargai.

 Performa yang baik tidak pernah luput dari perhatian. Kami menciptakan lingkungan kerja yang saling menghargai, dengan hubungan yang hangat antara rekan kerja maupun leader.

Skills: Software Documentation, Business Analysis, SDLC, Requirements Analysis, Stakeholder Management, UML, System Analysis
Deskripsi:
Presales Data 
 PT. Quad Sinergi Teknologi (QST) adalah perusahaan IT Solution yang berfokus pada penyediaan solusi infrastruktur teknologi, jaringan, dan sistem yang inovatif dan tepat guna bagi klien kami. Saat ini kami membuka kesempatan bagi talenta terbaik untuk bergabung sebagai Presales Data. 
 Tanggung Jawab: 
 - Menganalisis kebutuhan teknis klien terkait solusi pengolahan data. 
 - Menyusun solusi teknis dan desain arsitektur sesuai kebutuhan klien. 
 - Memberikan presentasi dan penjelasan teknis kepada klien bersama tim sales. 
 - Menyusun dokumen teknis seperti proposal, BoQ, dan spesifikasi teknis. 
 - Berkoordinasi dengan tim internal (Sales, Engineer, dan Partner/Vendor). 
 - Mengikuti perkembangan teknologi dan produk terbaru di bidang pengolahan data. 
 Kualifikasi: 
 - Pendidikan minimal S1 Teknik Informatika / Sistem Informasi / Matematika / Statistik, sejenis. 
 - Pengalaman minimal 2-5 tahun sebagai Presales / Engineer Data (Data Analyst, Scientist, Engineer). 
 - Mampu mengolah data, membersihkan data, membuat report/dashboard/visualisasi. 
 - Memiliki pengetahuan dan keahlian pada Python (pandas, matplotlib, pytorch, etc..)/R, SQL, PowerBI/Tebleu, Machine learning, Big Data, Jupyter Notebook. 
 - Mampu dan mengerti dalam membangun sistem data warehouse, ETL, Datalake, etc. 
 - Memiliki kemampuan dan pengetahuan teknologi contenerize (kubernetes, docker, etc..) menjadi nilai tambah. 
 - Memiliki pengetahuan ERD, dan biasa bekerja dengan konsep SDLC. 
 - Memiliki pemahaman yang kuat terhadap proses bisnis. 
 - Mampu melakukan presentasi teknis dengan baik. 
 - Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan analisis yang baik. 
 - Pengalaman bekerja dengan distributor, dan principal menjadi nilai tambah. 
 - Memiliki sertifikasi terkait menjadi nilai tambah. 
 
 Benefit: 
 - Gaji kompetitif 
 - Lingkungan kerja profesional dan kolaboratif 
 - Kesempatan pengembangan skill & karier 
 - Terlibat langsung dalam project IT berskala enterprise

Judul: Senior System Analyst for Banking - ASAP
Skills: UML, System Analysis, SDLC, Requirements Analysis, Software Documentation, Stakeholder Management, Business Analysis
Deskripsi:
Sigmatech – Your Digital Growth Solution Partner! We're hiring! 
 
 On behalf of our client, we are currently looking for a qualified System Analyst to join a leading organization in the Banking Industry. This position requires strong analytical capability, hands-on banking/financial system experience, and readiness to work  WFO – South Jakarta with ASAP availability preferred. 
 
 System Analyst – Banking Industry (WFO South Jakarta) 
 Job Responsibilities: 
 
 Analyze business requirements, translate them into clear functional and technical specifications, and ensure alignment with banking system rules and workflows. 
 Collaborate closely with developers, QA, product owners, and business users to support end-to-end system development and enhancement. 
 Perform system analysis for core banking, financial, or payment-related applications, including process mapping and gap analysis. 
 Conduct functional testing, validate integrations, and support UAT to ensure smooth and accurate delivery of system features. 
 Prepare comprehensive documentation, including BRD, FSD, data mapping, and change request impact assessments. 
 
 
 Qualifications: 
 
 Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field. 
 5–8 years of professional experience as a System Analyst, preferably in banking, financial services, or payment systems. 
 Strong understanding of system integration, API flows, data mapping, SQL queries, and SDLC methodologies. 
 Hands-on experience handling banking modules (e.g., lending, liability, payments, digital banking) is highly preferred. 
 Excellent communication skills, problem-solving ability, and experience working with cross-functional teams in a fast-paced environment. 
 
 Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you.

Skills: SQL, Data Visualization, Python, Statistics, Tableau, Power BI, Microsoft Excel
Deskripsi:
Job Description : 
 We are looking for a data scientist that will help us discover the information hidden in vast amounts of data, and help us make smarter decisions to deliver even better solutions in the Telecommunications Industry. Your primary focus will be on applying data mining techniques, doing statistical analysis, building high-quality prediction systems integrated with our products, and solving use cases from our clients. 
 
 Requirements : 
 
 Minimum 2-3 years experience as a data scientist 
 Min. S1 in Machine Learning, Statistics, Applied Math, or related field 
 Excellent understanding of machine learning techniques and algorithms, such as k-NN, Naive Bayes, SVM, Decision Forests, etc. 
 Experience with common data science toolkits, such as R, Weka, NumPy, MatLab, etc. Excellence in at least one of these is highly desirable 
 Great communication skills 
 Experience with data visualization tools, such as Tableau, Power BI, D3.js, GGplot, etc. 
 Proficiency in using query languages such as SQL. 
 Good applied statistics skills, such as distributions, statistical testing, regression, etc. 
 Good scripting and programming skills such as Python. 
 Data-oriented personality. 
 Having knowledge of Telecommunication Industry is an advantage. 
 
 
 Responsibilities: 
 
 Selecting features, building and optimizing classifiers using machine learning techniques 
 Data mining using state-of-the-art methods 
 Extending the company’s data with third-party sources of information when needed 
 Enhancing data collection procedures to include information that is relevant for building analytic systems 
 Processing, cleansing, and verifying the integrity of data used for analysis 
 Doing ad-hoc analysis and presenting results in a clear manner 
 Solving use cases related to the Telecommunication Industry

Skills: Tunning  Process, Fixed Broadband Data, Exploratory Data Analysis
Deskripsi:
Requirements 
 
 Minimal S1 Statistika, Matematika, Teknologi Informasi, atau jurusan terkait. 
 Minimal usia 22 tahun. 
 Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman sebagai Data Scientist, Data Analyst, atau posisi terkait. 
 Memiliki pengalaman yang baik dalam proses Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA), pemodelan, tuning model, serta mampu menerjemahkan hasil analisis ke dalam konteks bisnis. 
 Kompetensi Hard Skills: Data analysis, data modeling, machine learning, feature engineering, dan evaluasi model. 
 Kompetensi Soft Skills: Kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, analytical thinking yang kuat, dan problem-solving. 
 Memiliki pengalaman di sektor telekomunikasi, khususnya Fixed Broadband Data, menjadi nilai tambah. 
 
 
 Uraian Pekerjaan 
 
 Menerjemahkan permasalahan bisnis yang kompleks menjadi solusi analitik dan data science yang berdampak. 
 Melakukan eksplorasi data mendalam (EDA), feature engineering, serta monitoring kualitas dan data drift untuk memastikan keandalan model. 
 Membangun, mengoptimalkan, dan melakukan fine-tuning model prediktif dengan pendekatan model treatment yang robust guna memaksimalkan performa dan akurasi. 
 Menyampaikan insight, hasil analisis, dan output model secara jelas dan terstruktur kepada stakeholder untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan berbasis data.

Skills: Microsoft Excel, Warehouse Management, Logistics Distribution, Data Warehouse
Deskripsi:
Kualifikasi 
 1. Usia maksimal 28–30 tahun. 
 2. Pendidikan minimal S1 Akuntasi dan jurusan terkait 
 3. Memiliki pengalaman minimal 1 tahun di bidang inventory, warehouse, atau logistik. 
 4. Memahami proses pengelolaan stok barang (Stock In, Stock Out, dan Stock Opname). 
 5. Mampu mengoperasikan komputer dengan baik, khususnya Microsoft Excel (VLOOKUP, Pivot Table, IF). 
 6. Memiliki kemampuan analisis data yang baik dan teliti dalam bekerja. 
 7. Mampu bekerja secara individu maupun tim. 
 8. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dan koordinasi yang baik dengan tim terkait. 
 9. Pengalaman menggunakan sistem inventory / ERP (misalnya Mekari Jurnal, SAP, atau Oodo) menjadi nilai tambah. 
 10. Bersedia bekerja di area gudang atau warehouse dan bekerja Senin - Sabtu 
 
 Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab 
 1. Melakukan analisis data inventory untuk memastikan akurasi stok barang di gudang. 
 2. Membuat dan menyusun laporan stok barang secara berkala (harian, mingguan, atau bulanan). 
 3. Melakukan monitoring proses Inbound dan Outbound untuk memastikan pencatatan stok berjalan dengan benar.

Skills: SDLC, System Analysis, SQL, System Analyst
Deskripsi:
Job Description – Senior System Analyst 
Client: Sigmatech (Financial / Multi-Finance Industry) 
Status: ASAP Hiring, WFO Onsite South Jakarta 
 
 Responsibilities: 
* Analyze, design, and document system integration requirements between core multi-finance systems, digital platforms, and third-party applications (e.g., payment gateways, banking systems, mobile apps). 
* Act as a bridge between business users and technical teams, ensuring business requirements are translated into clear functional and technical specifications. 
* Perform system impact analysis and provide solution design for integration of new modules, APIs, and external services. 
* Collaborate with developers, QA, project managers, and vendors to deliver high-quality integration solutions within agreed timelines. 
* Develop and maintain technical documentation including system architecture diagrams, data mapping, and interface specifications. 
* Support UAT (User Acceptance Testing) by preparing test scenarios, validating test results, and ensuring alignment with business expectations. 
* Provide post-implementation support and troubleshooting for integration issues, ensuring business continuity. 
* Identify and recommend process improvements to optimize system integration and data flow. 
* Ensure compliance with financial industry standards, regulations, and security policies in all system integration projects. 
 
 Requirements 
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field. 
* Minimum 5+ years of experience as a System Analyst, with at least 2+ years in financial or multi-finance industry. 
* Proven experience in system integration projects (API, ESB, middleware, data mapping, third-party system integration). 
* Strong understanding of finance and loan lifecycle processes (loan application, disbursement, repayment, collection, reporting). 
* Hands-on experience with SQL, data analysis, and system modeling tools. 
* Familiarity with integration tools/technologies (e.g., REST API, SOAP, JSON, XML, Kafka, or MuleSoft) is a strong plus. 
* Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills to liaise with both technical and non-technical stakeholders. 
* Ability to work in a fast-paced, Agile environment with tight deadlines and multiple stakeholders. 
* Strong documentation skills and attention to detail.

Skills: QA Testing, Automation Testing, Test Plan, Quality Assurance
Deskripsi:
Job Description: 
 We are looking for a detail-oriented and analytical QA Analyst to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring the quality, stability, and reliability of our software products through structured manual testing and close collaboration with cross-functional teams. 
 Ultimately, you will ensure that our products and applications work correctly. 
 If you are passionate about quality, enjoy problem-solving, and thrive in an Agile environment, we would love to meet you. 
 
 Essential Duties & Responsibilities: 
 
 Review and analyse system specifications. 
 Design, develop, and execute detailed manual test cases and test scenarios for multiple platforms including iOS and Android. 
 Familiarity with Agile frameworks and regression testing is a plus. 
 Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Developers, and Tech Support teams. 
 Identify and report bugs and errors with clear reproduction steps. 
 Ability to document and troubleshoot errors. 
 Maintains documentation of test operations and reports results.  
 
 
 Basic Qualifications: 
 
 BSc/BA in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field. 
 Preferably 1-2 Years’ of software testing experience is essential.  
 Strong understanding of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) and Agile methodologies. 
 Experience in automation testing tools is an added advantage. 
 
 ISTQB or CSQE Certifications are a plus.

Skills: Telecom Bss Domain Knowledge, Business Analysis, CRM, Integration Analysis, Problem Solving, Analytical Skills, Technical Documentation
Deskripsi:
Responsibilities  
 
 Gather, analyze, and document requirements with Product Owners, Architects, and business users; translate needs into user stories, use cases, acceptance criteria, and functional specifications.  
 Analyze and design end-to-end BSS commercial-to-cash flows, including product/offer definition (catalog & pricing rules), customer lifecycle (CRM/party), ordering & orchestration (order management), and billing & invoicing (accounting, adjustments), including revenue-impact touchpoints where applicable.  
 Define functional behavior, validations, business rules, configuration logic, and clear edge-case handling to ensure consistent implementation.  
 Produce solution artifacts such as Functional Specification Documents (FSD), BPMN/UML process flows, sequence diagrams, integration contracts, and API specifications (OpenAPI/Swagger) when needed.  
 Document BSS integration points and dependencies (channels, downstream analytics/mediation, and OSS touchpoints where relevant) and align payloads/data mapping across interfaces.  
 Act as the primary clarification point for Development and QA to ensure delivery matches intent; support grooming, test scenario review, UAT readiness, and defect triage from a functional perspective.  
 Execute targeted PoCs/experiments to validate solution designs, test assumptions, and de-risk complex initiatives.  
 Maintain standards, reusable patterns, and a knowledge base for BSS modeling/configuration and integration guidance.  
 
 
 Requirements 
 
 2–3 years of experience in the Telecommunications industry as a System Analyst / Business Analyst / Solution Designer.  
 Deep understanding of at least one core BSS area (e.g., Product Catalog, CRM, Order Management, Billing) and its role in the end-to-end service lifecycle.  
 Demonstrable experience producing detailed technical documentation (FSD, API specs, UML/BPMN) and translating business needs into technical requirements.  
 Strong analytical skills: can model complex business scenarios and propose clear, logical solutions.  
 Strong communication: able to explain technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.

Skills: Process Improvement, Data Analysis, Microsoft Excel
Deskripsi:
Prima Print adalah perusahaan percetakan offset B2B yang telah berdiri sejak 1996 dan melayani berbagai industri seperti farmasi, rokok, kosmetik, serta makanan & minuman. Kami terus berkembang dan ingin membangun budaya kerja yang cepat, fokus pada data, dan berorientasi pada perbaikan berkelanjutan. 
 
 Untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan yang lebih berbasis data, kami membuka posisi Analis Bisnis & Data. 
 Tanggung Jawab 
 
 Mengolah dan menganalisis data bisnis menggunakan Microsoft Excel 
 Membuat dashboard, laporan, dan analisis data untuk membantu manajemen dalam pengambilan keputusan 
 Menganalisis kinerja penjualan, margin produk, dan profitabilitas pelanggan 
 Membantu mengidentifikasi peluang efisiensi operasional dan peningkatan performa 
 Mengubah data menjadi insight yang jelas dan actionable 
 Bekerja sama dengan tim sales, produksi, dan HR untuk memahami kebutuhan data 
 
 Kualifikasi 
 
 Memiliki kemampuan berpikir logis dan analitis yang kuat 
 Mahir menggunakan Microsoft Excel (Pivot Table, formula, data analysis) 
 Teliti, sistematis, dan nyaman bekerja dengan angka dan data 
 Mampu menjelaskan hasil analisis secara jelas dan terstruktur 
 Lulusan S1 dari jurusan seperti: Teknik Industri, Statistika, Matematika, Sistem Informasi, Manajemen / Bisnis, atau bidang lain yang relevan 
 Fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar, pengalaman analisis data menjadi nilai tambah 
 
 Nilai Tambah 
 
 Pengalaman membuat dashboard atau laporan analitik 
 Familiar dengan Odoo 
 Pengalaman menganalisis data bisnis atau operasional 
 
 
 Catatan 
 Kandidat akan mengikuti tes singkat Excel dan logika analisis sebagai bagian dari proses seleksi. 
 Lokasi Kerja 
 Surabaya

Deskripsi:
Bebek Terminal adalah restoran bebek yang terkenal dengan s yang harum dan mengkilap menggoda. Dengan cita rasa unik ini, kami terus berusaha mempertahankan reputasi sebagai tempat makan favorit di kota ini. Oleh karena itu, kami mencari individu yang memiliki dedikasi tinggi untuk bekerja di tim kami, termasuk seorang Anti Fraud Specialist daninkan Anda untuk berkontribusi pada lingkungan kerja yang positif tetapi juga memberikan kesempatan bagi Anda untuk belajar dari profesional yang sudah berpengalaman di bidang anti kecurangan dan risiko. 
 
 Sebagai Anti Fraud Specialist dan Fraud Analyst, Anda akan bertanggung jawab atas pengawasan dan pencegahan kecurangan serta risiko yang mungkin terjadi di perusahaan. Tugas-tugas utama Anda meliputi melakukan audit keuangan untuk mendeteksi potensi kecurangan, melakukan evaluasi riskerja sama dengan tim dalam proses bisnis, serta memahami dan mengevaluasi laporan keuangan secara mendalam. Anda juga akan bertanggung jawab untuk menjaga kepatuhan terhadap regulasi terkait keuangan dan mengembangkan strategi untuk mencegah kecurangan di masa depan. 
 
 Untuk posisi ini, kami mencari kandidat yang memiliki pendidikan minimal SMP dan pengalaman kerja antara 3 hingga 5 tahun di bidang anti kecurangan dan risiko. Kandidat yang ideal harus memiliki kemampuan dalam melakukan audit keuangan, mengevaluasi risiko, bekerja dalam tim, menganalisis data keuangan, menganalisis kecurangan finansial, memeriksa ke risiko, administrasi, dan audit keamanan. Kami percaya bahwa keterampilan ini akan membantu

Skills: Material Purchasing, Supplier Development, Commodity Purchasing, Industrial Purchasing, Supplier Management, Procurement Management, Purchasing, Purchasing Negotiation, Vendor Management, Procurement
Deskripsi:
Threads & Harmony is a Bandung-born fashion ecommerce company building house brands (starting with Nabilaze). We prototype fast, launch weekly, and scale what works. We are rooted in Bandung's UNESCO Creative City of Design heritage and pair local craftsmanship with modern tooling — ERP, live-commerce, AI- assisted creative, and automated marketplace operations. 
 We are looking for a sharp, hands-on Procurement Analyst who can bring structure to our raw material sourcing, eliminate stockouts, and build a supplier ecosystem that keeps pace with our aggressive launch cadence. 
 
 What You Will Own 
 
 Map, qualify, and manage a panel of raw material suppliers (fabrics, trims, packaging) across Bandung and the broader Jawa Barat region 
 Build and maintain a real-time raw material inventory tracker — the company currently has no supplier management system, and fixing that is your first priority 
 Develop and enforce minimum stock level policies to eliminate chronic material shortages 
 Negotiate pricing, MOQs, lead times, and payment terms with suppliers 
 Run weekly demand-vs-stock reviews aligned to the production and design calendar 
 Onboard new suppliers, conduct site visits, and maintain supplier scorecards (quality, on-time delivery, price competitiveness) 
 Coordinate with the production and design teams to translate weekly launch plans into material purchase orders 
 Identify and mitigate supply-chain risks before they hit the production line 
 Use data to flag slow-moving stock, overstock, and reorder points — reporting to leadership in clear, visual dashboards 
 Assist in evaluating and implementing a lightweight ERP or procurement module 
 
 
 What We Are Looking For 
 
 2–4 years of procurement, supply chain, or inventory management experience — preferably in fashion, textiles, or FMCG 
 Hands-on knowledge of textile and fabric categories (woven, knit, interlinings, trims) is a strong plus 
 Proficiency in Excel/Google Sheets for inventory modelling; experience with any ERP or WMS is a bonus 
 AI fluency — comfort using tools like ChatGPT or similar to accelerate analysis, drafting supplier communications, or building templates 
 Analytical mindset: you think in numbers, spot anomalies, and know how to build a reorder point formula 
 Strong negotiator with vendor relationship skills — firm but fair 
 Organised, detail-oriented, and thrives in a fast-paced, launch-heavy environment 
 Bahasa Indonesia required; working English is a plus 
 
 
 Nice to Have 
 
 Experience with Shopee or TikTok Shop supply chains 
 Familiarity with local Bandung or Jawa Barat fabric markets (Pasar Baru Trade Center, etc.) 
 Background in demand forecasting or S&OP 
 
 
 Why Join Us 
 
 You will build the procurement function from scratch — high ownership, high impact 
 Work with a tight, data-driven team at one of Bandung's fastest-moving fashion startups 
 Competitive salary benchmarked to market, with performance-linked upside 
 Direct access to senior leadership; your decisions shape what gets made

Skills: Field Accounting, Financial Analysis, Cash Flow Management, Data analysis
Deskripsi:
PT Global Energi Lestari (GEL) didiri pada tahun 2013 dengan alamat di Jl. SM. Amin No. 11 Delima Tampan Pekanbaru. Perusahaan ini bergerak dalam bidang penambangan batubara termal dan dikenal sebagai salah satu produsen, penambang, serta penjual batubara dengan kalorifisikum rendah dan tinggi. Dengan ketersediaan cadangan batubara yang signifikan, GEL mampu memenuhi kebutuhan pelanggan dengan baik. GEL berkomitmen untuk terus meningkatkan kapasitas operasionalnya sehingga menciptakan kesempatan kerja yang menarik bagi profesional yang ingin berkontribusi dalam dunia pertambangan dan pengelolaan keuangan. 
 
 Kami saat ini membuka lowongan pekerjaan untuk posisi Accounting & Finance Analyst di kawasan Kebayoran Baru, Jakarta Selatan, DKI Jakarta. Posisi ini dirancang untuk mendukung pertumbuhan perusahaan dan memastikan bahwa semua aspek keuangan berjalan dengan efisien dan akurat. Kami mengundang Anda yang memiliki minat dalam bidang akuntansi dan analisis keuangan untuk bergabung dengan tim kami. Dengan bekerja di GEL, Anda akan memiliki kesempatan untuk berkembang dalam lingkungan profesional yang dinamis dan penuh tantangan. 
 
 Beberapa tanggung jawab utama dari posisi Accounting & Finance Analyst meliputi:membuat laporan keuangan konsolidasi, perhitungan HPP Produksi, proyeksi cash flow, melakukan analisis keuangan, dan menganalisis data untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan. Anda akan bekerja sama dengan tim internal dan eksternal untuk memastikan transparansi dan akurasi dalam laporan keuangan. Sebagai bagian dari tim, Anda juga akan membantu dalam pengembangan strategi keuangan yang dapat meningkatkan efisiensi operasional perusahaan. 
 
 Untuk melamar ke posisi ini, Anda harus memenuhi beberapa persyaratan berikut: memiliki gelar S1, dengan pengalaman kerja minimal 3 hingga 5 tahun di bidang akuntansi, pengalaman dalam pengelolaan aliran kas, analisis keuangan, dan analisis data. GEL memberikan lingkungan kerja yang mendukung perkembangan karier dan memberikan peluang pembelajaran yang luas. Kami sangat menghargai keterampilan dan dedikasi Anda, dan bersama-sama kita dapat mencapai tujuan perusahaan dengan sukses.

 1.  Major 
 Architecture, Interior Design, Industrial Design, Product Design, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Engineering Drawing/CAD, Geodetic/Surveying Engineering, Fine Arts, Arsitektur, Desain Interior, Desain Industri, Desain Produk, Teknik Sipil, Teknik Mesin, Gambar Teknik/CAD, Teknik Geodesi, Seni Rupa 
 Strongly Related

 Indirectly Related

 Teknik Penerbangan, Teknik Perkapalan, Teknik Otomotif, Teknik Elektro, Geologi, Teknik Pertambangan, Fisika, Matematika, Desain Grafis, Teknik Material 
 2. Basic English is a plus, not mandatory  
 3. Good at computer operation, for example: typing very fast, playing computer games very well, etc 
 4. Smart, patient, careful, and have a strong sense of responsibility 
 5. Has good leadership skills is a plus 
 
 Job Description 
 As a Data Annotator in an autonomous driving project, the main responsibility is to provide high-quality labeled data that helps train and improve AI models used in self-driving vehicles. Accuracy and consistency are crucial, as the annotated data directly impacts the safety and performance of the system. 
 1. Annotating raw data such as images (or video) collected from vehicle cameras and sensors to support autonomous driving systems. 
 2. Labeling various objects on the road, including vehicles, pedestrians, traffic signs, traffic lights, road lanes, and obstacles. 
 3. Drawing bounding boxes, segmentation masks, or key points on objects to help the AI model understand spatial relationships.

Skills: Time Management, Communication Skills, Problem Solving, English Language, Teamwork, API Development
Deskripsi:
Are you someone who enjoys solving problems and making things run smoothly behind the scenes? We’re looking for a  Technical Analyst  to join our team and support a dynamic client in the vacation rental industry. In this role, you will help investigate technical and data-related issues, support users, and ensure pricing accuracy and synchronization across connected platforms. The responsibilities below outline the core focus areas of this role. 
 We offer a  hybrid working arrangement , combining remote flexibility with in-office collaboration to help you stay productive while staying connected with the team. 
 
 What You'll Be Doing 
 1. Handling Technical Issues (Reactive) 
 Investigate technical and data-related issues reported by users or internal teams. You will analyze problems, replicate scenarios, identify root causes, and propose clear solutions or requirements to support implementation by the development or related teams. 
 2. Ensuring Pricing Accuracy & System Alignment 
 Work closely with data and integration processes to ensure pricing, fees, taxes, and related information remain accurate and consistently synchronized across connected systems and partners. You will help investigate discrepancies, validate data flows, and support corrective actions when needed. 
 3. Proactive Monitoring & Improvement 
 Regularly review system behavior and data patterns to identify potential inconsistencies or areas for improvement. You will highlight findings and suggest preventive steps to improve reliability and data quality. 
 4. Documentation 
 Document your findings, processes, and resolutions clearly to support knowledge sharing and reduce recurring issues. 
 5. Team Collaboration 
 Collaborate with cross-functional teams to validate solutions, clarify requirements, and resolve issues in a structured and timely manner. 
 
 What You Bring 
 -  A Curious and Analytical Mind  - You enjoy understanding how systems work and figuring out why something behaves a certain way. 
 -  Clear Communication (English & Bahasa Indonesia)  - You can explain technical topics in a clear and structured way, both verbally and in writing. 
 -  Technical Skills  - Experience with SQL, APIs, and Google Workspace is required. Familiarity with Python, PHP, or AWS is a plus. 
 -  Team-Oriented Attitude  - You are comfortable working with others and sharing information openly. 
 -  Organized Working Style  - You keep track of your work and maintain clear documentation. 
 
 Your Background 
 1. A degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related technical field. 
 2. At least 1 year of experience in tech support, software development, QA/testing, SaaS, or a similar environment. 
 3. A willingness to learn, take initiative, and grow in a structured technical role.

Job Descriptions

 Design and implement data warehouse solutions. 
 Optimize database structures and performance. 
 Build data architectures for optimal extraction, transformation, and loading of data from various sources. 
 Assemble large and complex datasets to meet business demands.

Skills: Data Integration, ETL, SQL, API Development, Cloud Platform System, Data Engineering, Python, Data Processing
Deskripsi:
As a Data Engineer at Mobee, this position will design and build scalable, reliable data pipelines that power data-driven decisions across the organization. This position will work closely with cross-functional teams to optimize data workflows and ensure high-quality, accessible data for impactful insights. 
 
 Job Responsibilities: 
 
 Build and maintain reliable and scalable data pipelines (ETL/ELT). 
 Process and transform data from multiple sources (APIs, databases, etc.).   
 Support the development of data warehouse and data lake solutions. 
 Collaborate closely with Data Analysts and Data Scientists to deliver high-quality datasets. 
 Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and reliability. 
 Monitor, debug, and optimize data workflows. 
 Document data processes and maintain clear data lineage. 
 
 Job Requirement: 
 
 1–2 years of experience in a data-related role (e.g., Data Engineer, Data Analyst, or Software Engineer) with strong proficiency in SQL and Python for data processing. 
 Solid understanding of ETL/ELT concepts, data pipelines, and basic data warehousing and data modeling. 
 Familiarity with relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL) and version control systems such as Git. 
 Experience with data tools and technologies such as Airflow/Prefect, dbt, cloud platforms (GCP, AWS, Azure), or distributed processing frameworks (e.g., Spark) is a plus. 
 Strong problem-solving skills, effective communication, and the ability to work both independently and collaboratively with a proactive, growth-oriented mindset. 
 Experience in the fintech or cryptocurrency industry is a plus. 
 
 Benefit: 
 1. Competitive salary 
 2. BPJS coverage 
 3. Medical reimbursement 
 4. Career growth opportunities 
 5. Supportive working environment 
 6. Monthly engagement events 
 7. Training and development programs 
 8. Hybrid working arrangement

Skills: Data Modeling, Machine Learning, Python, Microsoft SQL Server
Deskripsi:
JULO is one of Indonesia's leading digital lending platforms, serving over 3 million borrowers across all 38 provinces. Our models directly determine who gets access to credit and on what terms. That means the work you do here has real, measurable impact on financial inclusion for millions of underbanked Indonesians. 
 We're looking for a Data Scientist to join a small, focused team. You'll work end-to-end: from exploring raw data to deploying models in production, and you'll have a direct line to leadership on how data products shape business decisions. 
 If you're the kind of person who thrives when given real problems and the autonomy to solve them, this role will give you more responsibility and learning than most mid-level positions at larger companies. 
 
 What You’ll Do 
 
 Build, validate, and maintain machine learning models for credit risk scoring, fraud detection, and customer behavior prediction. 
 Own production model pipelines end-to-end: from data extraction and feature engineering through deployment and monitoring. 
 Design and run A/B experiments with proper statistical rigor to test and improve lending strategies. 
 Use predictive analytics to optimize decisions across risk management, marketing, collections, and customer experience. 
 Work directly with leadership and cross-functional teams to translate business problems into data-driven solutions. 
 Contribute to new product development by building data products that improve how we serve our users. 
 
 What We're Looking For 
 
 Bachelor's or Master's degree in Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, Econometrics, or a related quantitative field. 
 Some professional experience (or strong project/internship experience) in data science, machine learning, or a related analytical role. Fintech or lending experience is a plus, not a requirement. 
 Solid working knowledge of Python and SQL. 
 Familiarity with core ML techniques: supervised/unsupervised learning, classification, regression, clustering. 
 Exposure to data visualization tools (Metabase, Looker Studio, Tableau, or similar). 
 Ability to communicate findings clearly to non-technical stakeholders. 
 
 You Might Be a Great Fit If...  
 Beyond technical skills, we care a lot about how you work: 
 
 You have a genuine can-do attitude. When something is unclear or broken, your instinct is to figure it out, not wait for someone to tell you what to do. 
 You're deeply curious. You ask why things work the way they do, and you dig into problems until you understand them. 
 You work neatly and stay organized. Your code is clean, your documentation is clear, and your teammates can pick up where you left off. 
 You're self-motivated and take ownership. You don't need someone checking in on you constantly to make progress. 
 You learn fast. You may not know everything yet, but you pick things up quickly and apply them. 
 You're excited about building something meaningful at a company where your contribution is visible and valued.

Skills: Database Systems, Python, Data Processing, Microsoft SQL Server, Data Integration, ETL
Deskripsi:
Company Description 
 VocaGame is a leading SEA-based company providing innovative channel, platform, and payment solutions tailored for the gaming industry. Our offerings include Custom Commerce for Influencer Gaming, a 100% customizable web store, direct API payments integration for publisher websites, and VocaGame, a preferred destination for in-game content purchases used by over 5 million gamers across SEA. VocaGame remains committed to delivering seamless and efficient solutions for gaming enthusiasts and industry partners. 
 
 
 Job Responsibilities 
 
 Build and maintain scalable data pipelines and ETL processes to support analytics and reporting. 
 Manage and optimize analytical databases using ClickHouse and SQL. 
 Process and transform data using Python and data transformation tools. 
 Develop and maintain data models and datasets for internal analytics and reporting. 
 Work closely with cross-functional teams (Operational, Product, Marketing, Business) to understand data needs and deliver insights-ready datasets. 
 Enable business teams by supporting dashboard and reporting development using tools like Tableau, Looker, and Power BI. 
 Monitor and optimize query performance and data workflows to ensure efficiency and scalability. 
 Maintain documentation for data pipelines, datasets, and internal data structures. 
 
 
 Qualifications 
 
 Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Data Science, Mathematics, Information Systems, or other related fields. 
 2-4 years of experience  in Data Engineering, Data Analytics, or a similar role. 
 Strong proficiency in  SQL or Python  for data processing and analysis. 
 Experience working with  analytical databases such as ClickHouse, BigQuery, or similar. 
 Familiarity with  BI and visualization tools  such as  Tableau, Looker, or Power BI. 
 Experience with  Power Query or data transformation tools  is a plus. 
 Understanding of  ETL pipelines, data modeling, and data warehousing concepts. 
 Strong problem-solving skills and attention to data quality. 
 Ability to work collaboratively in a  fast-paced tech environment. 
 
 
 Nice to Have 
 
 Experience handling  large-scale or high-volume datasets. 
 Familiarity with  gaming, digital platform, or e-commerce data.

Skills: Data Annotation, Quality Control, Data Linguist
Deskripsi:
Job Description 
 1. Berkolaborasi menyusun pedoman anotasi linguistik (guidelines) untuk berbagai tugas NLP (misal, sentiment, NER, keyphrase, spam, intent). 
 2. Melakukan validasi hasil anotasi dari Data Annotator dan menjaga konsistensi label. 
 3. Melakukan audit kualitas dataset, termasuk error analysis, cek keterwakilan data (representativeness), dan pemeriksaan bias linguistik. 
 4. Melakukan linguistic review terhadap hasil prediksi model, memberi insight untuk perbaikan model. 
 5. Melakukan riset linguistik ringan terkait fenomena bahasa pada media sosial. 
 6. Berkolaborasi dengan Data Scientist dan Data Annotator terkait evaluasi model dari sisi linguistik. 
 7. Menyusun dokumentasi linguistik dan standar tata bahasa yang digunakan pada sistem NLP internal. 
 8. Melakukan pelabelan berdasarkan linguistik untuk tugas-tugas NLP. 
 
 Requirements 
 1. Min. S1 Sastra dengan peminatan Linguistik dengan pengalaman 1–3 tahun (Junior) di analisis bahasa/anotasi linguistik. 
 2. Menguasai teori linguistik: morfologi, sintaksis, semantik, pragmatik, variasi bahasa sosial media. 
 3. Berpengalaman dalam anotasi dan QC (sentiment, NER, keyphrase, language detection, spam detection). 
 4. Teliti dan konsisten

Skills: Production Management, Data analysis, Inventory Management, Data Collection, Data Entry, Data Management, Stock Control
Deskripsi:
Ur Mom sedang membuka lowongan untuk posisi Stock & Production Analyst. 
 
 Jobdesc : 
 1.⁠ ⁠Menentukan jumlah restock produk berdasarkan analisis data penjualan bulanan, stok ambang, dan ketersediaan kain. 
 2.	Menghitung jumlah produksi (pcs) berdasarkan: 
 	•	Stok kain yang tersedia (kg/roll), 
 	•	Berat kain per pcs, 
 	•	Target penjualan bulanan. 
 3.	Menghitung kebutuhan bahan baku (kg & roll kain) dari target produksi. 
 4.	Menyusun forecast restock & produksi untuk kebutuhan 1 bulan ke depan. 
 5.	Melakukan monitoring stok harian, stok ambang, dan kecepatan penjualan. 
 6.	Menentukan waktu restock ideal agar tidak terjadi stok kosong atau overstock. 
 7.	Mengelola dan memperbarui database stok, produksi, dan penjualan di Excel / Google Sheets. 
 8.	Membuat laporan penjualan bulanan, laporan stok, dan rekomendasi produksi berbasis data. 
 9.	Berkoordinasi dengan tim produksi terkait jumlah pcs yang harus dijahit berdasarkan hasil analisis data. 
 10.	Memastikan seluruh keputusan restock berbasis data. 
 11.	Melakukan evaluasi akurasi restock (selisih target vs realisasi). 
 12.	Menjaga agar stok selalu aman untuk operasional penjualan. 
 
 Kualifikasi :  
 1.⁠ ⁠Mahir menggunakan Excel & Google Sheets (rumus, rekap, filter, kontrol stok, analisis data). 
 2.⁠ ⁠⁠Sangat kuat di perhitungan angka dan analisis data kuantitatif. 
 3.⁠ ⁠⁠Terbiasa bekerja dengan data penjualan, stok barang, dan perencanaan produksi. 
 4.⁠ ⁠⁠Mampu menghitung secara akurat: 
 	•	pcs → kg kain → roll kain 
 	•	target penjualan → kebutuhan produksi 
 5.Sangat teliti, presisi, detail-oriented, dan logis. 
 6.⁠ ⁠Mampu bekerja berdasarkan data 
 
 Nilai Tambah Besar: 
 1.⁠ ⁠Pengalaman sebagai Inventory Analyst / Supply Planner / Production Planner / Data Analyst Operasional. 
 2.⁠ ⁠Pengalaman di industri fashion / garment / manufaktur menjadi nilai plus besar. 
 3.⁠ ⁠Terbiasa membuat forecast penjualan dan perencanaan stok. 
 
 Karakter Wajib: 
 1.⁠ ⁠Memiliki mindset analitis & problem solving yang kuat. 
 2.⁠ ⁠Disiplin, bertanggung jawab, dan konsisten. 
 3.⁠ ⁠⁠Tidak mudah panik saat menangani angka besar dan banyak SKU. 
 
 WFO 📍Jakarta Barat 
 Senin - Jumat  
 Jam 9 - 5

Tentang Kami 
PT Ceria JasaTambang Pratama merupakan salah satu perusahaan Afiliasi Ceria Group yang bergerak di bidang kontraktor pertambangan Nikel & Rental alat berat Project Smelter Merah Putih di Kecamatan Wolo, Kabupaten Kolaka, Sulawesi Tenggara, Indonesia.

 PROCUREMENT ANALYST

 Teliti, detail-oriented, serta memiliki kemampuan problem solving yang baik.
