Skills: Marketing Communications, Digital Marketing, Affiliate Marketing, B2B Marketing, Google Analytics, Content Marketing, Meta Ads, TikTok, Data Analysis, Social Media
Deskripsi:
Katiga Hair & Beauty Salon adalah salon kecantikan yang terletak di kawasan Cilandak, Jakarta Selatan. Dengan komitmen untuk memberikan pengalaman perawatan rambut dan kulit yang unggul, kami terus berusaha memperluas jaringan kami dan meningkatkan brand awareness di kalangan pelanggan potensial. Kami sedang mencari individu yang memiliki bakat dalam bidang pemasaran digital serta minat dalam mengembangkan strategi pemasaran yang efektif untuk memperkenalkan layanan kami kepada lebih banyak orang. Bergabunglah dengan tim kami di Katiga Hair & Beauty Salon, tempat Anda dapat bekerja dalam lingkungan yang dinamis dan mendapatkan kesempatan untuk berkembang secara profesional. 
 
 Sebagai Marketing Analyst dan Social Media Analyst, Anda akan bertanggung jawab untuk mengelola platform media sosial kami, menciptakan konten yang menarik dan relevan, serta mengelola kampanye pemasaran digital. Skills: JavaScript, Node.js, Open Claw, N8n, Laravel, Claude Code, MySQL
Deskripsi:
Kualifikasi Utama 
 
 Pengalaman SaaS: Memiliki pengalaman minimal 3-5 tahun dalam membangun dan mengelola platform Software-as-a-Service (SaaS), termasuk manajemen database, sistem billing/subscription, dan multi-tenancy. 
 Full-Stack Proficiency: Mahir dalam framework modern (misalnya: Next.js/React untuk Frontend, dan Node.js, Python, atau Go untuk Backend). 
 AI Integration: Terbiasa bekerja dengan LLM (Large Language Models) seperti OpenAI API, Anthropic, atau open-source model via Hugging Face. Paham konsep Prompt Engineering, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), dan Function Calling. 
 Automation Expert: Ahli dalam membangun alur kerja otomatis menggunakan tools seperti n8n, Make.com, atau membangun sistem automasi kustom melalui API dan Webhooks. 
 
 
 Kualifikasi Teknis (Hard Skills) 
 
 Database Management: Berpengalaman dengan PostgreSQL/MySQL serta Vector Databases (seperti Pinecone, Weaviate, atau Supabase Vector) untuk kebutuhan data AI. 
 Terbiasa menggunakan sistem menggunakan Claude Code & Supabase 
 Cloud Infrastructure: Terbiasa melakukan deployment di AWS, Google Cloud, atau Vercel, serta memahami manajemen Serverless atau Docker. 
 API Architecture: Mampu merancang API yang efisien, aman, dan skalabel untuk menghubungkan berbagai sistem (terutama untuk integrasi dengan platform pihak ketiga seperti Shopee API). 
 
 
 Kualifikasi Tambahan (Plus Point) 
 
 Memiliki pemahaman tentang scraping data atau pengolahan data besar untuk kebutuhan otomasi. 
 Paham mengenai keamanan data dan enkripsi dalam sistem SaaS. 
 Pernah membangun produk yang melibatkan otomasi pemasaran atau alat bantu advertiser.

Skills: Chemical Engineering, Chemical Testing, Chemical Analysis, Laboratory Department, Laboratory Skills
Deskripsi:
PT Smart Lab Indonesia, a pioneer in chemical analysis reagents since 2002, has been a cornerstone of the local industry, proudly recognized for its commitment to producing high-quality chemical products. With state-of-the-art facilities and ISO 9001:2015 certification, Smart Lab stands out as a leader in the field, ensuring that its customers receive reliable and competitive solutions for their laboratory needs. Our mission is to provide locally sourced yet internationally competitive products, thereby supporting the growth of the Indonesian economy through our strong local content (TKDN) compliance. As we continue to expand our product range and service offerings, we seek to enhance our team with talented professionals who share our vision for excellence in chemical analysis. 
 
 We are currently looking to expand our Quality Control department with a dedicated Quality Control Analyst Kimia. This role is crucial in ensuring the precision and reliability of our chemical products, aligning with our commitment to excellence. Join us at Smart Lab, where your expertise will contribute to the development of innovative solutions for the laboratory sector. Your contributions will help us maintain our position as a leader in chemical analysis, providing top-tier products at competitive prices. 
 
 As a Quality Control Analyst Kimia, you will be responsible for conducting rigorous quality checks on all chemical products manufactured by Smart Lab. Your primary duties will include performing chemical analyses, ensuring adherence to quality standards, and maintaining accurate records of all testing processes. You will also collaborate closely with other departments to ensure that our products meet international standards and customer expectations. This position requires a deep understanding of chemical engineering principles, hands-on laboratory skills, and proficiency in chemical testing methodologies. Your ability to work in a fast-paced environment and ensure consistent quality will be key to your success in this role. 
 
 To excel in this position, we seek candidates who possess a Bachelor’s degree in Chemical Engineering or a related field. A minimum of five to ten years of experience in the chemical industry, particularly within a laboratory setting, is required. Strong skills in chemical analysis, laboratory operations, and chemical testing are essential for this role. If you are passionate about quality assurance and are committed to delivering exceptional results, we invite you to apply. We value diversity and inclusion, and welcome candidates who bring unique perspectives and experiences to our team.

Skills: Requirements Analysis, Business Analysis, Process Improvement, Project Management, SQL, Business Intelligence, Data Analysis, Stakeholder Management
Deskripsi:
The Role 
 We are looking for a Senior Product & Performance Analyst who can independently drive analytics and performance insights for our clients. 
 This role goes beyond execution, you will be expected to structure problems, propose data-driven solutions, and translate insights into business impact with minimal supervision. 
 You will work closely with clients, support junior team members, and contribute to growing client accounts by identifying new opportunities and measurement improvements. This role is ideal for someone who combines strong analytical skills, performance marketing knowledge, and business acumen. 
 
 Responsibilities: 
 
 Analyze and monitor client performance data, including advanced analyses (funnel drop-off, cohort analysis, audience segmentation). 
 Independently generate insights and propose actionable recommendations to improve ROI and business outcomes. 
 Translate client business needs into analytical solutions and identify opportunities for further analysis or optimization. 
 Forecast and estimate potential business impact of initiatives and performance changes. 
 Ideate and plan data-driven solutions leveraging analytics and digital marketing capabilities. 
 Present insights and recommendations to clients while managing communication and relationships. 
 Assist analytics manager on project deliverables and timelines, reporting bottlenecks, and collaborating with cross-functional teams. 
 Support senior stakeholders in business development initiatives, including identifying upsell opportunities. 
 
 
 Experience & Skills: 
 
 Minimum 3-4 years in marketing analytics, product analytics, or performance analytics.  Exposure to project coordination or project management is a preferred. 
 Familiarity with analytics tools, especially Google Analytics (GA4) and AppsFlyer, including the ability to explain their core features and use cases. 
 Understanding of performance marketing platforms (Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Programmatic), including audience targeting, budgeting, and bidding strategies. 
 Strong ability to translate analysis into clear insights and well-structured, client-ready presentations. 
 Understanding of performance marketing platforms and key metrics (CAC, LTV, ROI, conversion rates). 
 Familiarity with attribution and marketing effectiveness measurement, including understanding of the marketing technology such as conversion tracking, attribution setup, CRM, etc.  
 Comfortable with external and client facing responsibilities. 
 Professional working proficiency in Bahasa Indonesia and English (written and spoken). 
 Experience in consulting, tech, or e-commerce is a plus. 
 Experience in owned channel (SEO, push notifications), A/B testing, and/or AI/ML is a plus. 
 Has an agile mindset, curiosity, and eagerness to learn and adapt with new technologies, trends, and client landscapes.

Skills: Data Analysis, SQL, Stakeholder Management, Process Improvement, Business Intelligence, Business Analysis
Deskripsi:
The Role 
 We are looking for a Junior Product & Performance Analyst to support our Advisory team in turning data into actionable business insights. 
 This is an execution-focused role for someone who is curious about data, understands analytics & digital marketing, and enjoys solving business problems. You will work closely with the Senior Data Analyst and Analytics Manager to deliver insights, reports, and recommendations that drive client decisions. 
 This role suits someone who is analytical but also communicative, structured, and comfortable managing multiple client deliverables. 
 
 Responsibilities: 
 
 Support data exploration and basic analysis to help generate insights aligned with client business goals and needs. 
 Assist in troubleshooting data discrepancies and responding to ad-hoc data questions. 
 Translate data findings into simple, actionable recommendations using analytics and digital marketing knowledge. 
 Prepare and maintain client reports, presentations, and analytics documentation under supervision. 
 Build and update KPI and monitoring dashboards based on predefined metrics. 
 Participate in client discussions as a supporting team member and coordinate with operational teams when needed. 
 Support project execution by tracking timelines, preparing deliverables, and collaborating with cross-functional teams. 
 
 
 Experience & Skills: 
 
 1–2 years of experience in a digital analytics, performance analytics, or performance marketing role. Exposure to project coordination or project management is a preferred. 
 Familiarity with analytics tools, especially Google Analytics (GA4) and AppsFlyer, including the ability to explain their core features and use cases. 
 Basic understanding of performance marketing platforms (Google Ads, Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Programmatic), including audience targeting, budgeting, and key performance metrics. 
 Foundational understanding of the marketing technology such as conversion tracking, attribution setup, CRM, including how data flows and attributes between platforms. 
 Experience with data visualization tools (Tableau, Looker Studio, Power BI). 
 Basic SQL knowledge (BigQuery SQL is a plus).

Skills: Relational Databases, Teamwork, VB.NET, Business Analysis, .NET, IT Infrastructure Management
Deskripsi:
The Opportunity: 
 
 You love solving problems and building creative and effective solutions. 
 You want to learn and develop new skills, especially in the areas of Robotic Process Automation (RPA), data processing/ETL, data/web scraping and software testing. 
 You want to see your work bring immediate benefits and impact. 
 You are passionate, analytical and a team player. 
 
 
 Your day-to-day work at Kalyana Solutions: 
 
 You will work in a cross-functional team to bring a wide variety of automation ideas to life using Robotic Process Automation (RPA). 
 Work alongside our awesome team of Project Managers, Business Analysts, Solution Architects and other Software Engineers. 
 Build robust, maintaineable and scaleable automations using C# / VB.NET. These automations work in a wide variety of scenarios, interacting with desktop/web applications, APIs and various other data sources. You will build a mix of background/unattended processes and "lite" desktop-app-like experiences for attended execution. 
 Build reusable code and libraries to be shared across multiple projects. 
 Design data storage / processing schemas and pipelines. 
 Maintain up-to-date and complete project documentation. 
 Communicate regularly with our team and our customers. 
 Work with our team members to ensure that business/functional, technical and security requirements are met. 
 
 
 Requirements 
 
 1-3 years of relevant experience in Software Engineering. We are looking for previous experience with Desktop/Web applications and/or Testing technologies 
 Proficiency in a programming language used in any of the above areas. 
 Proficiency in C# or VB.NET is desirable. 
 Existing experience with RPA tools (UiPath, Automation Anywhere, etc.) is desirable. 
 Strong analytical, problem-solving, teamwork and communication skills. 
 Working knowledge of software architecture and design. 
 Proficiency in code versioning tools such as Git, Subversion, Mercurial, TFS. Familiar with code review and deployment workflow using GitHub/GitLab. 
 Familiarity with SQL and basic database administration. 
 Understanding of systems development lifecycle (Waterfall/Agile)

1. Pengembangan Aplikasi

 Melakukan perawatan (maintenance) sistem yang sudah berjalan. 
 Memperbaiki bug atau error pada aplikasi. 
 Melakukan update sistem untuk meningkatkan performa dan keamanan. 
 6. Pengujian Sistem 
 Melakukan testing aplikasi sebelum deployment. 
 Memastikan aplikasi berjalan dengan stabil dan aman.

Skills: C++, System Integration, GIT
Deskripsi:
Kami sedang merekrut  C++ Software Engineer  untuk membangun komponen perangkat lunak yang andal, mudah dirawat (maintainable), dan berperforma tinggi yang akan digunakan dalam produk nyata. Anda akan mengerjakan implementasi sistem inti, peningkatan performa, serta pekerjaan integrasi pada codebase yang terus berkembang. 
 Ini adalah peran engineering yang sangat hands-on dengan kepemilikan yang jelas: Anda akan membawa fitur dari kondisi yang masih ambigu → desain → implementasi → pengujian → rilis. 
 
 
 Tanggung Jawab  
 
 Merancang, mengimplementasikan, dan memelihara komponen C++ yang digunakan di sistem produksi (fokus Windows) 
 Membangun software yang tangguh, mudah dibaca, dan berperforma baik 
 Men-debug isu kompleks (crash, masalah memori, undefined behavior, bug concurrency, kegagalan integrasi) 
 Melakukan profiling dan meningkatkan performa (CPU, memori, I/O) dengan optimisasi yang pragmatis 
 Melakukan integrasi dengan komponen/layanan lain (input/output file, proses lokal, API) 
 Berkontribusi pada praktik engineering yang rapi:
     
 code review 
 dokumentasi 
 disiplin build/release 
 cakupan test dasar dan pencegahan regresi 
 
 
 Berkolaborasi dalam pengembangan dan mengoordinasikan deliverable bersama tim pengembang plugin dari partner eksternal. 
 
 
 Kualifikasi Wajib  
 
 Mahir modern C++ (diutamakan C++17/20) 
 Fondasi yang kuat:
     
 struktur data dan algoritma 
 manajemen memori 
 debugging dan profiling 
 
 
 Pengalaman bekerja pada codebase yang tidak kecil (pekerjaan profesional, open-source, atau proyek pribadi yang substansial) 
 Nyaman menggunakan Git dan bekerja secara kolaboratif 
 
 
 Nilai Tambah  
 
 Salah satu atau lebih dari berikut merupakan nilai plus yang kuat: 
 
 
 Systems thinking: terbiasa berpikir dalam interface, invariants, failure modes, serta tradeoff (kebenaran vs kecepatan vs maintainability) 
 Performance mindset: mampu melakukan profiling, menemukan bottleneck, dan mengoptimasi berdasarkan bukti 
 Reliability mindset: pengalaman membangun software yang tetap stabil saat input buruk, kegagalan parsial, atau kebutuhan berubah 
 Pengalaman SDK/plugin: pernah bekerja dengan API/SDK pihak ketiga dan memahami versioning, kompatibilitas, serta packaging 
 Literasi geometri/struktur data: nyaman bernalar tentang data terstruktur dan konsep geometri dasar (koordinat, transformasi, toleransi) saat dibutuhkan 
 Eksposur integrasi ML: pengalaman mengonsumsi output model ML (output berbasis file atau inferensi lokal) dan mengubahnya menjadi perilaku software yang deterministik 
 Komunikasi yang kuat: mampu mengubah kebutuhan yang masih vague menjadi rencana yang bisa dibangun dan berkomunikasi jelas dengan stakeholder non-C++

Skills: React.js, PHP, Microsoft SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Node.js, CSS, JavaScript, Python, MySQL, Laravel, MongoDB, jQuery, HTML, Vue.js, C++
Deskripsi:
Employment Type: Full-time 
 
 About the Role: 
 We are looking for a highly skilled and self-driven Full-Stack Developer to take ownership of Masaya Trip's website and internal IT infrastructure. You will be responsible for maintaining our web presence, optimizing technical SEO, integrating third-party travel APIs, and setting up automated workflows to support our growing travel business. 
 
 The ideal candidate is a problem-solver with a "hacker" mindset who is comfortable working across the entire tech stack—from frontend user interfaces to backend server deployments and containerization. 
 
 Key Responsibilities: 
 Website Development & Optimization: Maintain and upgrade the Masaya Trip website. Ensure high availability, fast loading speeds, and responsive design across all devices. 
 
 Technical SEO Implementation: Execute technical SEO strategies, including Schema markup (Structured Data), Core Web Vitals optimization, and URL architecture improvements. 
 
 API Integration: Develop and manage robust connections with external third-party services, including OTA platforms (e.g., Trip.com), payment gateways, and enterprise email systems. 
 
 Server & Infrastructure Management: Oversee the company's servers, NAS storage, and local network setups. Proficiently use containerization tools (Docker) for deploying and managing internal applications and web services. 
 
 Automation & Innovation: Build internal automation scripts to streamline business operations. Assist in exploring and deploying modern tech solutions (including open-source AI tools) to improve workflow efficiency. 
 
 Requirements: 
 Experience: 3+ years of proven experience as a Full-Stack Developer or IT Engineer, with a portfolio of successful web deployments. 
 Frontend Mastery: Strong proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and at least one modern frontend framework (React.js or Vue.js). 
 Backend & Database: Solid experience with backend languages (Python, Node.js, or PHP) and relational database management (MySQL / PostgreSQL). 
 DevOps & Deployment: Hands-on experience with Linux environments, Docker, Git, and remote server management. 
 Problem-Solving Skills: Excellent troubleshooting skills with the ability to diagnose hardware, network, and software issues independently. 
 Language: Proficient in English (written and spoken) for reading technical documentation and communicating effectively with the international team. 
 
 Bonus: Previous experience in the travel/hospitality tech industry is a huge plus.

Skills: Node.js, JavaScript, MySQL
Deskripsi:
Role Overview 
 We are seeking a Full-stack Developer proficient in NestJS, Vue.js, and PostgreSQL, with experience in Ansible and maintaining CI/CD pipelines. The ideal candidate will contribute to the development of our e-commerce platform, ensuring robust backend services and dynamic frontend interfaces. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Design, implement, and maintain RESTful and GraphQL APIs using Express or NestJS. 
 Model and optimize relational data in PostgreSQL, ensuring scalability and high availability. 
 Build responsive, component-driven interfaces with Vue.js (Vue 2 or Vue 3) and Vuex/Pinia state management. 
 Integrate frontend with backend services and third-party SDKs (e.g. payment gateways). 
 Ensure cross-browser compatibility and mobile responsiveness. 
 Define and maintain infrastructure-as-code with Ansible for provisioning servers, deploying services, and managing configurations. 
 Manage and optimize CI/CD pipelines for seamless deployment. 
 Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features. 
 Ensure code quality through code reviews, testing, and adherence to best practices. 
 Monitor application performance and implement improvements. 
 
 Required Qualifications 
 2+ years of professional experience in full-stack application development. 
 Deep expertise in NestJS for building scalable Node.js backends. 
 Strong proficiency with Vue.js, including modern tooling (Vue CLI, Vite). 
 Solid SQL skills and experience designing schemas and optimizing queries in PostgreSQL. 
 Hands-on experience with Ansible for automated provisioning and configuration. 
 Proven track record setting up and maintaining CI/CD pipelines. 
 Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and basic Kubernetes concepts. 
 Excellent communication skills and ability to work effectively in distributed teams. 
 
 Preferred Qualifications 
 Experience in e-commerce platforms or similar industries. 
 Experience with caching tools such as Redis or Memcached to enhance application performance. 
 Background in AWS, GCP, or Azure cloud services. 
 Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies. 
 Knowledge of additional frontend frameworks or libraries. 
 Understanding of security best practices in web development. 
 Contributions to open-source projects or developer communities

Skills: jQuery, MySQL, JavaScript, Laravel, React.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Node.js, Microsoft SQL Server, C++
Deskripsi:
We’re hiring a Senior Software Engineer to lead the development and evolution of our internal ERP system, landing platform, mobile application, and overall engineering architecture. This role is expected to take strong ownership across development life cycle, system design, technical decision-making, and infrastructure reliability while helping elevate engineering standards across the team. 
 
 What You’ll Do:  
 
 Lead end-to-end (fullstack) development for Landing Pages, ERP System modules, Mobile Apps, and API integrations. 
 Translate business and product requirements into scalable technical solutions, clear implementation plans, and system architecture. 
 Design robust system architecture, database schemas, and technical flows that support performance, scalability, and maintainability. 
 Drive system design decisions across backend, frontend, infrastructure, and integration layers. 
 Develop and maintain web app and/or mobile app features or integrations, ensuring seamless communication between apps, APIs, and internal systems. 
 Own and improve server setup, deployment workflows, environment configuration, system security, and infrastructure reliability. 
 Collaborate with Project Managers, UI/UX, QA, and other Engineers to ensure smooth delivery and strong product quality. 
 Review, test, and validate development outputs before submission to QA/Testers to ensure functionality, stability, and compliance with engineering standards. 
 Conduct code reviews, query reviews, and technical reviews to maintain consistency, quality, and performance across the engineering team. 
 Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues across systems, applications, servers, and integrations within the Wilopo ecosystem. 
 Support CI/CD setup and improvement to ensure efficient and reliable deployment workflows. 
 Work with external partners or vendors on technical integrations, coordination, implementation, and issue resolution. 
 Mentor junior and mid-level engineers, provide technical guidance, and contribute to a strong engineering culture. 
 Continuously identify opportunities to improve system performance, engineer productivity, code quality, and technical processes. 
 
 
 What We’re Looking For:  
 
 5+ years of experience as a Software Engineer or equivalent role, with strong exposure to both backend and frontend development. 
 Proven experience leading or owning complex technical implementations in a production environment. 
 Strong understanding of system design, software architecture, design patterns, and scalable application development. 
 Solid experience in database design, SQL queries, relational data modeling, and performance optimization. 
 Hands-on experience building or contributing to web apps and/or mobile apps and supporting their API or backend integrations. 
 Strong experience integrating RESTful APIs and working with JSON-based data structures. 
 Hands-on experience in DevOps and server management, including server setup, deployment, configuration, monitoring, and troubleshooting. 
 Good understanding of server security, access control, environment configuration, and infrastructure best practices. 
 Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines, deployment automation, and tools such as GitHub Actions, Docker, and Kubernetes. 
 Ability to write clean, maintainable, secure, and testable code with high engineering standards. 
 Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to debug and resolve complex issues efficiently. 
 Experience working in an Agile environment and collaborating cross-functionally with Product/Project Managers, QA, and engineers. 
 Strong ownership, leadership, and decision-making ability in technical execution. 
 Experience working with external partners or vendors for system integrations, coordination, or technical delivery. 
 
 
 Bonus Points If:  
 
 Proficiency in React Native and/or Flutter. 
 Proficiency in PHP (preferably Laravel) and JavaScript frameworks such as Vue.js, React, or similar. 
 You’ve worked on ERP systems, internal tools, or complex enterprise applications. 
 You have experience in unit testing, test automation, code review, and quality-driven development. 
 You’ve led technical initiatives, mentored engineers, or played a key role in shaping engineering standards. 
 You use AI-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to improve productivity and code quality. 
 You have experience improving engineering workflows, deployment processes, or infrastructure reliability at scale. 
 
 
 When Proceeding with the User Interview: 
 
 Be ready to showcase your project, it’s to show how you approach fullstack development and ensure code quality across backend and frontend layers. 
 Demonstrate your understanding of system design, from logic to data flow, and how you translate business needs into scalable technical solutions.  
 Share examples of challenges you’ve solved—especially debugging, optimization, or CI/CD automation. 
 Highlight how you mentor or support peers and contribute to a positive engineering culture. 
 Discuss how you stay current with new technologies and apply them to improve team efficiency. 
 
 
 Side Notes:  
 
 You’ll also be responsible for architecting reliable system structures and reusable components that the engineering team can build upon. 
 We value creativity, initiative, and ownership—bring your ideas, question assumptions, and help us raise the quality bar. 
 Most importantly, have fun while solving meaningful challenges.

 Proficiency in PHP (preferably Laravel) and JavaScript frameworks such as Vue.js, React, or similar. 
 You’ve worked on ERP systems, internal tools, or complex enterprise applications. 
 You have experience in unit testing, test automation, code review, and quality-driven development. 
 You’ve led technical initiatives, mentored engineers, or played a key role in shaping engineering standards. 
 You use AI-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to improve productivity and code quality. 
 You have experience improving engineering workflows, deployment processes, or infrastructure reliability at scale. 
 
 
 When Proceeding with the User Interview: 
 
 Be ready to showcase your project, it’s to show how you approach fullstack development and ensure code quality across backend and frontend layers. 
 Demonstrate your understanding of system design, from logic to data flow, and how you translate business needs into scalable technical solutions.  
 Share examples of challenges you’ve solved—especially debugging, optimization, or CI/CD automation. 
 Highlight how you mentor or support peers and contribute to a positive engineering culture. 
 Discuss how you stay current with new technologies and apply them to improve team efficiency. 
 
 
 Side Notes:  
 
 You’ll also be responsible for architecting reliable system structures and reusable components that the engineering team can build upon. 
 We value creativity, initiative, and ownership—bring your ideas, question assumptions, and help us raise the quality bar. 
 Most importantly, have fun while solving meaningful challenges.

PT Sigma Global Teknologi, atau SIGMATECH sebagai perusahaan yang terkenal sebagai mitra teknologi perusahaan terkemuka untuk pengembangan perangkat lunak, mencari individu yang siap untuk berkontribusi dalam proyek-proyek yang menantang dan inovatif di bidang teknologi. Dengan fokus pada pengembangan solusi mobile dan web, SIGMATECH telah membangun reputasi sebagai mitra andal untuk aplikasi kritis dan pelanggan dari perusahaan asuransi global, lembaga pemerintah, hingga produsen produk konsumen besar. SIGMATECH berkomitmen untuk menjadi mitra solusi pertumbuhan terpercaya baik bagi para profesional IT maupun bisnis pelanggan di seluruh dunia. 
 
 Kami mencari Mobile Developer yang dapat membawa keahliannya dalam pengembangan aplikasi mobile dan web untuk mendukung visi dan misi SIGMATECH. Sebagai Mobile Developer, Anda akan bertanggung jawab untuk mengembangkan aplikasi berbasis mobile dengan menggunakan teknologi modern seperti React Native, Java, dan Kotlin. Tugas utama Anda termasuk merancang antarmuka pengguna yang intuitif, mengimplementasikan fitur-fitur unggulan, serta memastikan aplikasi yang dikembangkan memiliki performa optimal. Kami juga mengharapkan Anda untuk bekerja dalam lingkungan pengembangan yang fleksibel dan kreatif, serta bekerja sama dengan tim untuk memastikan aplikasi kami dapat memenuhi kebutuhan pelanggan.

SIGMATECH adalah tempat yang menghargai bakat dan dedikasi, dan kami memberikan kesempatan bagi profesional yang ingin berkembang di industri teknologi. Bergabunglah bersama kami dan ikuti jejak kesuksesan!

Kami di Vetencode sedang mencari Full-Stack Developer yang tangguh untuk bergabung dalam tim pengembang kami. Kamu akan mengambil peran penting dalam membangun dan mengembangkan ekosistem SaaS kami.  Merancang, mengembangkan, dan memelihara sistem berbasis web skala enterprise menggunakan framework CodeIgniter dan Laravel. 
 Membangun antarmuka pengguna yang dinamis, responsif, dan user-friendly menggunakan NextJS, Node.js, Bootstrap 5, serta manipulasi DOM dengan jQuery dan AJAX. 
 Mengembangkan aplikasi mobile lintas platform (cross-platform) menggunakan Flutter yang terintegrasi mulus dengan sistem inti. 
 Membuat, mengelola, dan mendokumentasikan RESTful API secara aman untuk kebutuhan komunikasi antar platform. 
 Mengelola dan mengoptimalkan arsitektur database menggunakan MySQL untuk memastikan performa kueri data yang cepat dan efisien. 
 Melakukan troubleshooting, perbaikan bug, dan memastikan performa aplikasi selalu optimal. 
 
 
 Persyaratan : 
 
 Pengalaman kerja minimal 1-2 tahun sebagai Full-Stack Developer, Web Developer, atau Mobile Developer (kandidat dengan portofolio aplikasi/web yang sudah live akan sangat diutamakan). 
 Menguasai PHP (framework Laravel & CodeIgniter) tingkat menengah hingga mahir. 
 Berpengalaman kuat di ekosistem JavaScript: Node.js, NextJS, jQuery, dan pemahaman solid tentang arsitektur AJAX. 
 Terampil menyusun layout yang pixel-perfect dan responsif menggunakan Bootstrap 5. 
 Memiliki pengalaman nyata mendevelop aplikasi mobile menggunakan Flutter. 
 Mahir merancang relasi dan optimasi database MySQL. 
 Terbiasa dengan pembuatan dan konsumsi sistem API. 
 Mampu bekerja mandiri maupun kolaborasi tim, serta memiliki kemampuan problem-solving yang tajam. 
 
 
 Benefit : 
 
 Gaji Kompetitif: Sesuai dengan portofolio dan kecepatan coding yang kamu miliki. 
 Pengembangan Karir: Kesempatan langsung untuk menangani arsitektur sistem skala besar dan produk SaaS dari nol. 
 Lingkungan Dinamis: Kerja bareng tim yang fokus pada hasil, minim birokrasi, dan terbuka untuk eksplorasi teknologi baru.

 Terbiasa dengan pembuatan dan konsumsi sistem API. 
 Mampu bekerja mandiri maupun kolaborasi tim, serta memiliki kemampuan problem-solving yang tajam.

Skills: jQuery, MySQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, JavaScript, Node.js, Microsoft SQL Server, React.js, Laravel, C++
Deskripsi:
We’re hiring a Mid-Level Software Engineer to support the development and continuous improvement of our Landing Pages, internal ERP system, and Mobile Apps, including API integrations. In this role, you’ll contribute to end-to-end full-stack development, helping build scalable and reliable digital solutions that enhance business operations, system functionality, and overall user experience. 
 
 What You’ll Do:  
 
 Perform end-to-end full-stack development for Landing Pages, ERP System modules, and Mobile Apps, including API integration for mobile applications. 
 Translate requirements from Project Managers into clear technical logic and implementation plans. 
 When required, design and develop database schemas aligned with business requirements and system scalability. 
 When required, collaborate on UI/UX design with peers to ensure functionality, usability, and consistency. 
 Review and test development outputs before submission to QA/Testers to ensure functionality and compliance with company standards. 
 Ensure all deliverables meet company standards, including maintainability, readability, and performance. 
 Support system-wide issue resolution, including debugging and troubleshooting errors across the Wilopo ecosystem. 
 Conduct code and query reviews to maintain quality and consistency across the team. 
 When required, assist with server setup and CI/CD configuration, ensuring smooth deployment and integration workflows. 
 
 
 What We’re Looking For:  
 
 2+ years of experience as a Software Engineer or equivalent role, with exposure to both backend and frontend development. 
 Solid understanding of database design, SQL queries, and relational data modeling. 
 Experience integrating RESTful APIs and working with JSON-based data structures. 
 Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines (especially GitHub Actions), and deployment automation. 
 Working knowledge of DevOps practices, with hands-on experience using tools like Docker, Kubernetes, and GitHub Actions for basic deployment and environment setup. 
 Ability to write clean, maintainable, and testable code following established design patterns and coding standards. 
 Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to debug and resolve complex issues efficiently. 
 Comfortable working in an Agile environment, collaborating closely with Project Managers, SQA, and other engineers.  
 Proactive, responsible, and motivated to take ownership of system improvements. 
 
 
 Bonus Points If:  
 
 Proficiency in React Native and/or Flutter. 
 Proficiency in PHP (preferably Laravel) and JavaScript frameworks (e.g., Vue.js, React, or similar). 
 You’ve worked on ERP systems, internal tools, or complex enterprise applications. 
 You have experience in unit tests, test automation, code review, or quality-driven development. 
 You use AI-assisted tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to improve productivity and code quality. 
 You’ve led small development teams or initiatives. 
 
 
 When Proceeding with the User Interview: 
 
 Be ready to showcase your project, it’s to show how you approach fullstack development and ensure code quality across backend and frontend layers. 
 Demonstrate your understanding of system design, from logic to data flow, and how you translate business needs into scalable technical solutions.  
 Share examples of challenges you’ve solved—especially debugging, optimization, or CI/CD automation. 
 Highlight how you mentor or support peers and contribute to a positive engineering culture. 
 Discuss how you stay current with new technologies and apply them to improve team efficiency. 
 
 
 Side Notes:  
 
 You’ll also be responsible for architecting reliable system structures and reusable components that the engineering team can build upon.  
 We value creativity, initiative, and ownership—bring your ideas, question assumptions, and help us raise the quality bar.  
 Most importantly, have fun while solving meaningful challenges.

 Job Brief 
 We are looking for a highly experienced and motivated Senior Web Developer to join our dynamic team. As a Senior Web Developer, you will be responsible for designing, coding, and modifying websites from layout to function according to our client’s specifications. Skills: SDLC, React.js, Messege Brokers, Flutter, PostgreSQL, NoSQL, Microservices Architecture, Go / Golang, CI/CD
Deskripsi:
We are looking for a Senior Fullstack Developer  who can take full ownership of our technical ecosystem, from high-performance backend services to responsive frontend interfaces. This role is ideal for a "product-minded" engineer who thrives in a lean team, loves solving complex logic, and isn't afraid to leverage AI to accelerate delivery without compromising on code quality. 
 
 What You’ll Do: 
 
 Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services using Golang. 
 Build intuitive and performant web interfaces using React.js. 
 Architect and manage Microservices structures, including inter-service communication and API gateways. 
 Implement robust data persistence using SQL (PostgreSQL) and NoSQL databases, ensuring data integrity and query optimization. 
 Manage asynchronous workflows and system integrations using Message Brokers. 
 Apply SOLID principles and Clean Architecture to ensure the codebase remains maintainable and testable. 
 Utilize AI tools (Cursor, Copilot, ChatGPT, etc.) strategically to speed up development, refactoring, and unit testing. 
 Collaborate closely with the Product Owner, Business Analysts, and designers to turn complex requirements into technical reality. 
 
 
 What We’re Looking For: 
 
 Minimum 4 years of experience as a Fullstack Developer or similar role. 
 Deep expertise in Golang (concurrency, interfaces, performance tuning). 
 Proficiency in React.js and modern frontend state management. 
 Experience in designing and handling complex workflows or data-heavy applications (SaaS/ERP experience is a major plus). 
 Strong understanding of the SDLC and the ability to handle products from research to delivery. 
 High Attention to Detail: You care about edge cases, race conditions, and UI/UX consistency. 
 AI-Native Workflow: Comfortable using AI as a "force multiplier" while maintaining the critical eye needed to review and refine AI-generated code. 
 Plus Point: Experience with Flutter for cross-platform mobile development. 
 Clear communicator and a collaborative team player who can bridge the gap between business needs and technical constraints. 
 Work From Office & Placement: Wiyung, Surabaya 
 
 
 What This Role Is (and Is Not): 
 
 High Ownership: You are the architect and the builder of the features you ship. 
 Logic Intensive: Not a "copy-paste" or execution-only role; you will solve deep architectural challenges. 
 
 
 Why Join Us: 
 
 High ownership and direct impact on the technical direction of our products. 
 Opportunity to work with a modern tech stack and experimental AI-augmented workflows. 
 Close collaboration with decision-makers in a fast-moving, resource-lean environment. 
 Strong portfolio impact through end-to-end ownership of complex systems (Logistics, ERP, Accounting, etc.)

About the job 
 We’re looking for curious, talented & collaborative people to join our team here at SmartLeaders, as Software Engineers. Who love the challenge of writing & testing complex codes, a fast learner who can quickly hit the ground running and help take our products to the next level, as we scale up and meet the demands of our clients and further develop the business.⁣ 
 
 
 
 WHO ARE WE? 
 
 We are a company that creates large-scale Industrial Automation Systems, especially for Oil & Gas companies. Yes, we are the creator of the system, not merely a distributor as most of companies in Indonesia. Our systems are all large-scale, nation-wide and mission-critical nation-wide to serve the people of republic Indonesia for 24 hours for years. To say as an example, in Pertamina and its subsidiaries, our system has been running for 12 years supporting the fuel distribution of fuel to SPBU via Truck in all cities in Indonesia. Recently, Pertamina expands our scope to provide Terminal Automation System in both LPG and BBM, and also to provide automation systems in all pertamina ports in Indonesia as well. Thousands of servers and devices has been put across Indonesia to support our systems. 
 
 
 
 REQUIREMENTS: 
 
 At least Bachelor Degree (S1 or D4), preferably in Informatics/Computer Science. 
 Able to PASS our Programming Test. 
 Any programming experience will be appreciated 
 
 
 SALARY BENEFIT: 
 
 Negotiable Salary depending on Experience, Test Result, and Qualification 
 
 Other benefits include: Overtime, family health insurance, dorm, outpatient, bonuses, etc. 
 
 
 
 OUR WORKING ENVIRONMENT 
 
 We want a stress free environment in our office, because most of our work invoves creative thinking. Hence, we employ similar free environment strategy as those implemented in multi national companies like: informal attire, no shoes and flexible working hours. 
 
 
 
 OUR OFFICE LOCATIONS 
 
 Cileungsi (Bogor).

Skills: UI Design, Back-End Web Development, Go / Golang, Frontend Development
Deskripsi:
Job Summary 
 We are seeking a Full Stack Developer to manage, enhance, and further develop our digital platform ecosystem, which has evolved beyond a conventional Learning Management System (LMS). The role involves working across platform development, system integration, workflow automation, and backend services to support new products, operational needs, and scalable user experiences. 
 
 This position is ideal for a developer who is comfortable working with modular systems, building and improving digital products, and connecting multiple tools and services into one seamless platform. The candidate must be familiar with n8n for workflow automation and have working proficiency in Golang for backend or service development. 
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 • Platform Development & Enhancement: Develop, maintain, and improve platform features across learning, user management, operations, community, and other digital services. 
 • Workflow Automation with n8n: Design, build, and maintain automation workflows using n8n to streamline internal processes, user journeys, notifications, integrations, and reporting. 
 • Backend Development with Golang: Build and maintain backend services, APIs, and supporting logic using Golang to ensure performance, scalability, and reliability. 
 • Module & Feature Expansion: Modify, extend, and improve existing modules, widgets, and system components to support evolving business needs. 
 • Third-Party Integrations: Connect the platform with external tools and services such as payment gateways, video conferencing tools, CRM systems, authentication systems (OAuth, SSO, JWT), messaging tools, and analytics platforms. 
 
 Preferred Qualifications 
 • Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer, Software Engineer, or similar role in platform or product development. 
 • Hands-on experience with n8n is required. 
 • Working proficiency in Golang is required. 
 • Experience working on LMS, SaaS, community platforms, internal tools, or digital ecosystems is a plus.

Skills: SQL, HTML, WordPress Development, PHP, AI Systems, JavaScript, CSS
Deskripsi:
We are a Singapore-based company looking for a  Senior Full-Stack Developer  (min 5 years of full-stack experience) who enjoys building reliable, well-structured systems and takes pride in clean, efficient code. 
 
 You’ll work across the full stack - from database design to front-end and mobile components — and play a key role in improving performance, scalability, and long-term maintainability of our products. 
 
 This role is hands-on and ownership-driven, ideal for someone who likes solving real-world problems and improving systems, not just shipping features. 
 
 You will be required to work on-site at GoWork, RDTX Square, Jakarta. Please do not apply in if you're unable to meet this requirement.  
   
 Technical Skills Required 
 - PHP (advanced / expert level) 
 - SQL (strong fundamentals and query optimisation) 
 - MariaDB 
 - HTML, CSS, JavaScript 
 - React Native 
 - Expo 
 - WordPress (customisation, plugins, performance tuning) 
 - API development (RESTful APIs, backend logic, integrations) 
 - AI integrations (APIs, automation, or AI-assisted features) 
 
 Nice To Have 
 - Experience implementing push notifications 
 - Familiarity with Jira for task and sprint management 
 - Comfortable using GitHub and Beanstalk for version control and deployments 
 - Experience working with Figma Dev Mode for design handoff 
 - Exposure to manual and/or automated testing 
 - Experience with performance tuning, debugging, and production issue resolution 
 - Prior experience working with remote or cross-border teams 
 
 Responsibilities 
 - Design, build, and maintain end-to-end web and mobile features, from database to UI 
 - Write clean, readable, and maintainable code following best practices 
 - Refactor and improve existing systems to enhance performance and reliability 
 - Ensure cross-browser and cross-device compatibility 
 - Develop and maintain reusable components and shared libraries 
 - Identify bottlenecks and implement performance optimisations across the stack 
 - Collaborate closely with designers, product managers, and other developers 
 - Take ownership of tasks and proactively suggest improvements to systems and processes 
 - Contribute to technical discussions and help raise overall code quality 
 - Lead other team members in Batam as we scale development team 
 
 Other Information 
 - You will be working with a Singaporean team, and also with other colleagues from Indonesia as we scale up our development team. 
 - You will be required to work together with your team physically on-site at a co-working space 
 - Candidates must be comfortable in communicating in English (spoken and written) & able to collaborate effectively with Singapore-based stakeholders and Indonesian-based teammates

Deskripsi:
We are looking for a highly skilled Full‑Stack Developer with strong expertise in Ruby on Rails (primary) and hands‑on experience in building scalable backend services, modern web applications, and AI‑powered features. 
 This role is ideal for developers who enjoy solving complex problems, designing clean architectures, and working on high‑impact digital products in an international environment. 
 You will contribute to various systems including internal tools, AI‑enhanced learning platforms, operational dashboards, and customer‑facing applications. 
 
 Key Responsibilities 
 
 Backend Development (Ruby on Rails – Primary) 
 Develop and maintain backend services using Ruby on Rails as the main framework. 
 Build clean, well‑structured REST/GraphQL APIs. 
 Work on authentication, authorization, background jobs, and performance optimization. 
 Implement integrations with third‑party services (payment, identity, analytics, messaging, etc.). 
 Ensure high code quality, testing coverage, and secure architecture. 
 
 
 Secondary Backend (Python – Nice to Have) 
 
 Build AI‑powered backend features using FastAPI/Django (optional). 
 Integrate LLMs (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude), embeddings, or RAG pipelines. 
 Develop automation scripts, data pipelines, or AI‑enabled modules when needed. 
 
 
 Frontend Development (Bonus) 
 
 Build responsive web interfaces (Angular/React/Next.js). 
 Integrate frontend with APIs and real‑time data sources. 
 
 
 AI & Automation (Bonus) 
 
 Implement AI‑driven features for recommendation systems, chat modules, text analysis, or workflow automation. 
 Build pipelines using Python for NLP/RAG/automation. 
 
 
 DevOps / Cloud

 Work with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI). 
 Optimize reliability, performance, and observability. 
 
 
 
 Requirements 
 Must‑Have 
 
 3+ years experience with Ruby on Rails (core requirement). 
 Deep understanding of MVC, service objects, background jobs (Sidekiq/Resque), and ActiveRecord. 
 Strong experience building and consuming REST/GraphQL APIs. 
 Solid database knowledge (PostgreSQL/MySQL). 
 Ability to work independently and collaborate remotely with an international team. 
 Good written and spoken English. 
 
 
 Nice‑to‑Have 
 
 Python backend experience (FastAPI/Django). 
 Basic AI/LLM integration knowledge (OpenAI, embeddings, Pinecone, RAG). 
 Experience with Angular, React, or Next.js. 
 Familiarity with Docker, cloud deployments, and CI/CD pipelines. 
 Experience building LMS, HR tools, or internal enterprise systems. 
 
 
 What We Offer 
 
 Work in an international, fast‑moving environment. 
 Opportunity to build advanced AI‑powered solutions and modern SaaS systems. 
 Competitive Indonesian salary (based on experience). 
 Long‑term stability under a growing global organization. 
 Career growth pathway (Senior Developer → Lead Developer → AI Engineer). 
 Supportive and collaborative remote team culture. 
 
 
 
 How to Apply 
 
 Please apply via Glints and include: 
 CV or LinkedIn profile 
 GitHub / portfolio / code samples (if available) 
 Short note about your Ruby on Rails experience 
 Optional: Python/AI projects you’ve worked on

 Bonus per project  
 BPJS TK, Cuti tahunan & THR

Skills: Restful API, Java, React Native, Mobile UI Design, Flutter, Mobile Development, Android Development, iOS Development
Deskripsi:
PT Widya Intelektual Bangsa, atau Widya Analytic, adalah perusahaan yang berdedikasi memberikan solusi di bidang big data analytics dan artificial intelligence kepada berbagai pihak, termasuk pemerintah, swasta, perguruan tinggi, dan UMKM. Fokus utama kami adalah membantu bisnis bertumbuh melalui transformasi digital berbasis data-driven, yang memungkinkan tim kami untuk lebih mudah mengambil keputusan, meningkatkan produktivitas, dan merancang strategi yang efektif. Dengan keterlibatan teknologi ini, kami berharap dapat mendukung perkembangan bisnis yang lebih baik dan efisien. Kami sedang mencari individu yang memiliki kemampuan dan dedikasi untuk bergabung dalam tim kami dan membantu memperkuat kapasitas kami dalam menghadapi tantangan masa depan. 
 Tanggung Jawab: 
 1. Mengembangkan dan memelihara aplikasi mobile menggunakan Flutter (Android & iOS). 
 2. Menerjemahkan kebutuhan bisnis dan desain UI/UX menjadi fitur aplikasi yang fungsional. 
 3. Melakukan integrasi API dari backend ke dalam aplikasi mobile. 
 4. Mengidentifikasi, memperbaiki bug, dan meningkatkan performa aplikasi. 
 5. Melakukan testing (unit test / integration test) untuk memastikan kualitas aplikasi. 
 6. Berkolaborasi dengan tim backend, UI/UX, dan QA dalam proses pengembangan. 
 7. Melakukan dokumentasi teknis terkait pengembangan aplikasi. 
 
 Kualifikasi: 
 1. Memiliki pengalaman sebagai Mobile Developer, khususnya menggunakan Flutter. 
 2. Menguasai bahasa pemrograman Dart. 
 3. Memahami konsep RESTful API dan integrasi backend. 
 4. Familiar dengan Git (version control). 
 5. Memiliki kemampuan problem solving yang baik dan detail-oriented. 
 6. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi dalam bahasa Inggris minimal basic (lisan dan tulisan).

 Junior Full Stack Developer

 PT. Kreasi Bali Sasmita (PT. KBS) membuka kesempatan Paid Internship bagi mahasiswa aktif yang tertarik mengembangkan kompetensi sebagai Junior Full Stack Developer dalam pengembangan sistem digital pendidikan KBS SMS (Key to Better Schooling – School Management System). 
 
 Program ini dirancang sebagai program pembelajaran dan praktik kerja terbimbing, dengan pendampingan langsung oleh tim pengembang internal. 
 
 
 --- 
 
 Posisi 
 
 Junior Full Stack Developer (Internship) 
 
 
 --- 
 
 Kualifikasi 
 
 Mahasiswa aktif D3 / D4 / S1 jurusan: 
 
 Teknik Informatika 
 
 Sistem Informasi 
 
 Rekayasa Perangkat Lunak 
 
 Ilmu Komputer 
 
 atau bidang terkait 
 
 
 Minimal semester 4 atau telah menempuh mata kuliah pemrograman 
 
 Memahami dasar pemrograman web 
 
 Memiliki kemauan belajar tinggi, disiplin, dan mampu bekerja dalam tim 
 
 Terbuka terhadap review kode dan arahan mentor 
 
 Bersedia mengikuti program internship sesuai durasi yang ditetapkan 
 
 
 
 --- 
 
 Tech Stack yang Digunakan & Dipelajari 
 
 Peserta tidak wajib menguasai semua, namun pernah terpapar / familiar akan menjadi nilai tambah:

 MySQL / MariaDB 
 
 
 Frontend 
 
 HTML, CSS, JavaScript

 Bootstrap / Tailwind CSS 
 
 Dasar responsive design 
 
 
 UI/UX & Design

 Pemahaman dasar alur UI/UX aplikasi web 
 
 
 Tools & Workflow

 VS Code atau IDE sejenis 
 
 Trello / ClickUp / tools task management (pengantar)

 --- 
 
 Deskripsi Kegiatan Internship 
 
 Peserta akan terlibat dalam kegiatan berikut (di bawah supervisi mentor): 
 
 Pengembangan fitur sederhana menggunakan Laravel 
 
 Perbaikan bug ringan dan optimasi kode dasar 
 
 Implementasi UI berdasarkan desain Figma 
 
 Integrasi frontend–backend sederhana 
 
 Penyusunan dokumentasi teknis dasar 
 
 Observasi dan pendampingan proses implementasi sistem ke sekolah mitra (support-level) 
 
 
 --- 
 
 Durasi & Waktu Internship 
 
 Durasi: 3–6 bulan 
 
 Waktu kegiatan: 
 
 4–6 jam per hari 
 
 3–5 hari per minggu 
 
 
 Jadwal fleksibel, menyesuaikan kalender akademik 
 
 Skema kerja: Onsite / Remote / Hybrid (sesuai kebutuhan proyek) 
 
 
 
 --- 
 
 Benefit 
 
 💰 Uang saku (Paid Internship) 
 
 👨‍💻 Pengalaman real project menggunakan Laravel & Figma 
 
 👨‍🏫 Mentoring langsung dari tim developer 
 
 📜 Sertifikat / Surat Keterangan Internship 
 
 🚀 Berpeluang dipertimbangkan untuk program lanjutan (PKWT/PKWTT) berdasarkan evaluasi 
 
 
 
 --- 
 
 Lokasi 
 
 📍 Denpasar, Bali 
 (tersedia opsi remote/hybrid) 
 
 
 --- 
 
 Cara Melamar 
 
 Kirimkan: 
 
 1. CV terbaru 
 
 
 2. Portofolio / GitHub (jika ada) 
 
 
 3. Contoh project Laravel / desain Figma (jika ada – tidak wajib) 
 
 
 
 📩 Email: [email HR PT. KBS]

 --- 
 
 Catatan Penting 
 
 Program ini merupakan Paid Internship (Program Pembelajaran) dan bukan hubungan kerja. Sangat cocok bagi mahasiswa yang ingin:

 memahami workflow tim developer,

 Understanding of secure coding practices, especially in financial/banking applications.

 Strong understanding of cross-browser compatibility and responsive design. 
 Familiar with Agile development methodology.

Deskripsi:
PT Sigma Global Teknologi, atau lebih dikenal dengan SIGMATECH, adalah mitra teknologi perusahaan yang terpercaya dalam pengembangan perangkat lunak. Kami menawarkan berbagai solusi untuk aplikasi web, mobile, dan desktop, serta pendekatan orientasi layanan sepanjang siklus hidup aplikasi. Dengan tim pengembang yang sangat berpengalaman dalam metode pengembangan agile, SIGMATECH telah membangun reputasi sebagai mitra yang dapat diandalkan untuk aplikasi kritis dan pelanggan dari perusahaan asuransi internasional, lembaga pemerintah, serta produsen konsumen besar. 
 
 Kami berdedikasi untuk menjadi mitra pertumbuhan yang paling terpercaya bagi profesional IT dan bisnis pelanggan kami di seluruh dunia. Kami mencari individu yang memiliki komitmen untuk berkembang dan berkontribusi dalam misi SIGMATECH untuk menjadi mitra pertumbuhan yang terkemuka. Jika Anda ingin berbagi visi kami tentang keunggulan dan keandalan, SIGMATECH adalah tempat yang tepat untuk Anda. 
 
 Sebagai Frontend Developer (Reactjs, Nuxtjs), Anda akan bertanggung jawab untuk merancang dan mengembangkan antarmuka pengguna yang efisien dan responsif untuk aplikasi SIGMATECH. Tugas utama Anda termasuk memastikan kinerja optimal dari frontend aplikasi menggunakan React.js, Nuxt.js, dan teknologi terkait lainnya. Anda juga harus bekerja sama dengan tim untuk memastikan bahwa fitur-fitur aplikasi sesuai dengan kebutuhan bisnis dan memastikan kualitas tinggi dalam pengembangan frontend. 
 
 Untuk melamar posisi ini, Anda harus memiliki gelar S1 dan memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 3 hingga 5 tahun di bidang pengembangan frontend. Keterampilan yang dibutuhkan termasuk arsitektur frontend, JavaScript, jQuery, HTML, Vue.js, CSS, React.js, dan TypeScript. SIGMATECH menghargai keterampilan dan dedikasi Anda, dan bersedia memberikan kesempatan untuk berkembang di lingkungan yang dinamis dan mendukung. Bergabunglah dengan tim kami untuk berkontribusi dalam proyek-proyek yang menantang dan mengesankan!

Deskripsi:
Are you a passionate and skilled Frontend Engineer with a knack for building beautiful,responsive, and high-performance user interfaces? Do you thrive in an agile startup environment where your work has a direct and positive impact? If so, we're looking for you! At  Jejakin , we're on a mission to empower organizations to achieve their sustainability goals. We're seeking a Senior Frontend Engineer to join our team and help us build and maintain the user-facing applications that drive our platform. You will play a crucial role in shaping the user experience, ensuring our platform is intuitive, fast, and delightful to use. 
 Requirement:    
 
 Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related technical field. 
 3+ years of professional experience in FrontEnd Engineer or Developer. 
 Strong proficiency in  JavaScript/TypeScript and React. 
 Hands-on experience with Next.js for building server-side rendered or statically generated applications. 
 Proven experience in designing and implementing micro￾frontend architecture. 
 Demonstrable experience with Tailwind CSS for styling applications. 
 Proficient in writing comprehensive unit tests. 
 Deep understanding of web performance optimization techniques. 
 Experience with CI/CD pipelines. 
 Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a proactive and responsible attitude. 
 Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work effectively in a team environment. 
 Ability to thrive in an agile, dynamic, and fast-paced startup culture. 
 
 
 Key Responsibilities: 
 
 Develop and maintain modern, scalable web applications using Next.js and React. 
 Architect and implement solutions for a micro-frontend environment. 
 Build clean, responsive, and reusable components using Tailwind CSS. 
 Collaborate with UI/UX designers and backend engineers to translate design mockups into high-quality code. 
 Ensure the technical feasibility of UI/UX designs and optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability. 
 Implement robust unit and end-to-end tests to ensure code reliability and quality. 
 Actively participate in an agile development cycle, including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives. 
 Maintain a high standard for security, reliability, and engineering best practices in all code. 
 Stay up-to-date with the latest frontend technologies and trends to ensure our platform remains cutting-edge.

Kami percaya bahwa dengan kehadiran Anda di tim kami, kami dapat terus berkembang dan menciptakan nilai tambah bagi pelanggan kami. Kami sedang membuka kesempatan bagi seorang Front-end Developer yang ingin bekerja di lingkungan yang dinamis dan mendukung pertumbuhan karier.

Skills: Angular.js, Front-End Architecture, JavaScript
Deskripsi:
Tanggung Jawab Utama 
 
 Pengembangan UI: Membangun aplikasi Single Page Application (SPA) yang modular dan reusable menggunakan framework Angular terbaru. 
 Implementasi Desain: Menerjemahkan wireframes dan desain visual (dari Figma/Adobe XD) menjadi kode HTML, CSS, dan TypeScript yang presisi. 
 Manajemen State: Mengelola state aplikasi secara efisien (menggunakan RxJS atau library seperti NgRx/Akita). 
 Optimasi Sisi Klien: Memastikan aplikasi berjalan optimal di berbagai perangkat (mobile & desktop) serta browser (cross-browser compatibility). 
 Integrasi API: Menghubungkan antarmuka depan dengan layanan RESTful API atau GraphQL yang disediakan oleh tim Back End. 
 Testing: Menulis unit test untuk komponen dan layanan menggunakan tools seperti Jasmine dan Karma. 
 
 Kualifikasi Teknis (Requirements) 
 
 Core Angular: Pengalaman mendalam dengan Angular (versi 2+), termasuk pemahaman tentang Components, Directives, Services, Pipes, dan Dependency Injection. 
 Modern Web Tech: Sangat mahir dalam TypeScript, HTML5, dan CSS3/SCSS.

Skills: UX Design, Vue.js, JavaScript, jQuery, React.js, UI Design, Front-End Architecture, TypeScript, HTML, Frontend Development, CSS
Deskripsi:
CV. Tomojoyo Niaga adalah perusahaan digital marketing terkemuka yang berfokus pada membantu perusahaan berkembang di era digital. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang dunia digital dan komitmen terhadap inovasi, kami menyediakan strategi khusus yang menghasilkan hasil nyata dan mendukung pertumbuhan bisnis. Kami sedang mencari individu berbakat untuk bergabung dalam tim kami sebagai Web Developer. Posisi ini memberikan kesempatan bagi Anda untuk berkontribusi dalam pengembangan web yang memadukan estetika dan fungsionalitas. Bergabunglah dengan kami untuk berpartisipasi dalam proyek-proyek yang berbeda, mendukung visi dan misi kami untuk menjadi perusahaan digital marketing terkemuka di Indonesia. 
 
 Tugas-tugas utama Web Developer termasuk merancang dan membangun antarmuka web yang intuitif dan responsif. Anda akan bertanggung jawab atas pengembangan front-end, mulai dari desain awal hingga peluncuran produk akhir. Beberapa tanggung jawab utama meliputi pengembangan arsitektur front-end, penulisan kode JavaScript, jQuery, HTML, Vue.js, CSS, UI/UX desain, dan pemrograman menggunakan React.js serta TypeScript. Keahlian Anda akan digunakan untuk meningkatkan kecepatan loading halaman, memastikan responsivitas yang baik di berbagai perangkat, dan memberikan pengalaman pengguna yang luar biasa. 
 
 Kualifikasi untuk posisi ini mencakup pendidikan minimal diploma dan pengalaman kerja antara satu hingga tiga tahun. Kandidat harus memiliki keahlian dalam front-end architecture, JavaScript, jQuery, HTML, Vue.js, CSS, UI/UX design, React.js, dan TypeScript. Keterampilan teknis yang kuat serta kemampuan untuk bekerja dalam tim adalah kebutuhan mutlak. Kami mencari individu yang tidak hanya mahir dalam teknologi, tetapi juga memiliki dedikasi dan inovasi untuk berkontribusi dalam pengembangan web yang berkelanjutan dan efektif. Bergabunglah dengan kami untuk kesempatan yang tak tergantikan di dunia digital marketing.

Skills: Internet of Things (IoT), React.js, Three.js
Deskripsi:
Job Descriptions: 
 
 Majoring in IT or related fields. 
 Minimum 3 years of experience as a Full Stack Developer, with a strong emphasis on back-end development. 
 Proven experience leading development projects and mentoring junior developers. 
 Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills. 
 Ability to manage multiple projects and prioritize tasks effectively. 
 Excellent communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams. 
 Willing to be placed in Our Office Jakarta. 
 Open to being assigned to work on client sites. 
 
 Requirements: 
 Front-End Development: 
 
 Expert in modern front-end technologies: HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (ES6+). 
 Must Intermediate In Three.js 
 Deep understanding of at least one front-end framework: React.js, Vue.js, or Angular. 
 Strong experience with TypeScript and component-based architecture. 
 Mastery in CSS frameworks such as TailwindCSS, Material UI, or Bootstrap. 
 Familiar with state management solutions like Redux, Zustand, or Vuex. 
 Experience with responsive design principles and cross-browser compatibility. 
 Strong understanding of front-end build tools (Webpack, Vite, Babel, etc.). 
 
 Back-End Development (Stronger Focus Required): 
 
 Expert in back-end development with proficiency in at least one of the following (Python Is Plus): 
 
 PHP (Laravel, Symfony) 
 Node.js (Express.js, NestJS) 
 Python (Django, FastAPI, Flask) 
 
 Strong understanding of scalable system architecture and design patterns. 
 Expertise in RESTful API and GraphQL development. 
 Deep experience in SQL and NoSQL databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, or Redis. 
 Experience in database optimization, indexing, partitioning, and query performance tuning. 
 Proficient in ORMs (e.g., Prisma, Sequelize, TypeORM, or Mongoose). 
 Strong experience in authentication & authorization mechanisms: OAuth, JWT, session management, RBAC. 
 Experience in message brokers such as Kafka, RabbitMQ, or Redis Pub/Sub. 
 Knowledge of event-driven architecture and microservices. 
 
 IOT Experience: 
 
 Experienced in developing IoT systems, including integration between microcontroller devices and backend/frontend applications. Involved in: 
 Receiving and processing data from various types of microcontrollers (e.g., ESP32, Arduino) using communication protocols such as MQTT, HTTP, or serial. 
 Understanding basic configuration and programming of microcontrollers for sensor data acquisition and actuator control. 
 Building web interfaces (dashboards) for real-time data visualization and device management. 
 Integrating backend systems with databases for IoT data storage and analysis. 
 
 Testing & Quality Assurance: 
 
 Strong experience with unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing. 
 Proficient in testing frameworks such as Jest, Mocha, Cypress, or Playwright. 
 Strong debugging skills and experience using performance monitoring tools. 
 
 Soft Skills & Mindset: 
 
 Ability to architect and design scalable, maintainable applications. 
 Proactive in identifying problems and proposing solutions. 
 Passion for learning new technologies and continuously improving development workflows. 
 Ability to work in a fast-paced, agile environment and adapt to changes quickly.

Skills: Node.js, JavaScript, MySQL
Deskripsi:
Role Overview 
 We are seeking a Full-stack Developer proficient in NestJS, Vue.js, and PostgreSQL, with experience in Ansible and maintaining CI/CD pipelines. The ideal candidate will contribute to the development of our e-commerce platform, ensuring robust backend services and dynamic frontend interfaces. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 Design, implement, and maintain RESTful and GraphQL APIs using Express or NestJS. 
 Model and optimize relational data in PostgreSQL, ensuring scalability and high availability. 
 Build responsive, component-driven interfaces with Vue.js (Vue 2 or Vue 3) and Vuex/Pinia state management. 
 Integrate frontend with backend services and third-party SDKs (e.g. payment gateways). 
 Ensure cross-browser compatibility and mobile responsiveness. 
 Define and maintain infrastructure-as-code with Ansible for provisioning servers, deploying services, and managing configurations. 
 Manage and optimize CI/CD pipelines for seamless deployment. 
 Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features. 
 Ensure code quality through code reviews, testing, and adherence to best practices. 
 Monitor application performance and implement improvements. 
 
 Required Qualifications 
 2+ years of professional experience in full-stack application development. 
 Deep expertise in NestJS for building scalable Node.js backends. 
 Strong proficiency with Vue.js, including modern tooling (Vue CLI, Vite). 
 Solid SQL skills and experience designing schemas and optimizing queries in PostgreSQL. 
 Hands-on experience with Ansible for automated provisioning and configuration. 
 Proven track record setting up and maintaining CI/CD pipelines. 
 Familiarity with containerization (Docker) and basic Kubernetes concepts. 
 Excellent communication skills and ability to work effectively in distributed teams. 
 
 Preferred Qualifications 
 Experience in e-commerce platforms or similar industries. 
 Experience with caching tools such as Redis or Memcached to enhance application performance. 
 Background in AWS, GCP, or Azure cloud services. 
 Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies. 
 Knowledge of additional frontend frameworks or libraries. 
 Understanding of security best practices in web development. 
 Contributions to open-source projects or developer communities

Deskripsi:
PT Inti Jasa Kreatif (IJK) adalah sebuah perusahaan yang berfokus pada tiga aspek penting bagi industri dan organisasi di Indonesia, yaitu aspek pelayanan manajemen, penyediaan barang, dan jasa pelatihan outdoor berupa gathering kantoran. Dengan komitmen untuk terus meningkatkan layanan dan solusi yang kami tawarkan, IJK sedang mencari individu yang berdedikasi tinggi untuk bergabung dalam tim kami. Dengan kehadiran perusahaan ini di Setiabudi, Jakarta Selatan, kami berharap mendapatkan profesional yang memiliki minat untuk bekerja dalam lingkungan yang dinamis dan kreatif. 
 
 PT Inti Jasa Kreatif saat ini membuka lowongan pekerjaan untuk posisi Full Stack Developer. Posisi ini diperuntukkan bagi individu yang ingin mengembangkan keterampilan teknis mereka dan berkontribusi dalam proyek-proyek besar yang kami jalankan. Sebagai Full Stack Developer, Anda akan bertanggung jawab atas pengembangan aplikasi web dan mobile dari awal hingga akhir. Tugas utama Anda termasuk merancang arsitektur sistem, menulis kode, melakukan debugging, dan memastikan kinerja aplikasi yang optimal. Selain itu, Anda juga akan bekerja sama dengan tim untuk memastikan bahwa aplikasi kami memenuhi ekspektasi klien. Pekerjaan ini memungkinkan Anda untuk bekerja secara remote, memberikan fleksibilitas yang luar biasa serta kesempatan untuk berkembang di lingkungan kerja yang dinamis. 
 
 Untuk mengisi posisi Full Stack Developer, kami mencari kandidat yang memiliki minimal gelar S1 dan pengalaman kerja antara 1 hingga 3 tahun di bidang yang relevan. Kandidat ideal harus memiliki kemampuan dalam menggunakan Node.js, JavaScript, jQuery, MySQL, PostgreSQL, React.js, Microsoft SQL Server, Laravel, MongoDB, serta C++. PT Inti Jasa Kreatif menyambut kandidat yang tidak hanya memiliki keterampilan teknis, tetapi juga memiliki sikap kolaboratif, inovatif, dan komunikatif. Kami percaya bahwa setiap orang memiliki potensi unik yang dapat memberikan kontribusi berharga bagi perusahaan. 
 
 Yang di Bangun Platform event planning berbasis AI,  
 sedang mencari developer pertama untuk build MVP kami! 
 
 Role: Full-Stack Developer 
 Fee : Rp 3,5 - 7,5jt/bulan + Equity 2-7% 
 Lokasi: Remote (Indonesia) 
 Start: ASAP 
 
 Apa yang akan kamu build? 
 ✓ Marketplace platform untuk venue booking 
 ✓ AI-powered assistant  
 ✓ Dashboard untuk EO & Venue owners 
 
 Tech stack: Node.js/Python, React, PostgreSQL 
 
 ini opportunity untuk: 
 - Jadi developer #1 di startup dengan huge market 
 - Own equity di company dengan potential besar 
 - Shape product dari hari pertama 
 
 Industri event di Indonesia: Rp ... Triliun  
 90% masih manual - we're changing that!

Skills: Restful API, PostgreSQL, TypeScript, NestJS, Software Documentation, React.js, SDLC
Deskripsi:
Pengembangan & Pemeliharaan Sistem 
 
 Membantu pengembangan komponen backend (Node.JS/TypeScript) dan frontend (React.js/Node.js) pada ekosistem Holtrack. 
 Mempelajari dan mengimplementasikan komponen UI/UX berdasarkan desain yang sudah ada untuk fitur-fitur inti (WMS, integrasi RFID, dll). 
 Membantu pengelolaan database PostgreSQL, termasuk penulisan query yang efisien dan pemahaman struktur skema data. 
 Terlibat aktif dalam siklus pengembangan perangkat lunak (SDLC), mulai dari daily stand-up hingga bug fixing. 
 
 
 Kualitas & Keandalan Sistem 
 
 Menerapkan prinsip Clean Code dan belajar mengikuti standar arsitektur yang ditetapkan oleh tim senior. 
 Menyusun dokumentasi teknis dan dokumentasi API (Swagger/Postman) agar sistem tetap maintainable. 
 Membantu pembuatan Unit Testing dan berpartisipasi dalam proses Code Review untuk meningkatkan kualitas kode. 
 Melakukan identifikasi, debugging, dan perbaikan pada isu-isu teknis skala kecil hingga menengah. 
 
 
 Integrasi & Skalabilitas 
 
 Membantu integrasi API dengan layanan pihak ketiga dan memastikan aliran data berjalan lancar. 
 Mempelajari dan membantu pengelolaan pipeline CI/CD serta proses containerization menggunakan Docker. 
 Mengenal cara kerja cloud environment (AWS/GCP/Azure/VPS) serta sistem monitoring dan logging sederhana. 
 
 
 Leadership & Kolaborasi 
 
 Bekerja di bawah arahan Lead Developer untuk menyelesaikan tugas-tugas teknis sesuai roadmap produk. 
 Berkomunikasi secara aktif dengan tim produk untuk memahami kebutuhan pengguna dan menerjemahkannya ke dalam kode. 
 Bersikap proaktif dalam mempelajari teknologi baru yang relevan dengan kebutuhan sistem Holtrack.

PT Fimosa Technology Indonesia adalah perusahaan yang berfokus pada pengembangan teknologi untuk membantu perusahaan dan individu mencapai keunggulan kompetitif melalui solusi inovatif. Dengan berbasis di Kemantren Gondomanan, Yogyakarta, kami terus berusaha untuk memberikan layanan yang terbaik dengan mempekerjakan profesional yang berbakat dan berdedikasi tinggi. Kami sedang mencari Fullstack Developer yang dapat bekerja sama dengan tim untuk mengembangkan aplikasi dan sistem yang efisien dan andal. Bergabunglah dengan tim kami untuk membantu kami mencapai tujuan strategis dan mendukung pertumbuhan bisnis kami.

Anda harus memiliki kemampuan untuk merancang arsitektur sistem yang efisien, serta mengembangkan fitur-fitur baru sesuai dengan kebutuhan bisnis. Tugas-tugas utama Anda termasuk merancang, menulis, dan menguji kode, mengelola database, serta mengintegrasikan berbagai teknologi untuk menciptakan pengalaman pengguna yang unggul. Selain itu, Anda juga akan bekerja sama dengan tim desainer dan pengembang lainnya untuk memastikan bahwa produk akhir dapat memenuhi ekspektasi klien.

Keahlian yang diperlukan termasuk Node.js, PostgreSQL, React.js, Kafka, Nuxt.js, MongoDB, dan TypeScript. PT Fimosa Technology Indonesia menyambut kandidat yang memiliki minat dan bakat dalam pengembangan teknologi, serta siap untuk berkembang bersama tim kami. Kami menawarkan lingkungan kerja yang dinamis dan mendukung pertumbuhan karier Anda.

Skills: PostgreSQL, Python, PHP, react js, MySQL, vue js
Deskripsi:
We are looking for a Fullstack Developer Intern  who is passionate about building web applications and eager to learn in a real-world production environment. This role is ideal for a fresh graduate who wants to experience the full product lifecycle from database design to UI implementation within a lean and fast-paced team. 
 
 What You’ll Do: 
 
 Assist in developing and maintaining web features across the stack (Frontend & Backend). 
 Write clean, maintainable code and participate in code reviews with senior engineers. 
 Help integrate APIs and manage simple database schemas. 
 Collaborate with Product Designers and BAs to translate wireframes into functional components. 
 Explore and use AI tools (like GitHub Copilot or ChatGPT) to accelerate learning and coding tasks. 
 Support technical documentation and bug fixing to ensure product stability. 
 
 
 What We’re Looking For: 
 
 Education: Final year student or Bachelor’s Degree (S1) in Computer Science, Informatics, or a related technical field. 
 Tech Stack: Familiar with at least one modern web stack (e.g., Node.js, Go, Python, or PHP for Backend; React, Vue, or Angular for Frontend). 
 CS Fundamentals: Strong understanding of Data Structures, Algorithms, and OOP. 
 Database Basics: Basic knowledge of SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL) and how to design simple tables. 
 Quick Learner: Able to pick up new technologies, frameworks, and business logic quickly. 
 Soft Skills: Clear communicator, proactive, and a collaborative team player. 
 Portfolio: Must include a GitHub link or a portfolio of academic/personal projects. 
 Placement: Wiyung, Surabaya 
 
 
 What This Role Is (and Is Not): 
 
 Learning-First: You will get real tasks, not just "coffee runs," with guidance from seniors. 
 Not a "Silo" Role: You won't just be given a ticket and left alone, you'll be part of the discussion. 
 
 
 Why Join Us: 
 
 Hands-on experience building products that will actually be used by users. 
 Direct mentorship from experienced Senior Developers. 
 Exposure to modern engineering workflows (CI/CD, AI-Augmented Coding, Agile). 
 A great stepping stone to a full-time career in software engineering.

Skills: Laravel, MySQL, PostgreSQL, CSS, PHP, JavaScript
Deskripsi:
Qualifications : 
 
 Bachelor's Degree (S1) or Applied Bachelor's Degree (D4) in Computer Science, Informatics Engineering, or a related field. 
 Maximum age of 30 years. 
 Minimum 5 years of professional experience in software development, with at least 2 years in a senior or technical leadership position. 
 Proficient in PHP and possess in-depth experience with the Laravel framework (latest version preferred). 
 Experienced in using relational databases (MySQL, MariaDB, PostgreSQL) and capable of designing and optimizing complex, efficient, and scalable database schemas. 
 Able to develop and manage secure, high-performance, and scalable RESTful/GraphQL APIs. 
 Understanding and capability in implementing authentication/authorization (JWT, OAuth, Sanctum). 
 Minimum 5 years of experience in mobile application development using Flutter/Dart with a solid portfolio (including successful launch experience on App Store/Google Play). 
 Mastery of web development technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript ES6+) and modern frameworks such as React.js or Vue.js. 
 Familiar with modern CSS tools and frameworks like Tailwind CSS or SASS/SCSS. 
 Able to implement effective state management solutions (e.g., Bloc, Provider, GetX, Riverpod). 
 Possess a deep understanding of UX/UI design principles, SOLID principles, Design Patterns, and Clean Code. 
 Mastery of the Git version control system for collaborative development. 
 Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills. 
 Highly proactive, takes initiative, and accustomed to taking ownership of tasks without waiting for detailed instructions. 
 Preferred: Knowledge of Information Security Management standards (e.g., ISO 27001). 
 Preferred: Experience using Docker, CI/CD pipelines (e.g., GitLab CI/Jenkins), and microservices architecture. 
 Preferred: Experience managing large-scale systems or high-traffic applications. 
 Preferred: Familiarity with observability tools such as Sentry or similar. 
 Preferred : Good verbal and written communication skills in English. 
 
 
 Responsibilities : 
 
 Design, develop, and deliver scalable, high-performance mobile (Flutter) and web (React/Vue) applications. 
 Design, develop, and maintain secure and optimized RESTful/GraphQL APIs (Laravel) for consumption by both mobile and web applications. 
 Integrate third-party services, including Payment Gateways, SMS/WhatsApp Gateways, and other external APIs. 
 Design schemas and optimize relational database queries (MySQL/MariaDB/PostgreSQL), and implement caching and rate-limiting mechanisms to enhance API performance. 
 Conduct regular code reviews to ensure code quality, performance, and compliance with established standards. 
 Implement and maintain unit tests, integration tests, and widget tests using relevant tools (PHP Unit/Pest/Flutter tools). 
 Create and maintain accurate and comprehensive technical documentation. 
 Collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams, including product managers, UI/UX designers, and QA specialists. 
 Provide technical mentoring and guidance to junior and intermediate developers. 
 Coordinate with the infrastructure team for deployment, scalability, and basic server troubleshooting (Linux).
