Skills: MySQL, Go / Golang, PostgreSQL
Deskripsi:
Job Description: 
 
 Serverside Application Development: Design, develop, and maintain server side applications using relevant programming languages such as Go (Golang) and appropriate frameworks. 
 Database Design and Management: Design, implement, and manage efficient, secure, and scalable database schemas (PostgreSQL), including query optimization and ensuring data integrity. 
 API Development: Design and build secure, high performance APIs to facilitate communication between the client side (Frontend/Mobile Applications) and server side business logic. 
 System Security: Implement security best practices, including data encryption, authentication, authorization, input validation, and protection against common vulnerabilities (e.g., OWASP Top 10 attacks). 
 Maintenance and Performance Optimization: Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks, perform code refactoring, and ensure the system maintains low latency and high availability (uptime). 
 
 
 Key Requirements: 
 
 Strong understanding of data structures, algorithms, and design patterns. 
 Ability to write clean, maintainable, well documented, well structured, and testable code following best practices. 
 Experience conducting unit testing, integration testing, and end-to-end testing. 
 Familiarity with PostgreSQL/MySQL, including query optimization and efficient database schema design. 
 
 
 Optional : 
 
 Familiarity with Redis for caching or as a message broker. 
 Hands on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. 
 Understanding of secure coding practices, authentication/authorization, and system observability. 
 Ability to perform code reviews, collaborate across teams, and solve complex technical problems. 
 5+ years of professional software development experience. 
 3+ years of hands-on experience with Golang.

Skills: JavaScript, Node.js, Microservices Architecture, Jest, NestJS, RabbitMQ
Deskripsi:
Placement: IT Consultant [South Jakarta] 
 Status: PKWT [Contract under Sigmatech] 
 Working arrangement: Hybrid [WFO & WFH] 
 
 Requirement: 
 • Expertise with Node.js and modern JavaScript (ES6+) or TypeScript. 
 • In-depth, hands-on experience with the NestJS framework for building robust server-side applications. 
 • Proven ability to design and implement microservices architecture and communication patterns. 
 • Advanced proficiency with MySQL or other relational databases, including writing complex queries, optimization, and indexing. 
 • Solid experience utilizing an ORM like TypeORM or Prisma in production environments. 
 • Familiarity with containerization technologies like Docker. 
 • Familiarity with caching technologies like Redis. 
 • Strong understanding of code design patterns, security principles, and defensive programming. 
 • Experience with testing frameworks (Jest). 
 • Proficient understanding of code versioning tools, such as Git. 
 • Comfortable working with Linux environment. 
 • Having advanced knowledge of webservers (Nginx) and DevOps tools (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, etc) 
 
 
 Scope of work: 
 • Design, implement, and deploy high-performance, scalable microservices using Node.js and the NestJS framework. 
 • Develop and manage complex data models in MySQL, ensuring database performance, integrity, and scalability. 
 • Utilize an ORM (TypeORM) efficiently to manage database interactions and migrations. 
 • Collaborate with Frontend Developers and Product Owners to define API contracts and integrate new features seamlessly (using REST). 
 • Implement event-driven architecture and inter-service communication patterns (e.g., using Kafka or RabbitMQ). 
 • Participate in code reviews and contribute to defining and enforcing backend development standards and best practices. • Assist in setting up and maintaining CI/CD pipelines and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes) for automated service deployment. 
 • Write code following coding standards and OOP Modeling. 
 • Maintain and improve highly scalable, reliable, and fault-tolerant application. 
 • Ensure the performance, quality, security, and responsiveness of applications. 
 
 Skill: NodeJS, MySQL, ORM, REST, Kafka, RabbitMQ, Docker, Kuberneter

Skills: PostgreSQL, Java, PHP, Laravel, Microsoft SQL Server, Python, MySQL, Node.js, MongoDB, C++
Deskripsi:
PT Sigma Global Teknologi, atau SIGMATECH, adalah mitra teknologi perusahaan terpercaya dalam pengembangan perangkat lunak, menyediakan berbagai macam solusi web, mobile, dan desktop serta pendekatan layanan sepanjang siklus hidup aplikasi. Dengan tim pengembang yang sangat berpengalaman dalam metode pengembangan agile, SIGMATECH fokus pada solusi mobile dan web, layanan IT, serta bisnis enterprise. Kami telah mendapatkan reputasi sebagai mitra yang dapat diandalkan untuk aplikasi kritis dan klien dari perusahaan asuransi global, agen pemerintah, dan produsen konsumen besar. 
 
 Kami sedang mencari kandidat yang siap memperkuat tim kami dengan mengisi posisi sebagai Backend Developer. Posisi ini menawarkan kesempatan bagi Anda yang ingin berkontribusi dalam proyek-proyek besar dengan teknologi terkini dan mendukung berbagai klien internasional. Dengan menjadi bagian dari SIGMATECH, Anda akan bekerja di lingkungan yang dinamis dan mendukung inovasi. Kami menawarkan potensi pertumbuhan karier yang luas, dukungan pelatihan, dan kolaborasi dengan tim profesional yang berdedikasi tinggi. 
 
 **Tugas Utama:** 
 Sebagai seorang Backend Developer, Anda akan bertanggung jawab untuk merancang, mengembangkan, dan mengelola sistem server berbasis Node.js dan Express.js. Tugas utama Anda mencakup desain arsitektur sistem, implementasi fitur-fitur kunci, integrasi dengan database, dan pengelolaan API. Anda juga akan bekerja sama dengan tim frontend dan UX/UI untuk memastikan bahwa sistem berjalan efisien dan responsif. Selain itu, Anda harus dapat mengelola data dengan baik menggunakan MySQL, PostgreSQL, atau MongoDB, serta memastikan keamanan dan performa sistem yang optimal. 
 
 **Kualifikasi:** 
 Kami mencari kandidat yang memiliki gelar S1 dan pengalaman kerja minimal 3 hingga 5 tahun dalam bidang pengembangan backend. Keterampilan yang dibutuhkan termasuk pemahaman mendalam tentang Node.js, MySQL, Java, PostgreSQL, Python, Microsoft SQL Server, Laravel, PHP, dan MongoDB. Pemahaman tentang C++ juga akan menjadi keuntungan. SIGMATECH memberikan lingkungan kerja yang mendukung pertumbuhan profesional, dengan peluang untuk berkembang dan berkolaborasi dengan tim yang berdedikasi. Kami mengharapkan kandidat yang memiliki minat dalam teknologi terbaru dan siap untuk berkontribusi dalam proyek-proyek yang signifikan.

SIGMATECH memberikan lingkungan kerja yang mendukung pertumbuhan profesional, dengan peluang untuk berkembang dan berkolaborasi dengan tim yang berdedikasi. Kami mengharapkan kandidat yang memiliki minat dalam teknologi terbaru dan siap untuk berkontribusi dalam proyek-proyek yang signifikan.

Deskripsi:
Role Overview 
 We are looking for a Backend Engineer specializing in Golang to join our engineering team. This role focuses on building and maintaining backend services that power high-traffic applications and real-time systems. 
 We are looking for engineers who can take  ownership  of their work, operate independently, and deliver reliable backend systems with minimal supervision. The ideal candidate is  proactive, responsible, and comfortable working in a fast-moving engineering environment. 
 
 What You’ll Be Doing: 
 - Design, develop, and maintain backend services using Golang 
 - Build scalable APIs and backend systems that support high concurrency and reliability 
 - Collaborate with frontend, mobile, and product teams to implement new features 
 - Participate in code reviews and maintain high code quality standards 
 - Identify performance bottlenecks and improve system efficiency 
 - Debug production issues and implement reliable fixes 
 - Ensure services are observable, maintainable, and well-tested 
 - Contribute ideas to improve system architecture and engineering practices 
 
 Requirements : 
 -  3-5  years working in backend production environments. (Go and Rust preferred). 
 - Strong experience with Golang and backend service development. 
 - Experience building and maintaining RESTful APIs or microservices. 
 - Solid understanding of clean architecture, concurrency, and distributed systems. 
 - Experience with SQL (PostgreSQL preferred), REST/gRPC APIs, GRPC and cloud-native stacks. 
 - Comfortable with Docker, and infrastructure basics. 
 - Comfortable handling and debugging Production issues. 
 - Experience with message queues (e.g. NATS, Kafka, NSQ). 
 - Comfortable working with AI as a development tools. 
 
 Nice-to-Have : 
 - Familiarity with WebSocket, messaging systems, or event-driven architecture. 
 - Experience building high-concurrency or real-time systems. 
 - Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, or cloud infrastructure 
 
 Bonus Points: 
 Mandarin speaker, due to collaboration with Mandarin-speaking stakeholders.

Skills: Node.js, Go / Golang, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
Deskripsi:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan (Responsibilities) 
 1.	Core Development: Merancang, membangun, dan mengelola aplikasi backend yang scalable dan berperforma tinggi menggunakan bahasa pemrograman Golang. 
 2.	Database Management: Mengelola dan mengoptimalkan sistem basis data relasional (MySQL, PostgreSQL) serta solusi caching/NoSQL menggunakan Redis. 
 3.	Testing & Quality: Bertanggung jawab penuh dalam pembuatan Unit Testing untuk memastikan keandalan kode sebelum masuk ke tahap produksi. 
 4.	Maintenance: Melakukan troubleshooting, debugging, dan perbaikan bug secara cepat pada layanan berbasis Golang yang sudah berjalan. 
 5.	Documentation: Menyusun dokumentasi teknis yang komprehensif, termasuk dokumentasi API (seperti Swagger) dan arsitektur sistem. 
 6.	Delivery: Memastikan pengiriman fitur tepat waktu dengan standar kualitas tinggi dan mematuhi aturan kepatuhan web (web compliance). 
 
 Persyaratan (Requirements) 
 Pendidikan: Minimal S1 Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Ilmu Komputer, atau bidang terkait (Terbuka untuk Fresh Graduate). 
 
 Technical Stack: 
 Memiliki pemahaman mendalam tentang Golang (Goroutines, Channels, & Framework seperti Echo, Gin, atau Fiber). 
 Memiliki dasar yang kuat dalam NodeJS & Express (sebagai nilai tambah/pendukung). 
 Paham konsep Object Oriented Programming (OOP) dan Clean Code. 
 
 Architecture & API: 
 Keahlian kuat dalam pengembangan RESTful API dan arsitektur Microservices. 
 Berpengalaman dalam integrasi sistem dan pembuatan perangkat lunak secara end-to-end. 
 
 Tools & Testing: 
 Mahir menggunakan framework Testing (seperti Testify untuk Golang atau Jest untuk NodeJS). 
 Terbiasa menggunakan containerization seperti Docker. 
 Wajib menguasai Version Control System (GIT). 
 
 Soft Skills: 
 Kemampuan analisis dan pemecahan masalah yang kuat. 
 Memiliki motivasi diri yang tinggi, berorientasi pada target, dan mampu belajar dengan cepat (fast learner).

Deskripsi:
Requirement: 
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field. 
 Proven experience in system monitoring, application maintenance, or production support. 
 Strong understanding of system architecture and technical documentation, including ERD, Sequence Diagrams, and Low Level Design (LLD). 
 Experience using Application Performance Monitoring (APM) tools such as Grafana, New Relic, or similar monitoring platforms. 
 Familiarity with server management and monitoring, including CPU, memory usage, logs, disk utilization, and alerting systems. 
 Experience working with APIs and third-party integrations (e.g., OTP services, SMTP, or other external system services). 
 Understanding of DevOps practices, including CI/CD processes, merge request/code review, and deployment to staging and production environments. 
 Knowledge of system security, vulnerability management, and dependency maintenance (e.g., deprecated libraries, licensing issues). 
 Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, including root cause analysis and incident handling for production systems. 
 Good communication and collaboration skills to coordinate with internal teams and external stakeholders, including participation in technical discussions and incident management. 
 
 Responsibilities: 
1. Create documentation technical (ERD, Sequence Diagram, LLD) implementation on system related 
 2. Create documentation post mortem issues root cause and problem solving.  
 3. Monitoring APM related data (cpu usage, ram usage, logs) on Grafana, Jenifer, New Relic, or True Watch 
 4. Monitoring integration third-party attribute which related business process on system (quotas OTP, SMTP, etc) 
 5. Monitoring and housekeeping (disk cleaning or alerting) internal or external server related business processes that potential blocking business process (QR Server, Kumulate Server) 
 6. Monitoring and updates of vulnerability, unsupported license, or deprecated dependency that implement on current systems. (Nginx ingress deprecated, Redis license is not open source anymore). 
 7. Contribute to fixing and optimizing from finding data APM related or new feature improvement from client. (high cpu or ram usage, new security concerns, bugs or improvement). 
 8. Review merge request additional features that will be released on environment staging and production 
 9. Communicate and measure estimation of work from finding issues. 
 10. Proactive to recommend short term and long term solutions for finding issues. 
 11. Attend weekly meeting discussions with the internal and external team. 
 12. Create documentation release journals for applications which want to be released. 
 13. Manually run/trigger some features based on cases (IndonesianaTV - sync). 
 14. Verify regular system backups and test restoration procedures. 
 15. Act as first responder for critical production alerts through monitoring applications.

Deskripsi:
Are you a seasoned backend engineer with a passion for building robust and scalable systems? Do you thrive in a fast-paced environment where your work directly impacts environmental sustainability? If so, we're looking for you! At  Jejakin , we're on a mission to empower organizations to achieve their sustainability goals. We're seeking a  Senior Backend Engineer  to join our team and help us build and maintain the core services that drive our platform. You'll play a crucial role in designing, developing, and deploying high-performance applications that handle complex data and integrate with various technologies, ensuring they meet the highest standards of security, reliability, and availability.

 Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Mathematics, Physics, or a related technical field. 
 3+ years of professional experience in BackEnd Engineer or Development. 
 Strong proficiency in Java  with the ability and willingness to transition to Kotlin. 
 Hands-on experience with microservices architecture.

 Solid knowledge of databases, including PostgreSQL and MongoDB.

 Demonstrable experience with unit testing. 
 Comfortable reading and understanding technical documentation and API specifications. 
 Familiarity with RESTful APIs and gRPC. 
 Proficiency with Kafka, Redis, and Elasticsearch/OpenSearch. 
 Experience with CI/CD tools, preferably Jenkins. 
 Understanding of Secure Software Development Lifecycle (Secure SDLC). 
 Proactive attitude with a strong sense of ownership and the ability to thrive in a dynamic, stretch-oriented environment.

 Develop and maintain backend services using Kotlin and Spring Boot, adhering to engineering best practices.

 Actively read and understand technical documentation and API specifications to effectively implement and integrate new technologies.

Skills: IT Management, Analytical Skills, Microsoft Excel, Web Analytics, Teamwork, IT Security
Deskripsi:
Kami mencari Backend Programmer yang tangkas untuk merancang, membangun, dan memelihara layanan backend menggunakan arsitektur berbasis API. Anda akan bekerja dengan dua ekosistem utama (Go dan PHP) untuk memastikan skalabilitas sistem internal dan kelancaran integrasi dengan berbagai API pihak ketiga. 
 
 Tanggung Jawab Utama 
 
 
 Pengembangan Layanan: Merancang dan mengembangkan RESTful API berkinerja tinggi menggunakan Go (Gin framework) untuk layanan berbeban tinggi, dan memelihara/mengembangkan fitur pada ekosistem PHP (Laravel). 
 Integrasi API: Melakukan integrasi dengan API pihak ketiga (Payment Gateway, layanan logistik, sistem ERP/CRM, dll) secara aman dan efisien. 
 Optimasi Sistem: Menganalisis bottleneck performa pada codebase yang ada dan melakukan refactoring atau optimasi query database. 
 Dokumentasi: Menyusun dan memelihara dokumentasi API yang jelas untuk digunakan oleh tim Frontend atau klien eksternal. 
 Deploy Aplikasi: Men deploy aplikasi ke cloudserver muali dari tahap persiapan, konfigurasi, pengujian, dan peluncuran. 
 
 
 Kualifikasi: 
 
 
 Pengalaman kerja minimal 1 tahun sebagai Backend Developer. 
 Pemahaman mendalam tentang Go (Golang), khususnya menggunakan framework Gin. 
 Pengalaman solid menggunakan PHP dan framework Laravel (termasuk Eloquent ORM dan routing). 
 Pengalaman terbukti dalam merancang, membangun, dan mengonsumsi RESTful APIs serta menangani format data JSON/XML. 
 Mahir dalam pengelolaan Relational Database (MySQL dan PostgreSQL), termasuk optimasi query dan pemahaman tentang indexing. 
 Terbiasa dengan sistem version control menggunakan Git (Git flow, pull request, code review). 
 Pemahaman kuat tentang sistem autentikasi/otorisasi (JWT, OAuth2). 
 Mampu membuat rancangan aplikasi 
 
 
 
 Soft Skills  
 
 Kemampuan pemecahan masalah (troubleshooting/debugging) yang tajam. 
 Mampu bekerja sama dengan baik bersama tim lintas fungsi (Frontend, QA, dan Product Manager). 
 Adaptif dan mau terus belajar teknologi baru sesuai kebutuhan arsitektur sistem.

 Kami mencari  Backend Engineer  yang  kritis ,  analitis , dan  proaktif , yang mampu berpikir secara sistematis dalam membangun sistem backend yang stabil, terstruktur, dan berkualitas tinggi. Kandidat yang kami cari juga nyaman berdiskusi, bertukar ide, serta memiliki rasa ingin tahu untuk mengeksplorasi teknologi baru guna mengikuti perkembangan industri. 
 -------------------------------------- 
 Job Description 
 
 Mengembangkan dan memelihara REST API yang efisien, aman, dan scalable. 
 Mendesain serta mengoptimalkan skema database menggunakan PostgreSQL dan Prisma ORM. 
 Berkolaborasi dengan tim front-end untuk integrasi API dan memastikan komunikasi data berjalan dengan baik. 
 Melakukan testing, debugging, dan troubleshooting untuk menjaga stabilitas sistem. 
 Memantau performa backend serta melakukan refactor dan optimisasi jika diperlukan. 
 Menulis dan memperbarui dokumentasi teknis terkait API dan arsitektur sistem. 
 Berkontribusi dalam diskusi teknis dan pengembangan arsitektur backend seiring pertumbuhan produk. 
 
 -------------------------------------- 
 Requirements 
 
 Minimal 1 tahun pengalaman sebagai Backend Developer atau posisi serupa. 
 Menguasai Node.js dan framework Express.js. 
 Berpengalaman menggunakan Prisma ORM dan database PostgreSQL. 
 Memahami konsep REST API dan praktik pengembangan API yang baik. 
 Familiar dengan autentikasi dan otorisasi seperti JWT atau OAuth. 
 Memahami penggunaan middleware dalam pengembangan backend. 
 Terbiasa menggunakan Git dan memahami workflow pengelolaan versi kode (branching, pull request, code review). 
 Memiliki kemampuan problem solving yang baik serta mampu berpikir kritis dan analitis dalam menyelesaikan permasalahan teknis. 
 Terbuka untuk diskusi teknis dan eksplorasi teknologi baru untuk meningkatkan kualitas sistem dan mengikuti tren perkembangan software. 
 
 ------------------------------------- 
 Benefit 
 
 Gaji kompetitif 
 Kesempatan membangun produk SaaS global 
 Lingkungan kerja yang fokus pada teknologi dan inovasi 
 
 ------------------------------------- 
 Catatan : 
 
 Diutamakan berdomisili di Yogyakarta 
 Bersedia bekerja dalam jangka waktu yang panjang 
 Tidak dalam menempuh pendidikan (kuliah/sekolah). 
 
 Apabila Anda masih aktif kuliah atau sekolah, disarankan untuk tidak melanjutkan proses apply lamaran pekerjaan.

Skills: PostgreSQL, gRPC, Prometheus, Grafana, MySQL
Deskripsi:
Role Overview 
 We are looking for a Backend Engineer specializing in Golang to join our engineering team. This role focuses on building and maintaining backend services that power high-traffic applications and real-time systems. 
 We are looking for engineers who can take ownership of their work, operate independently, and deliver reliable backend systems with minimal supervision. The ideal candidate is proactive, responsible, and comfortable working in a fast-moving engineering environment. 
 
 What You’ll Be Doing: 
 - Design, develop, and maintain backend services using Golang 
 - Build scalable APIs and backend systems that support high concurrency and reliability 
 - Collaborate with frontend, mobile, and product teams to implement new features 
 - Participate in code reviews and maintain high code quality standards 
 - Identify performance bottlenecks and improve system efficiency 
 - Debug production issues and implement reliable fixes 
 - Ensure services are observable, maintainable, and well-tested 
 - Contribute ideas to improve system architecture and engineering practices 
 
Requirements: 
 
 3-5 years working in backend production environments. (Go and Rust preferred). 
 Strong experience with Golang and backend service development. 
 Experience building and maintaining RESTful APIs or microservices. 
 Solid understanding of clean architecture, concurrency, and distributed systems. 
 Experience with SQL (PostgreSQL preferred), REST/gRPC APIs, GRPC and cloud-native stacks. 
 Comfortable with Docker, and infrastructure basics. 
 Experience with message queues (e.g. NATS, Kafka, NSQ). 
 Comfortable working with AI as a development tools. 
 
 
 Nice-to-Have: 
 
 Familiarity with WebSocket, messaging systems, or event-driven architecture. 
 Experience building high-concurrency or real-time systems. 
 Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, or cloud infrastructure 
 
 
 Bonus Points: 
 
 Mandarin speaker, due to collaboration with Mandarin-speaking stakeholders. 
 
 
 职位概述 
 我们正在寻找一位精通 Golang 的后端工程师加入我们的工程团队。该职位专注于构建和维护为高流量应用和实时系统提供支持的后端服务。 
 我们希望找到能够独立负责工作、在极少监督下交付可靠后端系统的工程师。理想的候选人应积极主动、认真负责，并能适应快节奏的工程环境。 
 
 您的职责： 
 - 使用 Golang 设计、开发和维护后端服务 
 - 构建支持高并发和高可靠性的可扩展 API 和后端系统 
 - 与前端、移动端和产品团队协作，实现新功能 
 - 参与代码审查，并保持高标准的代码质量 
 - 识别性能瓶颈并提高系统效率 
 - 调试生产环境问题并实施可靠的修复 
 - 确保服务的可观察性、可维护性和充分的测试 
 - 为改进系统架构和工程实践贡献想法 
 
 任职要求： 
 3-5 年后端生产环境工作经验。（优先考虑 Go 和 Rust）精通 Golang 和后端服务开发。 
 具备构建和维护 RESTful API 或微服务的经验。 
 对整洁架构、并发和分布式系统有深入的理解。 
 熟悉 SQL（首选 PostgreSQL）、REST/gRPC API、gRPC 和云原生技术栈。 
 熟悉 Docker 和基础设施基础知识。 
 熟悉消息队列（例如 NATS、Kafka、NSQ）。 
 能够熟练地使用 AI 作为开发工具。 
 
 加分项： 
 熟悉 WebSocket、消息系统或事件驱动架构。 
 具备构建高并发或实时系统的经验。 
 具备 Docker、Kubernetes 或云基础设施的经验。 
 
 加分项： 
 会说普通话，因为需要与讲普通话的利益相关者合作。

Skills: Microservices Architecture, Technical Leadership, Database Design, System Design, Software Architecture, Laravel, Go / Golang, Code Review, Node.js
Deskripsi:
Role Overview 
 As a Senior Backend Engineer at DDN, you will play a key role in supporting the Tech Lead to ensure a strong and scalable backend foundation. This role goes beyond writing code — you are responsible for maintaining architectural integrity, performance, security standards, and technical quality across projects. 
 You will collaborate closely with System Analysts, Frontend Engineers, QA, DevOps, and PMO to translate business requirements into reliable and maintainable technical solutions. 
 Key Responsibilities 
 
 Design and develop scalable, modular, and maintainable backend architecture. 
 Build and maintain APIs, services, and integrations with external systems. 
 Optimize application and database performance for speed and efficiency. 
 Ensure security-by-design principles and adherence to best practices. 
 Produce and maintain backend technical documentation (API specs, architecture diagrams, deployment guides). 
 Conduct code reviews and provide technical guidance to junior engineers. 
 Collaborate with System Analysts to translate SRS and use cases into backend designs. 
 Support QA in test scenario preparation and follow up on UAT findings. 
 Coordinate with DevOps for deployment, CI/CD, monitoring, and troubleshooting. 
 Support the Tech Lead in technical decision-making and backend quality governance. 
 
 
 Key Deliverables 
 
 API Documentation (REST / GraphQL) 
 System & Database Architecture Diagrams 
 Deployment & Monitoring Guidelines 
 Structured and maintainable codebase 
 Contribution to security checklist and technical review processes 
 
 
 Minimum Qualifications 
 
 Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field. 
 Graduates from reputable universities (national or international). 
 5+ years of experience as a Backend Engineer, with at least 2 years at senior level.

Skills: Restful API, Node.js, PostgreSQL, TypeScript, GraphQL
Deskripsi:
Australian Technology Consulting Firm 
 Position Available: Senior Backend API Engineer (Remote) 
 We are an Australian-based technology and business consulting firm seeking a highly skilled, results-driven Senior Backend API Engineer to support our Australian clients on cutting-edge digital platforms. This is a remote opportunity working on high-impact projects for leading Australian organisations in sports, media, and entertainment. 
 You will be responsible for architecting the "engine room" of world-class digital experiences. From building scalable API Marketplaces to engineering high-concurrency data engines, you will work with modern tech stacks to deliver measurable business outcomes in a fast-paced, agile environment. 
 
 The Role: Backend API Engineer 
 Focus: Architecting robust server-side logic, polyglot data persistence, and scalable API ecosystems. 
 
 Required Skills: 
 Expert Node.js & TypeScript: Deep proficiency in NestJS or Express for building enterprise-grade services. 
 API Design & Strategy: Advanced knowledge of RESTful patterns, GraphQL (Apollo), and OpenAPI/Swagger specifications. 
 Polyglot Persistence: Strong experience selecting and implementing the right database for the use case (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, DynamoDB, or MySQL). 
 High-Performance Caching: Practical experience with Redis or Memcached for session management and API response caching. 
 Cloud Architecture: Hands-on experience with AWS (Lambda, API Gateway, AppSync, S3) and serverless workflows. 
 Platform Engineering: Experience with API Management (e.g., Kong, Tyk) including rate-limiting, throttling, and multi-tenancy. 
 Security & Auth: Strong implementation skills with OAuth2.0, OpenID Connect, and JWT at scale. 
 
 What We're Looking For 
 MUST-HAVE Qualities: 
 
 Scalability Mindset: You design systems that don't just work—they scale to handle millions of concurrent requests during peak events. 
 Results-Driven: You focus on delivering functional, high-performance outcomes, not just writing code. 
 Fast Learner: You can pivot quickly between different client codebases and business domains. 
 Strong Communication: You can clearly articulate technical decisions and architectural trade-offs in English. 
 Quality-Obsessed: You take pride in writing clean, well-tested (TDD), and maintainable code. 
 
 Language Requirement: 
 
 Professional working proficiency in English (written and spoken) is MANDATORY.

 Project Examples & Impact

Job Description – .NET Developer 
 
 
 
 Mengembangkan, memelihara, dan meningkatkan aplikasi berbasis .NET Core / .NET Framework sesuai kebutuhan bisnis. 
 Merancang dan mengimplementasikan RESTful API untuk mendukung integrasi antar sistem. 
 Mengelola serta mengoptimalkan database relasional (RDBMS) yang digunakan dalam aplikasi. 
 Mengimplementasikan tampilan aplikasi menggunakan Bootstrap, JavaScript, dan jQuery dengan memperhatikan prinsip UI/UX. 
 Menerapkan arsitektur MVC secara konsisten dalam proses pengembangan aplikasi. 
 Melakukan troubleshooting, debugging, dan perbaikan bug pada sistem yang berjalan. 
 Berkolaborasi dengan tim developer, analyst, dan QA dalam seluruh tahapan pengembangan. 
 Menyusun dan memperbarui dokumentasi teknis aplikasi dan API. 
 
 
 
 Job Requirements – .NET Developer 
 
 
 
 Pendidikan minimal S1 jurusan Ilmu Komputer, Sistem Informasi, atau Teknologi Informasi. 
 Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 2 tahun dalam pengembangan aplikasi menggunakan .NET Core / .NET Framework. 
 Memiliki pengalaman menggunakan salah satu RDBMS (MySQL, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, atau Oracle). 
 Memiliki pengalaman dalam pengembangan RESTful API menggunakan JSON dan/atau XML. 
 Menguasai JavaScript dan jQuery, termasuk AJAX, DataTables, dan manipulasi event. 
 Memahami dan mampu menerapkan konsep MVC dalam pengembangan aplikasi .NET. 
 Mampu menggunakan Bootstrap untuk pengembangan tampilan aplikasi. 
 Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim. 
 Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang aktif dan kolaboratif. 
 Memiliki pemahaman UI/UX dan mampu mengimplementasikan desain yang user-friendly menjadi nilai tambah. 
 Memiliki sertifikat yang berkaitan dengan programming menjadi nilai lebih.

Tugas utama Anda termasuk merancang arsitektur sistem, mengimplementasikan fitur-fitur baru, serta memastikan semua elemen aplikasi berjalan dengan lancar. Selain itu, Anda akan terlibat dalam pengujian dan optimasi aplikasi untuk meningkatkan performa dan keandalan. Jika Anda siap untuk berkontribusi dalam proyek-proyek yang menantang dan ingin belajar dari para profesional terbaik, kami mengundang Anda untuk melamar.

 Develop and configure systems/applications based on requirements provided by the product team.

 Conduct requirement analysis and implement enhancements to improve system functionality. 
 
 
 Maintenance Responsibilities:

 Knowledge 
 
 Fullstack, Mastery on:

 Experience in designing and managing large databases and distributed systems. 
 
 Non-technical 
 
 Collaborate with other teams (e.g. product teams, UX/UI, and project managers) to plan and design features and solutions. 
 Provide Insight and Contribute to the software development process, seeking ways to improve the team's efficiency and effectiveness in producing high-quality software

 Deep understanding of the product (business use case, specification, transaction flow, technical stack)"

 Ensure the code is functioning properly and meets quality standards by using self and unit test 
 
 Experience: 	Over 4 years of proven experience in software development, delivering reliable and efficient solutions. 
 Qualifications: 	Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, Data Science, or Computer Science.

Skills: Python, Unity3D, C#, Augmented Reality
Deskripsi:
Job Description  
 We are seeking an Augmented Reality (AR) Developer to design and build AR applications using Unity, AR Foundation, ARCore, and ARKit, while integrating Computer Vision and Machine Learning models to create immersive, intelligent solutions for Industry 4.0. The ideal candidate will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-performance, user-centric AR experiences that drive innovation in industrial environments.  
 
 Key Responsibilities  
 
 Develop AR applications using Unity (C#), AR Foundation, ARKit/ARCore, or Vuforia for mobile devices and AR glasses (e.g., HoloLens)    
 Integrate computer vision models (object detection, OCR, segmentation) into AR pipelines for real-time analysis and visualization    
 Design and implement tracking solutions (marker-based, marker-less, SLAM) to ensure accurate spatial alignment and stable AR experiences in industrial environments    
 Collaborate with CV engineers to build APIs and interfaces that connect AR apps with backend inference systems    
 Optimize AR applications for performance, stability, and usability under challenging conditions (low light, moving machinery, large-scale environments)   
 Prototype and test AR features to evaluate feasibility, reliability, and value for industrial operations   
 Maintain and document AR codebase, ensuring scalability and reusability across multiple projects   
 Stay up to date with the latest AR/VR, XR, and CV technologies and recommend improvements  
 
 
 Qualification  
 
 Bachelor's or master’s in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Electrical/Electronic Engineering, or related fields 
 Hands-on experience developing an AR application in Unity (C#) and AR Development (AR Foundation, ARKit, ARCore, Vuforia) 
 Experience with Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and/or Computer Vision is a plus 
 Strong programming background in C# and Python 
 Strong verbal and written communication skills in English 
 Ability to work independently with minimal supervision 
 Willing to stay and work in Bandung 
 
 
 Essential Competencies  
 
 Unity  
 C#  
 Python  
 Augmented Reality

Skills: Python, C++, MongoDB, Microsoft SQL Server, Java, PHP, Laravel, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Vue.js, Node.js
Deskripsi:
I. Keterampilan Kunci dan Analisis (Wajib) 
 Pemecahan Masalah (Problem Solving) : 
 
 Wajib memiliki rekam jejak yang terbukti dalam mengidentifikasi, mendiagnosis, dan menyelesaikan bug kompleks serta masalah performa aplikasi secara efisien, baik di front-end maupun back-end. 
 Mampu menganalisis akar masalah (root cause analysis) secara mendalam, bukan hanya memperbaiki gejala. 
 
 Analisis Proaktif : 
 
 Mampu menganalisis masalah yang mungkin muncul kemudian hari (risiko teknis, bottleneck performa, isu skalabilitas) berdasarkan desain dan implementasi saat ini. 
 Berperan aktif dalam meninjau desain arsitektur dan kode untuk mengidentifikasi area yang rentan terhadap kegagalan atau pemeliharaan yang sulit. 
 Kemampuan merancang solusi yang tahan masa depan (future-proof) dan mudah dipertahankan (maintainable). 
 
 
 II. Persyaratan Teknis (Wajib) 
 A. Front-End Development 
 
 Vue.js: Pengalaman yang kuat dalam membangun Single Page Application (SPA) menggunakan Vue.js (versi terbaru lebih diutamakan). 
 State Management: Mahir menggunakan state management seperti Vuex atau Pinia. 
 Modern Web Tech: Pemahaman mendalam tentang HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), dan framework CSS (misalnya Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, atau sejenisnya). 
 Integrasi API: Pengalaman dalam mengintegrasikan RESTful API. 
 
 B. Back-End Development 
 
 Node.js & Express.js: Pengalaman solid dalam membangun server-side application dan RESTful API menggunakan Node.js dan framework seperti Express.js atau framework modern lainnya. 
 Asynchronous Programming: Pemahaman yang kuat tentang konsep asinkron di Node.js. 
 Security: Pengetahuan tentang praktik keamanan web dasar (misalnya otentikasi/otorisasi, sanitasi input, pencegahan XSS/CSRF). 
 
 C. Database 
 
 SQL Server: Keahlian dalam desain, implementasi, dan pengelolaan basis data menggunakan Microsoft SQL Server. 
 SQL: Mahir dalam menulis query SQL yang kompleks, efisien, dan teroptimasi (optimized). 
 
 
 III. Nilai Tambah (Plus Points) 
 
 Stored Procedure: Pengalaman dan penguasaan dalam membuat, memelihara, dan mengoptimalkan Stored Procedure, Function, dan Trigger di SQL Server adalah nilai tambah yang besar (Hal Plus). 
 Testing: Pengalaman dengan Unit Testing (misalnya Jest, Mocha) dan End-to-End Testing. 
 DevOps: Familiar dengan Git, proses CI/CD, dan deployment ke cloud platform (misalnya Azure, AWS, GCP). 
 Arsitektur: Pemahaman tentang pola desain (design patterns) dan arsitektur software (e.g., MVC, Microservices). 
 
 
 IV. Kualifikasi Umum 
 Gelar Sarjana di bidang Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika, atau bidang terkait (atau pengalaman kerja yang setara). 
 Pengalaman kerja profesional sebagai Web Developer (Full-Stack atau fokus pada front-end/back-end yang relevan). 
 Kemampuan bekerja dalam tim, komunikasi yang baik, dan keterbukaan terhadap feedback dan code review.

 Kemampuan merancang solusi yang tahan masa depan (future-proof) dan mudah dipertahankan (maintainable). 
 
 
 II. Persyaratan Teknis (Wajib) 
 A. Front-End Development 
 
 Vue.js: Pengalaman yang kuat dalam membangun Single Page Application (SPA) menggunakan Vue.js (versi terbaru lebih diutamakan). 
 State Management: Mahir menggunakan state management seperti Vuex atau Pinia. 
 Modern Web Tech: Pemahaman mendalam tentang HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), dan framework CSS (misalnya Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, atau sejenisnya). 
 Integrasi API: Pengalaman dalam mengintegrasikan RESTful API. 
 
 B. Back-End Development 
 
 Node.js & Express.js: Pengalaman solid dalam membangun server-side application dan RESTful API menggunakan Node.js dan framework seperti Express.js atau framework modern lainnya. 
 Asynchronous Programming: Pemahaman yang kuat tentang konsep asinkron di Node.js. 
 Security: Pengetahuan tentang praktik keamanan web dasar (misalnya otentikasi/otorisasi, sanitasi input, pencegahan XSS/CSRF). 
 
 C. Database 
 
 SQL Server: Keahlian dalam desain, implementasi, dan pengelolaan basis data menggunakan Microsoft SQL Server. 
 SQL: Mahir dalam menulis query SQL yang kompleks, efisien, dan teroptimasi (optimized). 
 
 
 III. Nilai Tambah (Plus Points) 
 
 Stored Procedure: Pengalaman dan penguasaan dalam membuat, memelihara, dan mengoptimalkan Stored Procedure, Function, dan Trigger di SQL Server adalah nilai tambah yang besar (Hal Plus). 
 Testing: Pengalaman dengan Unit Testing (misalnya Jest, Mocha) dan End-to-End Testing. 
 DevOps: Familiar dengan Git, proses CI/CD, dan deployment ke cloud platform (misalnya Azure, AWS, GCP). 
 Arsitektur: Pemahaman tentang pola desain (design patterns) dan arsitektur software (e.g., MVC, Microservices). 
 
 
 IV. Kualifikasi Umum 
 Gelar Sarjana di bidang Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika, atau bidang terkait (atau pengalaman kerja yang setara). 
 Pengalaman kerja profesional sebagai Web Developer (Full-Stack atau fokus pada front-end/back-end yang relevan). 
 Kemampuan bekerja dalam tim, komunikasi yang baik, dan keterbukaan terhadap feedback dan code review.

Skills: Python, PostgreSQL, Redis
Deskripsi:
About You 
 
Are you someone who enjoys working in an environment where: 
* You participate in creating best in class mobile apps in Indonesia 
* You work with some of the best Python and mobile developers in Indonesia 
* You develop big data products that scales to serve many millions of customers 
* Casual and fun working environment. Strictly no office politics! 
* Work/life balance is respected 
 
If you enjoy working programming and learning about new technologies, you have come to the right place. We're looking for the best talents in Indonesia who want to constantly push the boundaries of what's possible. 
 
 About Stamps 
 Stamps is the biggest cloud-based CRM/loyalty platform in Indonesia,  serving numerous leading brands with hundreds of thousands of unique members (and growing fast). We are looking for the best technical talents to scale the platform to accommodate millions of users. 
 We are one of the best mobile development companies  in Indonesia, being national winners of the prestigious Bubu Awards,  the largest digital event in Indonesia for two consecutive years. We won  the 2014 award by making GO-JEK's iOS App and the 2015 award by making  Setipe's iOS app. 
 Our main development focus are our core platform and the mobile  ecosystems - iOS and Android based apps so by joining us, you will learn  to write the best mobile apps in Indonesia. 
 As such, we offer multiple developer opportunities in Stamps:  
 - Backend engineer: responsible for main application logic, server and network infrastructure.  
 - Frontend engineer: responsible for creating user friendly, fluid user interfaces.  
 - Mobile engineer: responsible for iOS and Android apps.   
 
 Requirements: 
 
 1-3 years’ experience as Software Developer. 
 Passionate in developing systems that require performance and scale. 
 Solid understanding of object oriented programming language is required. 
 
 Plus points: 
 
 Active in contributing to various open source projects. Stamps use a  lot of open source components and we try to contribute back to the  community and maintain a few popular projects. 
 Have prior experience in developing iOS/Android Apps.

 Professional and collaborative office environment 
 Opportunity to work on real-world, production-level mobile applications

 Clear career growth opportunities based on performance

Deskripsi:
Description: 
 We are seeking a Full Stack Developer with strong experience in Golang for backend development and Next.js for frontend development. The candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable web applications, ensuring high performance, reliability, and security across the entire technology stack. 
 This role requires the ability to work on end-to-end application development, including API design, backend services, database integration, and modern frontend interfaces. 
 Key Responsibilities 
 •	Design, develop, and maintain backend services using Golang. 
 •	Build and maintain RESTful APIs or GraphQL APIs for application services. 
 •	Develop responsive and high-performance web interfaces using Next.js and React. 
 •	Integrate frontend components with backend APIs. 
 •	Design and maintain database schemas and optimized queries. 
 •	Implement authentication, authorization, and security best practices. 
 •	Conduct code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization. 
 •	Collaborate with product managers, UI/UX designers, and DevOps engineers. 
 •	Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code. 
 •	Participate in system architecture design and technical planning. 
 •	Experience with AI-assisted or agentic development tools is considered an advantage. However, candidates who are motivated to learn and adopt such tools in their development workflow are equally welcomed. 
 Required Skills 
 Backend 
 •	Strong proficiency in Golang 
 •	Experience developing RESTful APIs or microservices 
 •	Familiarity with Golang frameworks Gin 
 •	Experience with: 
 •	JWT authentication 
 •	Middleware architecture 
 •	API security best practices 
 Frontend 
 •	Strong experience with React.js 
 •	Solid experience using Next.js 
 •	Understanding of: 
 •	Server-Side Rendering (SSR) 
 •	Static Site Generation (SSG) 
 •	API Routes 
 •	Familiarity with modern UI frameworks such as: 
 •	Tailwind CSS 
 Database 
 •	MySQL 
 •	Experience with database schema design 
 •	Query optimization 
 •	Redis (optional but preferred) 
 Development & Infrastructure 
 •	Git version control 
 •	Basic Docker 
 •	Basic CI/CD pipelines 
 •	Basic Linux server administration 
 Nice to Have 
 •	Experience with microservices architecture 
 •	Familiarity with message queues (Kafka) 
 •	Experience building high-traffic or distributed systems 
 •	Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, 
 or equivalent practical experience. 
 Soft Skills 
 •	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities 
 •	Ability to work independently and collaboratively 
 •	Good written and verbal communication skills 
 •	Experience working in an Agile development environment 
 Experience 
 •	Minimum 2–4 years of experience as a Full Stack Developer 
 •	Proven experience building applications using Golang and Next.js 
 Benefits 
 Candidates are expected to possess strong programming fundamentals and a solid understanding of software development principles. 
 Applicants who primarily come from other programming language backgrounds are encouraged to apply, provided they demonstrate strong engineering fundamentals and the ability to adapt to new technologies. 
 Experience with AI-assisted or agentic development tools is considered an advantage. However, candidates who are motivated to learn and adopt such tools in their development workflow are equally welcomed. 
 The company provides access to AI development platforms such a Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor to support engineers in improving productivity and development efficiency.

Judul: Backend Software Engineer (Growth Path to Ruby on Rails)
Skills: PHP, Python, MySQL, Laravel, Ruby on Rails
Deskripsi:
Role Overview 
 
 We're looking for a Backend Software Engineer with strong fundamentals in any backend language (Go, Python, PHP/Laravel, Node.js, Java, or similar) who wants to grow into Ruby on Rails. You don't need prior Rails experience — we provide a structured 4-week onboarding program with pair programming and mentoring from senior engineers. 
 
 You will join the team that owns our consumer-facing application: product discovery, booking flow, payment flow, reviews, and user account management. You will take ownership of features from design through deployment and maintenance, working closely with Product, QA, and DevOps. 
 
 What You'll Do 
 
 - Develop and maintain backend features in our Rails monolith and contribute to Go/TypeScript microservices 
 - Design scalable, high-performance data models and APIs 
 - Improve codebase quality by implementing best practices and reducing technical debt 
 - Drive improvements to key parts of the application (e.g., booking and payment flows) to enhance performance 
 - Participate in breaking down our monolith into well-designed services where it makes sense 
 - Own rollout strategies for new features: staging, testing, deployment, monitoring, and rollback plans 
 - Drive and participate in code reviews; uphold and improve coding standards 
 - Collaborate closely with Product Managers, QA, DevOps, and Data teams 
 
 Our Tech Stack 
 
 - Ruby on Rails (primary — you will learn this) 
 - MySQL Aurora, Memcached, Redis 
 - Sidekiq for background jobs 
 - Elasticsearch for search 
 - AWS: EC2, RDS, S3, EKS 
 - Go and TypeScript for microservices 
 
 What We're Looking For 
 
 - 2+ years of backend development experience in any language (Go, Python, PHP, Node.js, Java, etc.) 
 - Strong understanding of MVC architecture, REST APIs, and relational databases (MySQL or similar) 
 - Experience building and optimizing consumer-facing web applications 
 - Comfort owning features end-to-end: design, implementation, rollout, and monitoring 
 - Experience improving existing codebases, not just greenfield work 
 - Excellent communication skills; able to push back constructively on unclear requirements 
 - Growth mindset — enthusiastic about learning new technologies 
 
 Nice to Have 
 
 - Experience with Ruby on Rails 
 - Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS) 
 - Experience with message queues (Kafka/Redis) 
 - Experience with Docker/Kubernetes 
 
 What We Offer 
 
 - Structured Rails onboarding program (4 weeks dedicated learning) 
 - Pair programming with senior engineers 
 - AI-assisted development tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code) 
 - Career growth at a profitable restaurant marketplace (Bangkok & Singapore) 
 - Remote-first work setup 
 - Core hours overlap: 10:00-18:00 GMT+7 
 - Working language: English 
 
 How You Work (Culture Fit) 
 
 - Low-ego and collaborative: you care about the best solution, not being right 
 - Proactive: you take initiative with the team's support and context 
 - Candid: you give and receive constructive feedback openly 
 - Data-driven: you lean on metrics and evidence 
 - User-focused: you care about the experience for real users 
 - Continuous learner and team player

Deskripsi:
Placement: IT Consultant client [Kuningan, South Jakarta] 
 Status: PKWT [Contract under Sigmatech] 
 Working type: WFO 
 
 
 Requirement: 
 • Minimum 3 years of professional experience in Fullstack Software Development. 
 • Frontend Expertise: Strong proficiency with ReactJS, TypeScript, modern Hooks, and state management (e.g., Redux, Zustand). 
 • Backend Expertise: In-depth experience with Node.js and the NestJS framework for building APIs. 
 • Database: Solid experience with MySQL or PostgreSQL and practical use of a modern ORM (TypeORM). 
 • Testing: Proven expertise in testing methodologies and tools, especially Jest. 
 • Cloud & DevOps: Hands-on experience with core AWS services and implementing CI/CD pipelines. 
 • Security Focus: A strong understanding of software security principles and best practices. 
 • Excellent communication and problem-solving skills, with the ability to articulate technical decisions clearly.

 • Develop high-quality, reusable frontend components using ReactJS and TypeScript. 
 • Design and build robust, scalable backend microservices using Node.js and the NestJS framework. 
 • Manage relational database interactions (MySQL / ORM) and optimize queries for high throughput. 
 • Translate complex business requirements and UI/UX designs into functional, high-performance applications. 
 • Take end-to-end ownership of features, from initial design and API definition to deployment and monitoring. 
 • Ensure high code quality and reliability by writing comprehensive unit and integration tests using Jest. 
 • Proactively identify and address security vulnerabilities (OWASP Top 10) in both frontend and backend code. 
 • Work with AWS services (e.g., ECS, EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS) to design, provision, and maintain cloud infrastructure. 
 • Implement and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines (e.g., using GitLab CI, or Jenkins) to automate testing and deployment processes. 
 • Use containerization technologies (Docker) to ensure consistency across development, staging, and production environments.

Skills: MySQL, Model-View-Controller (MVC), C#, C++, MS SQL Server, Entity Framework (EF), Web API, ASP.NET, Konsep Object-oriented Programming (oop)
Deskripsi:
PT Softorb Technology Indonesia (STI)  adalah perusahaan Teknologi Informasi yang berdiri sejak 2005 dan berfokus pada solusi Smart Card dan RFID. Kami telah terlibat dalam berbagai proyek besar seperti JakLingko, KCI, MRT Jakarta, LRT Jakarta, TransJakarta, Bank DKI, Bank Mandiri, Jasa Marga, dan banyak lainnya. 
 
 Seiring dengan perkembangan bisnis, kami membuka kesempatan karier untuk posisi Senior Developer dengan rincian tugas sebagai berikut : 
   
 Tanggung Jawab 
 
 Mengembangkan dan menguji aplikasi sesuai kebutuhan bisnis. 
 Melakukan perbaikan (debugging) dan penyempurnaan kode yang sudah berjalan. 
 Mampu mengatur pekerjaan secara mandiri dan bekerja sesuai target waktu. 
 Terlibat dalam code review bersama tim untuk menjaga kualitas kode. 
 Berkomunikasi aktif dengan tim terkait untuk memastikan tujuan proyek tercapai. 
 Teliti, detail-oriented, dan mampu memperkirakan waktu pengerjaan dengan baik. 
 
 Kualifikasi 
 
 Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Ilmu Komputer, Teknologi Informasi, atau bidang terkait. 
 Memiliki inisiatif tinggi, mampu bekerja mandiri maupun dalam tim dengan supervisi minimal. 
 Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi, interpersonal, dan pemecahan masalah yang baik. 
 Memiliki semangat belajar yang tinggi dan mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan. 
 Terorganisir, teliti, dan memiliki perhatian yang baik terhadap detail. 
 Menguasai bahasa pemrograman Java / C / C++. 
 Berpengalaman dalam perancangan, pengembangan, dan pengujian aplikasi web, serta mendukung web services untuk aplikasi. 
 Memiliki  pengalaman minimal 3 tahun menggunakan bahasa pemrograman berbasis .NET (C# / C++). 
 Menguasai ASP.NET, MVC, Entity Framework, Web API, serta konsep Object-Oriented Programming (OOP). 
 Berpengalaman menggunakan database MySQL dan/atau MS SQL Server. 
 
 
 Nilai Plus :  
 - Familiar with source control such as GIT. 
 - Knowledge in smartcard basic.

Skills: DevOps, CI/CD, JavaScript, MySQL, React.js, Node.js, jQuery
Deskripsi:
Responsibilities  
 ● Develop, maintain, and enhance full-stack web applications across both frontend and backend.  
 ● Design and build secure, efficient, and scalable APIs and services.  
 ● Build intuitive, responsive, and user-friendly web interfaces.  
 ● Integrate internal and third-party APIs to support automation and business workflows.  
 ● Manage deployment pipelines and ensure reliable CI/CD processes.  
 ● Collaborate closely with designers, product owners, and other engineers to deliver cohesive solutions.  
 ● Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code.  
 ● Optimize performance and ensure high system availability.  
 ● Participate in code reviews, debugging, and troubleshooting.  
 ● Maintain clear technical documentation and ensure security best practices.  
 ● Advocate for agile principles and contribute to improving development processes.

 ● Proficient in working with relational databases such as PostgreSQL or MySQL.  
 ● Familiar with cloud services (AWS, Azure, GCP), and serverless environments.  
 ● Experience building and integrating RESTful APIs or GraphQL services.  
 ● Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker), and basic DevOps principles.  
 ● Experience with message queues, background job processing, or event-driven systems.  
 ● Understanding of application security, authentication, and data protection practices.  
 ● Familiarity with test-driven development (TDD) and writing unit or integration tests.  
 ● Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

Job Overview 
 We are seeking an experienced  Senior .NET Developer  with  5 years  of professional web development experience to join our team. You will be working on a client project based in France, developing and maintaining a web-based project management system.

The ideal candidate is technically strong, proactive, and comfortable working in a hybrid and flexible working environment.

 Develop and maintain the company’s web-based project management software.

 Lead and support .NET framework upgrade projects (from .NET 4.8 to the latest version).

 Collaborate closely with the development team to achieve operational excellence. 
 Share technical knowledge and best practices with team members. 
 Work autonomously and take initiative in driving projects forward. 
 
 
 Requirements 
 
 Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

 Hands-on experience with .NET framework upgrades. 
 Strong understanding of both server-side and client-side technologies. 
 Professional proficiency in English (spoken and written). 
 Solid problem-solving and analytical skills. 
 Good communication and collaboration skills. 
 Self-motivated, well-organized, and able to work effectively in a hybrid or remote team setup. 
 
 
 Nice to Have 
 
 French-speaking proficiency. 
 Experience with large-scale systems, analytics, or enterprise applications. 
 Exposure to project management or system design responsibilities.

Skills: Backend Development, Teamwork, JavaScript, Frontend Development, Public Speaking, Presentation Skills, Laravel, React.js, Node.js, MongoDB, Restful API, MySQL
Deskripsi:
PT Global Indo Asets, a dynamic company operating in the realms of property and technology, is expanding its team with a new position for a Full Stack Developer and Lead Developer. Our company is at the forefront of integrating cutting-edge technology into real estate solutions, aiming to revolutionize how properties are managed and marketed. By joining our team, you will be part of an innovative environment where your expertise can shape the future of technology-driven property management. We are looking for a candidate who is passionate about leveraging technology to enhance property solutions and who thrives in a fast-paced, collaborative setting. 
 
 As a Full Stack Developer and Lead Developer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable and efficient web applications. Your role will involve working closely with cross-functional teams to ensure smooth project delivery. Key and prioritize features. 
 - Writing clean, maintainable code using technologies such as Node.js, JavaScript, MySQL, React.js, and Frontend Development. 
 - Implementing backend development using technologies like Laravel and Restful API. 
 - Ensuring seamless integration of frontend and backend systems. 
 - Providing leadership and mentorship to junior developers. 
 - Participating in code reviews and contributing to technical documentation. 
 - Presenting project updates and technical insights to stakeholders through effective public speaking and presentation skills. 
 
 We are seeking candidates who meet the following qualifications: 
 
 Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree and have between 1 and 3 years of relevant experience. Essential skills include proficiency in Node.js, JavaScript, MySQL, React.js, Backend Development, Laravel, MongoDB, Restful API, Frontend Development, and strong teamwork and presentation skills. If you are a motivated professional eager to contribute to a forward-thinking company, we encourage you to apply. PT Global Indo Asets offers a stimulating work environment where your contributions can make a significant impact.

Kami mencari Senior Fullstack Web Developer yang memiliki pengalaman dalam pengembangan aplikasi berbasis JavaScript (Node.js & React) untuk sistem berskala enterprise, khususnya pada industri perbankan atau financial services.  Tanggung Jawab 
 
 Mengembangkan dan memelihara aplikasi web fullstack menggunakan Node.js dan React. 
 Mendesain dan membangun RESTful API / Microservices untuk mendukung sistem transaksi perbankan. 
 Mengintegrasikan aplikasi dengan core banking system, payment gateway, dan third-party API. 
 Mengimplementasikan frontend modern menggunakan React, termasuk state management dan reusable component. 
 Mengoptimalkan performa aplikasi untuk mendukung high concurrent transactions. 
 Mengimplementasikan security best practices seperti JWT authentication, encryption, dan secure API communication. 
 Bekerja sama dengan tim QA, DevOps, dan Product Owner dalam proses pengembangan hingga deployment. 
 Melakukan code review, debugging, dan mentoring developer junior.

 REST API integration

 Node.js

 RESTful API / Microservices architecture

 PostgreSQL / MySQL / MongoDB

 Familiar dengan:

 Pengalaman integrasi payment system (Virtual Account, Transfer, QRIS, E-Wallet).

 Memahami konsep API security, rate limiting, dan fraud prevention pada sistem finansial.

Deskripsi:
As Backend engineers, we collaborate with Product Managers, the Frontend Engineer team, Product Designers and also other teams to build the structure of Topremit's app and website. As Backend engineers, we talk a lot about logic and coding. We also learn about teamwork and collaborating with others in our team and cross departments. Our goal is to present the best version of Topremit that is easy to use for our respected users. For that reason, we are responsible for building, and maintaining the server side of Topremit as well as making sure Topremit products are highly secure to be used.

 Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field. 
 Minimum 1 year of experience as a Backend Engineer. 
 Proficient in Docker and Laravel (PHP). 
 Experienced and skilled in using PostgreSQL and Redis for 1 to 2 years. 
 Solid understanding of design patterns for writing reusable code. 
 Strong attention to detail with the ability to write clean, maintainable code. 
 Proven ability to complete tasks efficiently and on time. 
 Collaborative, proactive, and eager to learn, with a strong sense of ownership and continuous improvement mindset. 
 
 What you'll contribute on: 
 
 Build systems for users and internal stakeholders (Finance, Compliance, Marketing). 
 Develop and deliver high-quality features on time. 
 Monitor deployments and resolve issues promptly. 
 Review team members’ code to ensure quality and maintainability. 
 Collaborate in cross-team discussions and contribute to decision-making. 
 Create reusable code and libraries for future use.

Deskripsi:
SoftwareSeni  is a Software Development Company based in Yogyakarta & Sydney, Australia. We have been designing and developing phone apps, websites, and mobile experiences. We love solving tough problems – from user experience to design and code. 
 We build enterprise web-based solutions for clients all over the world, from Australia, Indonesia, Europe, Africa, and America. Our clients from Indonesia: Astra International, Traveloka, Angkasa Pura, Peduli Anak Foundation. Our clients from Australia: Bike Exchange, Downsizing, Red Balloon, Sectara, and many more. 
 
 What will you get? 
 
 Competitive Salary.  We believe that salary is one of the main factors that keep the employee in the company, therefore we can guarantee a competitive salary for our Staff. 
 Career Development & Training.  We have a wonderful onboarding process where we help new team members get familiar with how we work.  
 Reasonable & Flexible Schedules.  We are encouraging a culture where people can have a good work-life balance. Our schedules are pretty flexible. Need to run an errand in the middle of the day? Totally cool.  
 English Class.  Working in SoftwareSeni means that you would get massive improvement in your English, both spoken and written guarantee! 
 Annual Leave entitlement.  12 working days which can be taken after 3 months of joining. 
 Salary Review Twice a year.  We will review your salary twice annually in December and June. So, you can focus on your work and improve your performance every day. 
 Relocation Allowance . We provide a relocation allowance if you do not live in Yogyakarta. The allowance will cover moving costs for you and your family. 
 Staff Engagement Activities.  We provide fun icebreaker activities in the middle of our working hours to chill and build relationships with all the staff. Sounds fun, right? 
 Birthday Leave.  We also want to celebrate our staff's happiest day by giving them half-day leave on their birthday. 
 
 
 Requirements: 
 
 Minimum of 4+ years of experience developing enterprise applications using Oracle APEX. 
 Strong knowledge of SQL and PL/SQL, with experience designing and managing Oracle Databases. 
 Hands-on experience with web technologies: HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. 
 Proven experience with Oracle APEX low-code framework and building data-driven applications. 
 Experience integrating APIs and enterprise systems is a plus. 
 Practical experience with version control (Git/Bitbucket) and supporting CI/CD pipelines. 
 Excellent English communication skills  to translate technical solutions for both engineering and non-engineering stakeholders. 
 Strong analytical skills and problem-solving aptitude. 
 Attention to detail. 
 Proactive, autonomous, and able to lead technical discussions. 
 Collaborative mindset and ability to drive team success. 
 
 
 Job Description: 
 
 Independently develop and maintain complex web applications using Oracle APEX. 
 Design, optimize, and manage database structures, workflows, and business logic using SQL and PL/SQL. 
 Build dashboards, reports, and forms for internal or client-facing applications. 
 Integrate Oracle APEX applications with other systems and APIs. 
 Optimize and maintain existing applications for performance, scalability, and usability. 
 Collaborate in Agile teams, contribute to architectural decisions, and improve development processes. 
 Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve complex application issues.

Skills: Google Sheets, JavaScript, MySQL, Jira, Python, Trello, SQL
Deskripsi:
Mindo Solutions is looking for a detail-oriented and proactive  Developer  to join our growing team! If you are passionate about building smart tools, enjoy solving real-world operational problems, and thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced environment, we’d love to hear from you. 
 
 Key Responsibilities: 
 
 Develop, maintain and optimize Google Sheets, including designing complex formulas to support operational workflows. 
 Write, manage and troubleshoot Google Apps Scripts (or JavaScript) used to process and automate data within Google Sheets. 
 Collaborate with the Business Optimization Officer to design and implement scripts, spreadsheets, and auto-generation tools that support workflows in new markets and with new clients. 
 Support the implementation of dual workflow systems that distinguish between compliant transactions and special request transactions, ensuring dashboards remain accurate and clean. 
 Assist in building reliable financial dashboards, reporting structures, and automation tools as part of the short-term tech stack. 
 Work closely with a Technical Supervisor to deliver scalable, practical technical solutions tailored to the team’s daily needs. 
 Support a Project Manager by ensuring all KPIs, dashboards, and spreadsheets are integrated into the Trello system. 
 Help with the design or maintenance of Trello Power-ups to enhance functionality and team productivity. 
 Contribute to launching operations in new markets by ensuring short-term tech and reporting tools are implemented correctly and efficiently. 
 Continuously refine tools and systems based on user feedback, operational changes, or business development needs. 
 
 
 Requirements: 
 
 Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field or equivalent work experience in a technical development role. 
 Strong experience with Google Apps Script (or JavaScript). 
 Advanced skills in Google Sheets, including developing and maintaining complex formulas. 
 Proficient in SQL, able to manage, extract, and analyze data effectively. 
 Working knowledge of Python, useful for potential future contributions to our internal platform. 
 Experience working with or creating Trello Power-ups. 
 Strong problem solving abilities with a keen attention to detail. 
 Self motivated with strong time management skills and the ability to work independently. 
 Certifications in Google Apps Script, Python or SQL are a plus but not required. 
 Good command of English (written and verbal).

Skills: React.js, VB.NET, Microsoft SQL Server, PHP, .NET, Node.js
Deskripsi:
Role Overview   
 We are seeking a senior-level VB.NET developer to manage, maintain, and stabilize  
 existing legacy applications. This role will play a critical part in ensuring business continuity  
 by handling production issues, performing enhancements, and maintaining system  
 reliability.  
 The ideal candidate is highly experienced in working with legacy systems, capable of  
 navigating complex and minimally documented codebases, and able to implement  
 changes in a controlled and low-risk manner.  
 
 Key Responsibilities   
 
  Maintain and support applications developed in VB.NET (.NET Framework)   
 Investigate, troubleshoot, and resolve production issues with proper root cause analysis 
 Perform bug fixing, minor enhancements, and system patches   
 Ensure application stability, reliability, and performance   
 Analyze and understand legacy code with limited documentation   
 Document system behavior, fixes, and technical flows where necessary   
 Conduct impact analysis before implementing changes   
 Collaborate with internal stakeholders (DBA, infrastructure, business users)   
 Support deployment, release, and rollback activities   
 Ensure proper use of version control and change management practices   
 Provide input and recommendations for system improvements or gradual modernization   
 
 
 Required Technical Skills   
 
 Strong experience in VB.NET / .NET Framework (minimum 5–8 years)   
 Proven experience maintaining and supporting legacy / monolithic applications   
 Strong SQL knowledge, preferably Microsoft SQL Server: 
 
 
  Query writing and optimization  
 Stored procedures and database troubleshooting   
 
 
 Experience with Windows-based applications (WinForms / WebForms)   
 Familiarity with source control systems (Git, SVN, or similar)   
 Experience handling production support and incident resolution   
 Ability to understand and work with poorly structured or undocumented codebases  
 
   
 Preferred Skills (Nice to Have)  
 
 Exposure to system integration (APIs, web services)   
 Experience in healthcare or hospital systems (if relevant to your environment)   
 Familiarity with ERP or enterprise systems   
 Experience with logging, monitoring, and incident management tools   
 Working knowledge of modern web technologies, including:   
 
 
 Node.js   
 React   
 PHP   
 
 Soft Skills / Behavioral Requirements   
 
 Strong analytical and problem-solving skills   
 High level of ownership and accountability   
 Able to work independently with minimal supervision   
 Good communication skills, both technical and non-technical   
 Detail-oriented and careful when working in production environments   
 Comfortable working in complex and ambiguous legacy environments 
 
 
 Engagement Details   
 
 Employment Type: Outsource   
 Allocation: full-time / dedicated resource   
 Work Setup: Onsite   
 Contract Duration: 12 months  
 
 Deliverables / KPIs  
 
 Timely resolution of incidents based on agreed SLA   
 Stability and uptime of supported systems   
 Low regression rate from fixes and enhancements   
 Quality and completeness of technical documentation   
 Effective collaboration with internal stakeholders   
 
 Ideal Candidate Profile   
 
 Experienced in handling legacy systems in production environments   
 Able to quickly understand existing systems without heavy documentation   
 Takes a pragmatic approach to balancing quick fixes and long-term stability   
 Comfortable acting as a system owner / caretaker rather than purely feature developer   
 Has exposure to modern technologies, enabling future transition if required

Deskripsi:
Petrolink is a global company that specializes in user-driven technology for the Energy Industry. We are currently looking for a new Front-End Developer to join our team. As a member of the development team, you will be a key player in building innovative products that encompass the future of data management, visualization, and analytics in our industry. Our Developers work as part of a multi-disciplinary team in an Agile/DevOps environment. You will be able to deliver high-quality code and be able to build reliable and scalable applications. 
 
 Duties & Responsibilities: 
 The Web Developer will be responsible for day-to-day coding and development activities. This will include relevant Unit Testing using various Unit Testing tools, as applicable in an Agile and DevOps Environment. This will also include working efficiently with the respective teams and giving consistent results that align well with business needs. The developer must be reliable, should show a high-level of understanding, have an innovative attitude, and be able to meet objectives in a timely manner. They should demonstrate an ability to pro-actively communicate progress and requirements to the technical lead and manager as required. The correct individual will be highly driven and motivated, and be able to meet new and demanding targets consistently and successfully as required. 
 
 Write well-organized and sustainable code. 
 Design new software and perform modifications/maintenance to existing software. 
 Present ideas for software improvements. 
 Work closely with other team members to achieve common goals. 
 Identify and communicate best development practices. 
 Debug/Troubleshoot deployed software. 
 Document requirements and implementation. 
 Work closely with other developers and other staff (including but not limited to Product Manager, Operations, Testers, etc.). 
 
 
 Skills & Qualifications: 
 
 Proven experience in Angular 2+ (preferably up to date with latest releases). 
 Experience in using NodeJS. 
 Experience in HTML/CSS. 
 Work experience in the development of frameworks and web platforms are key to this position. 
 B Tech/MCA/M Tech in Computer Science or related field. 
 1+ year’s relevant experience. 
 Good interpersonal skills. 
 Clear English communication expected in written and oral forms 
 Knowledge and experience of working with Agile development methodologies. 
 
 
 
 Preferred Qualifications: 
 
 Experience in React (ReactJS). 
 Experience in Event-Driven Programming including experience with RabbitMQ, Kafka, or other message brokers. 
 Experience and/or knowledge of .Net/C# or any OOPS Concepts and technologies. 
 Experience working with CI/CD processes and technologies. 
 
 
 The above statements are intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed. They are not intended to be construed as an exhaustive list of all responsibilities, duties and skills.

Skills: MySQL, Node.js, Laravel, PostgreSQL
Deskripsi:
PT Insan Medika Persada adalah perusahaan agency home care terkemuka di Indonesia, yang juga menjadi perintis dalam layanan home care berbasis digital. Dengan menghadirkan layanan Home Care Live-In 24 jam yang mencakup berbagai jenis perawatan seperti perawat disabilitas, perawat lansia, perawat orang sakit, dan perawat medis, perusahaan ini telah memperkuat posisi di industri kesehatan di Indonesia. Kami berkomitmen untuk memberikan solusi terbaik bagi keluarga yang membutuhkan perawatan rumah tangga berkualitas tinggi. Oleh karena itu, kami sedang mencari Full Stack Developer yang berbakat untuk bergabung dengan tim kami dan membantu memajukan layanan home care kami ke tingkat yang lebih tinggi. 
 
 Sebagai Full Stack Developer, Anda akan bertanggung jawab untuk mengembangkan aplikasi dan platform teknologi yang mendukung layanan home care kami. Tugas utama Anda termasuk merancang, mengembangkan, dan mengelola fitur-fitur teknologi yang diperlukan untuk menjaga kualitas layanan. PT BPR Ragasakti, sebuah perusahaan yang berfokus pada memberdayakan impian dan menjamin masa depan para nasabah melalui jasa tabungan, deposito, dan pinjaman, sedang mencari tenaga profesional untuk mengisi posisi Web Developer di kantor cabang Karang Tengah, Tangerang, Banten. PT BPR Ragasakti percaya bahwa setiap orang memiliki potensi untuk berkembang dan mencapai mimpi-mimpi mereka, serta membangun masa depan yang stabil dan cerah. Dengan adanya posisi ini, kami berharap dapat bekerja sama dengan individu yang memiliki dedikasi tinggi dan keahlian teknis yang sesuai untuk membantu memperkuat komitmen kami dalam melayani masyarakat.

Tugas utama Anda termasuk merancang antarmuka pengguna yang intuitif, mengembangkan aplikasi web yang efisien dan responsif, serta memastikan bahwa semua elemen teknis berfungsi dengan baik. Anda juga akan bekerja sama dengan tim untuk memastikan bahwa sistem web selalu up-to-date dan aman dari ancaman teknologi. Posisi ini memerlukan kemampuan analitis tinggi, kreativitas, dan kerja sama tim yang baik. 
 
 Untuk mengisi posisi ini, Anda harus memiliki pendidikan minimal S1 dan memiliki latar belakang yang relevan di bidang teknologi informasi. Keterampilan yang dibutuhkan meliputi pemahaman mendalam terhadap JavaScript, HTML, CSS, dan TypeScript. Anda juga harus memiliki pengalaman dalam pengembangan frontend dan mampu bekerja dengan framework dan tools yang umum digunakan dalam industri. PT BPR Ragasakti sangat menghargai keterampilan dan bakat Anda, dan bersedia memberikan peluang pertumbuhan karier yang mendukung pencapaian potensi penuh Anda. Kami mengharapkan kandidat yang memiliki minat dan dedikasi untuk berkontribusi dalam misi dan visi perusahaan.

Pandu Hotel, sebuah perusahaan hotel rantai di Indonesia yang berdiri sejak tahun 1998, telah berkembang pesat dan mencapai empat cabang. Kami membuka lowongan Database Administrator di Pandu Hotel Cabang Kuta, Kabupaten Lombok Tengah, Nusa Tenggara Barat.

 - Mengembangkan dan mengoptimalkan query untuk mempercepat proses penyimpanan, pencarian, membantu dalam pengambilan keputusan melalui analisis data untuk mendukung strategi bisnis. 
 - Menyediakan dukungan teknis kepada tim operasional untuk memastikan kebutuhan informasi mereka terpenuhi. 
 - Melakukan pemeliharaan dan peningkatan sistem informasi untuk memastikan keamanan dan stabilitas sistem. 
 
 Kualifikasi untuk posisi ini adalah sebagai berikut: 
 
 Penempatan di Kuta, Nusa Tenggara Barat, Indonesia dan berkelamin laki-laki. Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang teknologi informasi atau terkait sangat diutamakan. Pengalaman kerja antara 1 hingga 3 tahun di bidang yang relevan juga diperlukan. Keterampilan yang dibutuhkan adalah kerjasama tim, bahasa Inggris, teknologi informasi, kerja keras, analitik data, administrasi kantor, manajemen waktu, dan administrasi. Pandu Hotel menawarkan lingkungan kerja yang positif dan profesional, dengan kesempatan untuk berkembang bersama.

Deskripsi:
Senior Front-End Developer 
 
 Overview 
 - Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information System, or a related field. 
 - Minimum 5 years of experience in front-end development or related field. 
 - A proactive team player with leadership capabilities. 
 - Strong attention to detail, analytical mindset, and passion for learning new technologies. 
 - Hard working, responsible, and able to work in a fast-paced environment while maintaining a fun attitude. 
 
 Responsibilities 
 - Lead the development of user-facing features with clean, maintainable, and efficient code. 
 - Design and implement reusable components and libraries for scalability and long-term maintenance. 
 - Collaborate closely with UI/UX designers and back-end developers to ensure technical feasibility and seamless integration. 
 - Optimize web applications for performance, responsiveness, and scalability across devices. 
 - Conduct code reviews, mentor junior developers, and ensure adherence to best practices. 
 - Implement robust validation and testing to ensure high-quality deliverables. 
 
 Qualifications 
 - Strong proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+). 
 - Proven experience with modern frameworks such as React.js, Vue.js, or Node.js.
